items.title: Statistiques 2025 de l’Office allemand des brevets : hausse des dépôts et amélioration de l’efficacité juridictionnelle
items.title_zh: 德国专利局2025统计：申请量增长及司法效率提升
items.title_en: Statistiques 2025 de l’Office allemand des brevets : hausse des dépôts et amélioration de l’efficacité juridictionnelle
items.summary: L’Office allemand des brevets et des marques (DPMA) a enregistré une croissance en 2025, en particulier dans les domaines des brevets et des modèles d’utilité, après une baisse observée ces dernières années. Le nombre de dépôts de brevets a atteint 62 050, soit une hausse de 4,7 % par rapport à 2024, tandis que les (suite) L’article Statistiques 2025 de l’Office allemand des brevets : hausse des dépôts et amélioration de l’efficacité juridictionnelle est apparu en premier sur Lavoix - Propriété
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利和商标局（DPMA）2025年数据显示，在经历近年下滑后，专利和实用新型领域出现增长。专利申请量达62,050件，较2024年增长4.7%。标题亦提及司法效率有所改善，但正文片段未提供具体细节。
items.ai_insight_zh: 需关注DPMA后续发布的完整年度报告，以核实标题中提到的“司法效率改善”的具体指标及实用新型数据变化。当前仅能确认专利申请量的回升趋势，其他领域表现待更多数据支持。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["DPMA记录到2025年专利和实用新型申请量的增长，扭转了近年下降趋势", "年专利申请数量为62,050件，相比2024年增长了4.7%"]

items.title: JUB : confirmation de l’approche COMVIK pour l’activité inventive
items.title_zh: UPC：确认评估创造性时适用COMVIK方法
items.title_en: JUB : confirmation de l’approche COMVIK pour l’activité inventive
items.summary: The Unified Patent Court (UPC) has issued a significant ruling confirming the application of the COMVIK approach for assessing inventive step in patent cases. This decision provides crucial guidance on how technical and non-technical features are evaluated in determining patent validity. The ruling has important implications for patent practitioners and rights holders operating under the UPC system.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院（UPC）上诉法院于2026年4月17日作出裁决（UPC_COA_901/2025），确认在评估专利创造性时适用COMVIK方法。裁决指出，尽管用户界面特征可能属于信息呈现，但若改善人机交互可产生技术效果并贡献创造性。该决定明确了技术与非技术特征在专利有效性判定中的评估方式。
items.ai_insight_zh: 此裁决为UPC体系下软件及人机交互类专利的创造性评估提供关键指引。实务中需关注非技术特征与技术特征结合产生的额外技术效果，这对涉及GUI或医疗设备的专利有效性抗辩及撰写策略具有直接参考意义，建议持续追踪后续类似案件的法律适用一致性。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉法院确认COMVIK方法用于评估包含非技术特征的专利创造性", "改善人机交互的用户界面特征可产生技术效果，从而支持创造性认定", "涉案专利涉及血糖仪，其特定UI交互被认定具有技术贡献而非单纯信息呈现"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确COMVIK方法在UPC诉讼中的主导地位，影响技术/非技术特征划分", "GUI特征若改善人机交互效率，可能被认定为具有技术贡献而非排除对象", "需观察UPC后续案件中对“额外技术效果”认定的具体尺度与证据要求"]

items.title: JUB : l’objection préliminaire strictement cantonnée à la compétence
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院：初步异议严格限于管辖权问题
items.title_en: JUB : l’objection préliminaire strictement cantonnée à la compétence
items.summary: This article examines a recent ruling from the Unified Patent Court regarding the scope and application of preliminary objections in patent litigation proceedings.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院中央分院在REEL International诉Fives ECL案中裁定，初步异议仅适用于管辖权、分庭权限及程序语言三类情形。被告试图以缺乏诉讼利益及既判力为由提出初步异议被驳回，法院强调此类实体问题需经完整审理，不得通过初步异议快速过滤，以保障程序效率。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁决明确了UPC程序中初步异议的狭窄适用范围，防止被告利用程序性异议拖延诉讼。实务中需区分管辖权异议与实体抗辩，后者将进入全面审理阶段。当事人应准备充分的实体证据而非依赖程序过滤，关注UPC对程序效率的严格要求及既有判例的一致性。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["初步异议仅限管辖权、分庭权限及程序语言，列表封闭不可扩展", "诉讼利益与既判力不涉及管辖权，须通过完整事实与法律审查解决", "法院拒绝分离辩论或提前裁决，主张合并审理以提升程序经济与速度"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确初步异议仅限于程序管辖类事项，实体抗辩无法在此阶段解决", "法院倾向合并审理以符合一年结案目标，避免程序碎片化", "需持续观察UPC后续案件中对程序效率与当事人权利平衡的司法尺度"]

items.title: Smarte Tore, intelligente Schienbeinschoner und Roboter, die Bälle sammeln
items.title_zh: 智能球门、护腿板及捡球机器人：DPMA更新足球技术画廊
items.title_en: DPMA Expands Football and Technology Gallery for 2026 World Cup
items.summary: Smarte Tore, intelligente Schienbeinschoner und Roboter, die Bälle sammeln - Der Ball bleibt rund zur Fußball-Weltmeisterschaft – und die technischen Innovationen gehen rasant weiter. Das Deutsche Patent- und Markenamt hat anlässlich der WM in Kanada, Mexiko und den USA seine Onlinegalerie „Fußball und Technik“ erweitert. Zu entdecken gibt es neben viel diskutierten Innovationen wie Torlinientechnik und Videobeweis auch etliche weniger bekannte Erfindungen, die das Spiel zukünftig verbessern sol
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）借2026年美加墨世界杯之机，扩展其“足球与技术”在线画廊。该画廊收录了全球范围内过去125年间与足球相关的专利文献，涵盖门线技术、视频助理裁判、生物数据监测传感器及AI驱动设备等创新。DPMA旨在通过展示这些发明，强调知识产权保护在挖掘足球领域经济潜力中的重要作用。
items.ai_summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) has expanded its online gallery, Football and Technology, to coincide with the 2026 FIFA World Cup in Canada, Mexico, and the USA. The updated collection features patent documents spanning 125 years of innovation, ranging from early mechanical equipment like screw-in studs to modern digital solutions. New additions include AI-controlled safety nets, ball-collecting robots, smart goals, and intelligent shin guards. The gallery also details established technologies such as goal-line technology and video assistant refereeing. DPMA President Eva Schewior emphasizes that the archive illustrates how intellectual property protection has long served as a crucial instrument for leveraging the economic potential of inventions in both professional and amateur sports.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This update serves primarily as a public awareness initiative rather than a legal precedent. For rights holders, it underscores the DPMA’s view of IP as a key driver for commercializing sports technology. Practitioners may find value in reviewing how the office categorizes emerging fields like wearable sensors and AI-assisted officiating within historical patent contexts.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["DPMA为配合2026年世界杯，更新了展示全球足球相关专利的在线画廊", "展出内容涵盖从传统机械装备到AI、机器人及生物数据监测等现代技术创新", "DPMA主席指出，该画廊证实专利保护是利用足球发明经济潜力的重要工具"]

items.title: CoA, May 15, 2026, Order On Request For Use Of English At Oral Hearing, UPC-CoA-50/2026
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭准许口头听证使用英语的裁定
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Permits English Oral Pleadings Despite French Language of Proceedings
items.summary: The appellants’ representative understood French but lacked sufficient oral proficiency for optimal representation. The Court permitted both parties to plead in English at the hearing of 26 May 2026, while French remained the language of proceedings.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在Robert Bosch诉Valeo案中作出裁定，尽管法语为案件程序语言，但鉴于上诉人代表法语口语能力不足且被上诉人同意，法院基于程序效率与公平原则，准许双方在2026年5月26日的口头听证中使用英语进行辩论。法院引用先例及程序规则前言作为法律依据，强调灵活性与成本效益，未正式变更案件语言。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal authorized oral pleadings in English for a hearing where French remained the formal language of proceedings. The decision addressed an appellant’s representative who understood French but lacked sufficient oral proficiency for effective advocacy. The court prioritized procedural efficiency and fairness, noting that direct English advocacy was superior to using an interpreter. Crucially, the respondent consented to the request, which strengthened the application. The court relied on the Rules of Procedure Preamble’s principles of flexibility and cost-effectiveness, citing prior procedural orders involving the same parties as persuasive precedent for maintaining consistency in case management.
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁定确立了UPC上诉庭在特定条件下允许庭审语言与程序语言分离的实务操作。当事人可通过证明语言障碍、获得对方同意并援引效率原则，申请使用更熟练的语言进行口头辩论。这为跨国诉讼中的语言策略提供了灵活性，同时强调了双方合意对程序决定的关键影响。
items.ai_insight_en: This order highlights the UPC’s willingness to decouple the language of oral hearings from the formal language of proceedings to ensure effective representation. It demonstrates that party consensus on procedural logistics can drive judicial discretion, particularly when supported by principles of efficiency. Practitioners should note that prior procedural history between identical parties may influence subsequent case management decisions, offering a pathway for predictable handling of language barriers in multinational litigation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院基于程序规则前言的灵活性原则，准许在非程序语言的口头听证中使用英语", "被上诉人的同意显著增强了变更听证语言的请求效力，使附属请求变得不必要", "法院参考了涉及相同当事人的先前程序裁定，将其作为支持当前决定的说服性先例"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The Court permitted English oral pleadings while retaining French as the formal language of proceedings based on pragmatic efficiency considerations.", "Respondent consent to the language request significantly strengthened the application, rendering subsidiary requests for partial English use unnecessary.", "The Court cited the Rules of Procedure Preamble and prior orders involving the same parties as the legal basis for this flexible approach."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["程序语言与庭审口语可分离，需证明语言能力不足及对方同意", "程序规则前言中的效率与公平原则是法院行使裁量权的主要依据", "相同当事人间的先前程序裁定可作为后续程序决定的重要参考因素"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties facing language proficiency gaps can seek oral hearing adjustments without formally changing the case language, provided opposing counsel consents.", "Practice note: Citing the Rules of Procedure Preamble on efficiency and referencing prior procedural orders between the same parties strengthens requests for flexible hearing arra…", "What to monitor: Whether the Court of Appeal continues to treat party alignment on procedural matters as a decisive factor in granting language accommodations."]
core_points_en: The Court permitted English oral pleadings while retaining French as the formal language of proceedings based on pragmatic efficiency considerations.
Respondent consent to the language request significantly strengthened the application, rendering subsidiary requests for partial English use unnecessary.
The Court cited the Rules of Procedure Preamble and prior orders involving the same parties as the legal basis for this flexible approach.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties facing language proficiency gaps can seek oral hearing adjustments without formally changing the case language, provided opposing counsel consents.
Practice note: Citing the Rules of Procedure Preamble on efficiency and referencing prior procedural orders between the same parties strengthens requests for flexible hearing arra…
What to monitor: Whether the Court of Appeal continues to treat party alignment on procedural matters as a decisive factor in granting language accommodations.

items.title: CoA, May 22, 2026, Judgement By Default, UPC_CoA_21/2026
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭就缺席判决作出裁决
items.title_en: CoA, May 22, 2026, Judgement By Default, UPC_CoA_21/2026
items.summary: A decision by default against the defendant of the claim or counterclaim may only be given where the facts put forward by the claimant justify the remedy sought and the procedural conduct of the defendant does not preclude giving such decision. R. 355.2 RoP thus only applies when a decision by default is sought “against the defendant of the claim or counterclaim”.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在Suinno诉微软案中作出缺席判决。裁定指出，《程序规则》第355.2条仅适用于针对索赔被告的缺席判决。若上诉人未提供诉讼费用担保且缺席，被上诉人无需举证支持原判，以保护其免受成本无法回收的风险。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁决明确了UPC上诉程序中缺席判决与诉讼费用担保的关联。实务中需关注：若对方作为上诉人未履行费用担保义务，被上诉人在程序应对上可主张免除额外的实质举证责任，从而降低诉讼成本风险。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["《程序规则》第355.2条仅适用于针对索赔或反诉被告的缺席判决情形", "上诉人未提供诉讼费用担保时，被上诉人无需为维持原判而提交事实证据", "此规则旨在保护被上诉人免受因上诉人缺席导致的额外成本无法回收风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确上诉程序中缺席判决的适用边界，区分针对原告与被告的不同规则", "诉讼费用担保缺失将直接影响被上诉人的举证义务分配，利于成本控制", "后续需观察类似程序性裁决对UPC案件管理效率及当事人策略的影响"]

items.title: The Price Of Literary Fame – EUIPO Grand Board Refuses Registration Of “GEORGE ORWELL” As A Trademark
items.title_zh: EUIPO大上诉委员会拒绝注册“GEORGE ORWELL”商标
items.title_en: EUIPO Grand Board Refuses GEORGE ORWELL Trademark for Content-Related Goods
items.summary: In a major decision dated December 19, 2025 (R 2248/2019-G), the Grand Board of Appeal of the EUIPO ruled that the word mark “GEORGE ORWELL” cannot be registered as an EU trade mark (EUTM) for goods and services such as books, films, recorded media, and entertainment, cultural, and educational services. The decision provides important clarification on the registrability of famous persons’ names in cases where such names may be perceived by the relevant public as describing the content or subject
items.ai_summary_zh: 2025年12月19日，EUIPO大上诉委员会裁定，“GEORGE ORWELL”文字商标不得在书籍、电影及相关娱乐教育服务上注册为欧盟商标。委员会认定，相关公众会将该名称视为描述商品内容或主题，而非商业来源指示，因此依据《欧盟商标条例》第7(1)(c)条以缺乏显著性/具有描述性为由驳回申请。
items.ai_summary_en: The EUIPO Grand Board of Appeal refused registration of the word mark GEORGE ORWELL for books, films, and educational services. In decision R 2248/2019-G, the Board ruled that the relevant public perceives the name as describing the subject matter or content of the goods, rather than indicating commercial origin. Consequently, the mark was rejected under Article 7(1)(c) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation for lack of distinctiveness due to descriptiveness. This ruling clarifies that famous persons’ names may be deemed descriptive when applied to content-oriented products, establishing that such signs inform consumers about the topic rather than the source.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案澄清了名人姓名在内容导向型商品上的可注册性标准。若姓名被公众感知为描述内容而非来源，将因描述性被驳回。企业在申请含名人姓名的商标时，需评估其在特定类别中是否仅起内容指示作用，避免触犯绝对驳回理由。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision establishes that famous names used on content-driven goods may be refused as descriptive. Rights holders should anticipate higher scrutiny for personal names in publishing and entertainment classes. Applicants must demonstrate that the sign functions primarily as a brand identifier, not merely as a topic indicator, to overcome absolute grounds for refusal in these sectors.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EUIPO大上诉委员会拒绝“GEORGE ORWELL”在书籍及娱乐服务上的欧盟商标注册", "裁定认定名人姓名可被公众视为描述商品内容或主题，而非商业来源指示", "确认“内容/主题”属于欧盟商标条例第7(1)(c)条下描述性的认可子类别"]

items.title: How To Plan Successful IP Mediation
items.title_zh: 如何规划成功的知识产权调解
items.title_en: Planning Successful IP Mediation: EUIPO, UPC, and WIPO Mechanisms
items.summary: Intellectual property disputes can be resolved through mediation, offering faster, cheaper, and more confidential solutions than litigation. This comprehensive guide explores how organizations can maximize their chances...
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文指南探讨通过调解解决知识产权争议的优势，包括比诉讼更快速、廉价且保密。重点介绍欧盟层面的新机制：欧盟知识产权局调解中心服务范围已扩大至所有欧盟商标和设计异议程序；统一专利法院专利调解与仲裁中心将于2026年6月启动。此外引用WIPO数据，显示中小企业在IP调解案件中占比显著。
items.ai_summary_en: Mediation offers faster, confidential, and commercially focused resolutions for intellectual property disputes compared to litigation. The World Intellectual Property Organization Arbitration and Mediation Center reported a forty-two percent case increase in 2025, with small and medium-sized enterprises comprising fifty-nine percent of parties. In the European Union, the EUIPO Mediation Centre expanded its services in June 2025 to cover all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and designs. Furthermore, the Unified Patent Court’s Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre is scheduled to inaugurate in June 2026, providing new alternative dispute resolution forums for patent matters across participating member states.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The expansion of institutional mediation frameworks at EUIPO and the upcoming UPC center signals a strategic shift toward non-adversarial dispute resolution in Europe. Rights holders should evaluate these mechanisms for cross-border conflicts where confidentiality and preserving commercial relationships are prioritized over public judicial precedents. The high participation of SMEs in WIPO cases suggests mediation is increasingly accessible for diverse market participants seeking efficient, flexible outcomes without the procedural rigidity of traditional litigation.

EUIPO Mediation Centre services expanded in June 2025 to include all inter partes proceedings for EU trademarks and registered designs.
The Unified Patent Court Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre will launch in June 2026 as a new European ADR forum.

Practice note: Counsel should assess the expanded EUIPO mediation scope for trademark and design oppositions, and prepare for the UPC Center's June 2026 launch for patent-related…
What to monitor: Track procedural rules and adoption rates of the new UPC Patent Mediation and Arbitration Centre following its inauguration in June 2026.

items.title: How To File An Opposition At The European Patent Office (EPO)
items.title_zh: 如何在欧洲专利局提起异议
items.title_en: Procedural Guide to Filing Oppositions at the European Patent Office
items.summary: An opposition is a central way for third parties to challenge a granted European patent at the EPO. Understanding the specific legal grounds and procedural requirements is essential for anyone...
items.ai_summary_zh: 本文介绍向欧洲专利局提起专利异议的程序。异议须书面或电子提交并缴费，仅限依据《欧洲专利公约》第100条规定的理由，包括缺乏可专利性、公开不充分及新增主题。明确排除清晰度、单一性等非独立异议理由。
items.ai_summary_en: This guidance outlines the procedural requirements for filing oppositions against granted European patents at the EPO. Opponents must submit a notice in writing or electronically via Online Filing 2.0, ensuring the official fee is paid simultaneously. Challenges are strictly limited to grounds under Article 100 EPC: lack of patentability, insufficient disclosure, or added subject matter. The text clarifies that exclusions such as mathematical methods or medical treatments fall under patentability checks. It emphasizes that each ground must be clearly identified during filing, reinforcing that opposition is a centralized mechanism for third parties to contest validity based on specific statutory criteria rather than general grievances.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类规则指引给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This overview reinforces the strict statutory limits of EPO opposition proceedings. Practitioners must ensure arguments align exclusively with Article 100 EPC grounds, avoiding inadmissible issues like clarity. Proper fee payment and clear ground identification are critical procedural steps to maintain admissibility and effectively challenge patent validity in Europe.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["异议须向欧洲专利局书面或电子提交，并在提交时缴纳官方费用", "异议理由限于公约第100条：缺乏可专利性、公开不充分或新增主题", "清晰度、单一性或优先权无效等问题不得作为独立异议理由提出"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Opposition notices must be filed in writing or electronically with the official fee paid at submission.", "Valid challenges are restricted to Article 100 EPC grounds: patentability, disclosure sufficiency, or added matter.", "Patentability grounds include lack of novelty, inventive step, or excluded subject matter like medical methods."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["异议程序具有严格的法定理由限制，非任意挑战工具", "需准确识别第100条规定的三类核心异议 grounds", "注意审查阶段争议点与异议阶段可受理理由的差异"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Understanding the narrow scope of allowable opposition grounds helps rights holders assess the viability of challenging competitor patents.", "Practice note: Ensure opposition fees are paid upon filing and that arguments strictly adhere to Article 100 EPC to avoid inadmissibility.", "What to monitor: Track EPO updates to Online Filing 2.0 and any evolving case law interpreting Article 100 grounds for sufficient disclosure."]
core_points_en: Opposition notices must be filed in writing or electronically with the official fee paid at submission.
Valid challenges are restricted to Article 100 EPC grounds: patentability, disclosure sufficiency, or added matter.
Patentability grounds include lack of novelty, inventive step, or excluded subject matter like medical methods.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Understanding the narrow scope of allowable opposition grounds helps rights holders assess the viability of challenging competitor patents.
Practice note: Ensure opposition fees are paid upon filing and that arguments strictly adhere to Article 100 EPC to avoid inadmissibility.
What to monitor: Track EPO updates to Online Filing 2.0 and any evolving case law interpreting Article 100 grounds for sufficient disclosure.

items.title: 2026 EPO Guidelines - Rule 71(3) EPC communication
items.title_zh: 2026年EPO审查指南：Rule 71(3)通讯程序变更
items.title_en: 2026 EPO Guidelines - Rule 71(3) EPC communication
items.summary: The 2026 edition of the Guidelines for Examination in the European Patent Office entered into force on 1 April 2026. This article...
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局2026版审查指南于4月1日生效。本文聚焦Rule 71(3) EPC通讯后的程序变化。新规对回应此类通讯时重复提出的修改请求施加更严限制。若审查部拟依Rule 137(3)拒绝接纳进一步修改，可传唤口头审理。此举旨在平衡申请人获权利益与程序及时终结的需求，防止借修改拖延授权准备。
items.ai_insight_zh: 此次更新明确了EPO在授权前最后阶段对程序效率的管控倾向。申请人在收到Rule 71(3)通讯后应审慎评估修改必要性，避免因重复提交非必要修改而触发Rule 137(3)的拒绝风险或额外的口头审理程序，需关注审查部对“显著延迟”的自由裁量标准。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["版EPO审查指南生效，强化对Rule 71(3)通讯后重复修改请求的限制", "若拟依Rule 137(3)拒绝接纳修改，审查部可传唤口头审理并表明立场", "仅不显著延迟授权准备的修改通常被接纳，该阶段非重审实质结果的机会"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["EPO加强对授权前阶段程序效率的管控，限制重复修改", "审查部行使自由裁量权拒绝修改时，可能直接传唤口头审理", "需持续观察EPO对Rule 137(3)中“显著延迟”认定的实务尺度"]

items.title: Court of Appeal clarifies signature requirements and permits retroactive extensions under the UPC
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭澄清签名要求并允许追溯延期
items.title_en: Court of Appeal clarifies signature requirements and permits retroactive extensions under the UPC
items.summary: SharkNinja v Groupe SEB (CoA, 22 May 2026) addresses UPC signature requirements and the scope of Rule 9.3(a) RoP on time extensions.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉庭在SharkNinja诉Groupe SEB案中裁定，通过案件管理系统提交的文件必须包含电子签名，仅登录认证不足。同时确认程序规则允许真正的追溯性期限延长，即使申请在截止后提出。此外，就涉及第三方敏感市场数据的保密俱乐部提供了指导。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁决明确了统一专利法院对文件形式要件的严格标准，强化了法律确定性要求。同时，确认追溯延期的可行性为当事人补救程序瑕疵提供了空间。实务中需关注电子签名嵌入的具体操作规范，以及保密俱乐部在敏感数据披露中的适用边界，以确保程序合规。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["程序文件本身须含电子签名，仅系统登录认证不足以确立文件内容的法律归属", "程序规则允许真正的追溯性期限延长，包括在原始截止日期届满后提出的延期请求", "就涉及商业敏感第三方市场数据的情形，提供了关于保密俱乐部适用的实务指导"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确电子签名需嵌入文件本身，而非仅依赖系统身份验证，影响文件准备流程", "确认逾期申请延期的可能性，为程序失误提供补救路径，但需符合规则条件", "需持续观察上诉庭在保密俱乐部及敏感数据处理上的后续判例倾向"]

items.title: 'Touch your boobs' not contrary to accepted principles of morality
items.title_zh: “Touch your boobs”不违反公序良俗原则
items.title_en: EUIPO Board of Appeal Rules 'Touch Your Boobs' Not Contrary to Morality
items.summary: On 7 May, the Fifth Board of Appeal (BoA) of the EUIPO held that the word mark “TOUCH YOUR BOOBS” is not contrary to public policy or to accepted principles of morality under Article 7(1)(f) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation (EUTMR). Contrary to the examiner, the BoA found that the mark would not be perceived as an unduly sexual or offensive phrase.BackgroundIn July 2025, Katjes Fassin GmbH and Co.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局第五上诉委员会于5月7日裁定，文字商标“TOUCH YOUR BOOBS”不违反《欧盟商标条例》第7(1)(f)条规定的公共政策或公认道德准则。上诉委员会认为该标志不会被感知为过度色情或冒犯性短语，推翻了审查员的反对意见。申请人背景涉及Katjes Fassin公司。
items.ai_summary_en: The EUIPO Fifth Board of Appeal ruled that the word mark “TOUCH YOUR BOOBS” does not violate Article 7(1)(f) of the EU Trade Mark Regulation. Issued on 7 May, the decision overturns an examiner’s refusal based on public policy and accepted principles of morality. The Board determined that the relevant public would not perceive the phrase as unduly sexual or offensive. The application was filed by Katjes Fassin GmbH and Co. This judgment highlights the Board’s assessment of contemporary social standards when evaluating potentially controversial verbal marks for registration within the European Union trademark system.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling illustrates the EUIPO’s contextual approach to morality refusals, emphasizing current social perceptions over rigid prohibitions. For practitioners, it suggests that colloquial or provocative terms may survive examination if they lack explicit vulgarity. Rights holders should monitor how Boards evaluate evolving linguistic norms and public tolerance for non-traditional branding expressions in the EU market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟知识产权局第五上诉委员会裁定该商标不违反公序良俗条款", "委员会认定该短语不会被相关公众视为过度色情或具有冒犯性", "该裁决推翻了审查员此前基于道德理由提出的驳回意见"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EUIPO Fifth Board of Appeal rejected the Article 7(1)(f) refusal for the mark.", "The Board found the phrase not unduly sexual or offensive to the public.", "The decision overturns the examiner’s initial objection based on accepted morality principles."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧盟商标审查中对“公序良俗”的认定倾向于结合当下社会语境进行动态评估", "需持续观察上诉委员会对带有性暗示但非直接淫秽词汇的容忍度变化趋势", "申请含争议性词汇商标时，应准备关于社会接受度及非冒犯性感知的论证材料"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Brands using provocative or colloquial language may face lower registration hurdles if perceived as humorous rather than obscene.", "Practice note: Arguments against Article 7(1)(f) refusals should focus on contemporary social acceptance and lack of undue offensiveness.", "What to monitor: Future Board decisions assessing the threshold for 'unduly sexual' content in verbal marks across different product classes."]
core_points_en: EUIPO Fifth Board of Appeal rejected the Article 7(1)(f) refusal for the mark.
The Board found the phrase not unduly sexual or offensive to the public.
The decision overturns the examiner’s initial objection based on accepted morality principles.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Brands using provocative or colloquial language may face lower registration hurdles if perceived as humorous rather than obscene.
Practice note: Arguments against Article 7(1)(f) refusals should focus on contemporary social acceptance and lack of undue offensiveness.
What to monitor: Future Board decisions assessing the threshold for 'unduly sexual' content in verbal marks across different product classes.

items.title: EPO successfully completes ISO surveillance audit
items.title_zh: EPO成功完成ISO监督审核
items.title_en: EPO Maintains ISO Certifications Following Successful Surveillance Audit
items.summary: Update on ISO certifications for quality, information security, occupational health & safety, and environment management systems. ISO certifications for quality, information security, environmental management systems.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年4月，欧洲专利局（EPO）顺利通过外部审计机构的管理体系ISO监督审核。此次审核确认了EPO在质量管理、职业健康安全、信息安全和环境管理方面的稳健性，维持了其ISO 9001、ISO 45001、ISO 27001及ISO 14001认证。这体现了EPO对国际标准及合规性的承诺，并通过综合管理体系支持高质量服务交付。
items.ai_summary_en: In April 2026, the European Patent Office (EPO) successfully completed its periodic ISO surveillance audit conducted by external auditors. The review confirmed the continued robustness and maturity of the EPO’s integrated management systems, allowing the organization to maintain its certifications for quality management (ISO 9001), occupational health and safety (ISO 45001), information security (ISO 27001), and environmental management (ISO 14001). This outcome underscores the EPO’s adherence to international standards and regulatory compliance. By aligning policies, processes, and controls within a unified framework, the EPO aims to ensure the consistent delivery of high-quality services and support continuous improvement across all operational domains.
items.ai_insight_zh: 此新闻属于EPO内部行政与合规动态，不直接改变专利实体法或审查标准。实务中需关注其信息安全（ISO 27001）与质量管理（ISO 9001）的持续合规，这间接保障了电子提交系统及审查流程的稳定性与数据安全性，是评估EPO服务可靠性的基础指标。
items.ai_insight_en: This update confirms the administrative and operational stability of the EPO rather than introducing changes to substantive patent law or examination guidelines. For rights holders and legal practitioners, the maintenance of ISO 27001 and ISO 9001 certifications serves as a key indicator of the reliability and data security standards underpinning the EPO’s electronic filing systems and procedural workflows. While this does not alter immediate filing strategies or enforcement options, it reinforces confidence in the continuity and integrity of EPO services.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO于2026年4月通过外部审计机构的ISO管理体系监督审核", "维持ISO 9001、45001、27001及14001四项国际认证，确认体系成熟稳健", "通过综合管理体系整合政策流程，确保持续改进及服务交付质量"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.", "Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.", "The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["Client relevance/客户相关性: EPO运营稳定性与数据安全合规性保障", "Practice note/实务观察: 关注EPO管理体系认证状态对服务连续性的影响", "What to monitor/后续观察: 无具体法律变动，仅需知悉机构合规状态更新"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…", "Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.", "What to monitor: No immediate legal or procedural changes; treat as routine compliance confirmation regarding institutional operational standards."]
core_points_en: The EPO passed its April 2026 external ISO surveillance audit, confirming ongoing adherence to international management standards.
Certifications maintained include ISO 9001 for quality, ISO 27001 for information security, ISO 45001 for safety, and ISO 14001 for environment.
The EPO utilizes an Integrated Management System to unify policies and controls, supporting service quality and continuous operational improvement.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Confirms the stability and data security compliance of EPO operations, indirectly supporting the reliability of electronic submission channels and case processin…
Practice note: Monitor the status of EPO management system certifications as baseline indicators for service continuity and operational maturity.
What to monitor: No immediate legal or procedural changes; treat as routine compliance confirmation regarding institutional operational standards.

items.title: Highlights from the latest meeting of the SACEPO Working Party on Quality
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局SACEPO质量工作组会议亮点
items.title_en: Highlights from the latest meeting of the SACEPO Working Party on Quality
items.summary: The EPO hosted a lively SACEPO Working Party on Quality meeting on 8 May 2026. Key topics included the Quality Action Plan for 2026, how AI can improve quality at the EPO, and how SACEPO members are currently employing AI.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年5月8日，欧洲专利局举办第16届SACEPO质量工作组会议，71名代表参与。会议重点讨论2026年质量行动计划进展、人工智能在提升审查质量中的应用及风险管控。局长强调质量为优先事项，并介绍了AI辅助起草工具等内部开发项目，旨在通过以人为中心的AI方法增强效率，同时确保审查员对决策负全责。
items.ai_insight_zh: 欧专局正加速将AI工具嵌入实质审查与程序管理环节，以提升处理效率与一致性。从业者需关注AI辅助起草工具对审查意见通知书风格及速度的潜在影响。尽管强调人类最终决策权，但AI介入深度增加可能改变答复策略的侧重点，建议持续跟踪相关工具的具体功能更新及用户反馈机制的变化。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["会议回顾2025年质量成果，包括现有技术获取、审查员培训及审查实践协调方面的改进", "推进2026年质量行动计划，巩固主动检索部门最佳实践，加强审查协调及异议部门学习机会", "整合AI支持工具至授权流程，如预检索及起草助手，坚持人类中心原则，决策责任仍归审查部门"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["AI工具已深入预检索及文书起草环节，可能改变审查节奏与沟通方式", "欧专局坚持人类中心AI原则，明确审查员保留最终决策责任，降低自动化误判风险", "需持续观察2026/2027用户满意度调查结果，以评估AI集成对申请人体验的实际影响"]

items.title: Nokia withdraws action against Geely in connected cars dispute
items.title_zh: 诺基亚撤回对吉利的联网汽车专利诉讼
items.title_en: Nokia withdraws action against Geely in connected cars dispute
items.summary: As Munich Regional Court has now confirmed, Nokia has withdrawn a lawsuit against Geely that was due to be heard today.
items.ai_summary_zh: 慕尼黑地区法院确认，诺基亚已撤回原定今日开庭审理的针对吉利的侵权诉讼。该案涉及4G/5G标准必要专利，此前也在统一专利法院（UPC）提起平行诉讼。撤诉暗示双方可能达成和解，吉利或已获取Avanci许可，类似其他中国车企近期做法。另一项专利诉讼听证会仍定于7月举行，但预计也将撤回。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案撤诉标志着联网汽车SEP诉讼浪潮可能 premature end。需关注吉利是否正式获得Avanci许可，以及诺基亚在UPC平行程序的后续动作。这对评估中国车企在欧洲的SEP合规路径及许可谈判策略具有参考意义，显示许可解决优于诉讼对抗的趋势。

items.title: Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform
items.title_zh: 瑞士通过专利法修订引入实质审查制度
items.title_en: Switzerland Reforms Patent Act with Mandatory Searches and Optional Substantive Examination
items.summary: Key changes in the Swiss Patent Act include a mandatory prior-art search, optional full substantive examination, the acceptance of English-language technical documents and a new appeal system. In March 2024, the Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing new features to the Swiss patent system. The Swiss government, as supported by […] The post Switzerland introduces substantive examinations with Patent Act reform appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 2024年3月，瑞士联邦议会通过《专利法》部分修订案。此次改革核心在于引入强制性的现有技术检索，并允许申请人选择是否进行全面的实质审查。此外，新规接受英文技术文件，并建立了新的上诉系统。这一变革标志着瑞士从形式审查向更严格的审查模式转变，旨在提升专利质量与法律确定性，对在该国进行专利布局的企业将产生深远影响。
items.ai_summary_en: In March 2024, the Swiss Federal Assembly passed a partial revision of the Patent Act, introducing significant procedural changes. Key amendments include the implementation of a mandatory prior-art search and an optional full substantive examination system. The reform also allows for the acceptance of English-language technical documents and establishes a new appeal mechanism. These measures mark a shift towards enhanced patent quality and legal certainty within the Swiss jurisdiction.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业赴瑞士申请专利需适应新流程，强制检索可能增加前期成本与时间。建议提前规划现有技术分析，利用英文文件便利降低翻译成本。同时，关注实质审查的可选性，根据商业价值权衡投入，以应对更高的授权门槛和潜在的驳回风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This legislative update alters the procedural landscape for patent registration in Switzerland. Rights holders should note the introduction of mandatory searches and the option for substantive review, which may impact prosecution timelines and grant probabilities. The acceptance of English documentation offers potential administrative efficiencies for international applicants managing European portfolios.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["瑞士联邦议会于2024年3月通过《专利法》部分修订案", "引入强制性现有技术检索及可选的全面实质审查机制", "接受英文技术文档并建立全新的专利上诉系统"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The revised Swiss Patent Act introduces a mandatory prior-art search requirement for all patent applications filed in Switzerland.", "Applicants may now opt for a full substantive examination, moving beyond the previous formal examination framework.", "The reform permits the submission of English-language technical documents and implements a new appellate structure."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["适应强制检索要求，优化前期现有技术分析与预算规划", "善用英文文件政策降低成本，审慎评估实质审查的商业必要性"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor how the optional substantive examination affects grant rates and portfolio strength in the Swiss market.", "Practice note: Leverage the new allowance for English-language technical documents to streamline filing procedures where applicable.", "What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline and specific guidelines for the newly established appeal system."]
core_points_en: The revised Swiss Patent Act introduces a mandatory prior-art search requirement for all patent applications filed in Switzerland.
Applicants may now opt for a full substantive examination, moving beyond the previous formal examination framework.
The reform permits the submission of English-language technical documents and implements a new appellate structure.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor how the optional substantive examination affects grant rates and portfolio strength in the Swiss market.
Practice note: Leverage the new allowance for English-language technical documents to streamline filing procedures where applicable.
What to monitor: Track the implementation timeline and specific guidelines for the newly established appeal system.

items.title: SACEPO WP/G discusses outcomes of user consultation on the Guidelines 2026
items.title_zh: 欧专局讨论2026版审查指南用户咨询结果
items.title_en: SACEPO WP/G discusses outcomes of user consultation on the Guidelines 2026
items.summary: The SACEPO WP/G members met to discuss the responses to the public user consultation on the EPC, PCT-EPO, and the UP Guidelines
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局SACEPO工作组于5月12日开会，讨论2026版审查指南（含EPC、PCT-EPO及统一专利指南）的用户咨询反馈。咨询共收到307条评论，主要来自欧洲专利代理人。会议还介绍了2027版指南的拟议更新，包括配合无纸化流程的法律变更、引用统一专利法院上诉法院判例，以及关于权利要求解释和说明书修改的大申诉委员会决定实施情况。
items.ai_insight_zh: 欧专局正通过指南修订强化程序简化与质量管控，特别是适应无纸化转型及统一专利体系运作。申请人需关注2027年可能新增的修改依据说明义务，以及UPC判例对EPC审查实践的潜在影响。G 1/25决定的后续实施将是说明书适应性调整的关键风向标。

items.title: FRAND battle between Huawei and TP-Link now focused at UK High Court
items.title_zh: 华为撤回UPC及慕尼黑侵权诉请，英法庭成FRAND焦点
items.title_en: FRAND battle between Huawei and TP-Link now focused at UK High Court
items.summary: Huawei has withdrawn its infringement claims against TP-Link at the UPC and Munich Regional Court and only the UK FRAND proceedings remain.
items.ai_summary_zh: 华为已撤回在统一专利法院（UPC）及慕尼黑地区法院对TP-Link的侵权指控，争议焦点现集中于英国高等法院的FRAND费率裁定程序。英国法官Richard Meade此前授予华为 interim licence，采用“中点法”计算费率，并因TP-Link网格产品销量调整了计算基数，涵盖2008年至2027年的所有WiFi设备销售，具体金额保密。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案显示英国法院在SEP全球费率裁定中的主导地位，即便存在UPC平行程序。临时许可的授予及“中点法”的应用为后续FRAND裁决提供重要参考。需关注最终保密费率的确定逻辑及其对类似WiFi SEP许可谈判的潜在影响，以及UPC与英国法院在管辖权协调上的实务趋势。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["华为撤回在UPC及慕尼黑地区法院对TP-Link的侵权诉请，仅保留英国FRAND程序", "英国高等法院首次向SEP持有人授予临时许可，采用“中点法”确定 interim lic…", "费率计算基数因TP-Link网格产品销量上调，覆盖2008年至2027年全品类WiFi…"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["英国高等法院在SEP全球费率裁定中展现强势地位，影响跨国诉讼策略选择", "临时许可及“中点法”计价模式为FRAND费率确定提供新判例参考", "需持续观察UPC撤诉后，英国判决对欧洲其他地区潜在执行效力的影响"]

items.title: Grünecker successful for Horl before the Hamburg Local Division | Grünecker
items.title_zh: Grünecker代理Horl在UPC汉堡分院胜诉
items.title_en: UPC Hamburg Local Division Finds Infringement of EP Patent in Horl Case
items.summary: In first instance infringement proceedings for the client Horl 1993 GmbH, the Hamburg Local Division decided in favor of the client.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院汉堡地方法院在一审侵权诉讼中裁定，被告Magna-Tec e.K.侵犯了客户Horl 1993 GmbH拥有的欧洲专利EP 4 117 857 B1。涉案专利涉及切削工具刃口磨削或抛光装置及固定系统。被告有权对该判决提起上诉。
items.ai_summary_en: The Hamburg Local Division of the Unified Patent Court ruled in favor of Horl 1993 GmbH in first-instance infringement proceedings. The court found that defendant Magna-Tec e.K. infringes European patent EP 4 117 857 B1. The patent covers a device for grinding or polishing cutting tool edges and a system for fixing the edge relative to the grinding disc. Grünecker represented the claimant. The defendant retains the right to appeal the decision. This judgment contributes to the evolving body of case law within the Unitary Patent system, illustrating the court's approach to technical patent enforcement at the local division level.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This first-instance decision highlights the Hamburg Local Division's handling of mechanical patent infringement claims. For rights holders, it demonstrates the UPC's capacity to deliver substantive rulings on technical devices. Practitioners should note the immediate enforceability potential pending appeal. Monitoring whether the defendant appeals will provide insight into the court's factual assessment standards and the stability of such findings in higher instances.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC汉堡地方法院一审裁定被告Magna-Tec侵犯原告Horl的欧洲专利", "涉案专利EP 4 117 857 B1涉及切削工具刃口磨削或抛光装置及系统", "被告拥有对此次侵权判决提起上诉的权利"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Hamburg Local Division ruled that Magna-Tec e.K. infringes Horl’s European patent EP 4 117 857 B1.", "Patent concerns devices for grinding or polishing cutting tool edges and related fixing systems.", "Defendant holds the right to appeal the first-instance infringement decision to the UPC Court of Appeal."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["UPC地方法院已就具体技术专利作出侵权肯定性判决", "需观察被告是否上诉及上诉法院对事实认定的审查尺度", "关注该案对同类机械结构专利维权策略的参考意义"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Confirms UPC local divisions are actively adjudicating technical patent infringement cases with clear outcomes for rights holders.", "Practice note: First-instance findings establish a basis for enforcement actions, though defendants retain standard appellate rights under UPC procedure.", "What to monitor: Whether the defendant appeals and how the Court of Appeal reviews factual determinations in mechanical patent disputes."]
core_points_en: Hamburg Local Division ruled that Magna-Tec e.K. infringes Horl’s European patent EP 4 117 857 B1.
Patent concerns devices for grinding or polishing cutting tool edges and related fixing systems.
Defendant holds the right to appeal the first-instance infringement decision to the UPC Court of Appeal.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Confirms UPC local divisions are actively adjudicating technical patent infringement cases with clear outcomes for rights holders.
Practice note: First-instance findings establish a basis for enforcement actions, though defendants retain standard appellate rights under UPC procedure.
What to monitor: Whether the defendant appeals and how the Court of Appeal reviews factual determinations in mechanical patent disputes.

items.title_en: UK Tribunal Notes Evidentiary Void in Withdrawn Qualcomm Collective Action
items.summary: The Competition Appeal Tribunal has approved the scrapping of a £480 million opt-out collective action claim, flagging an absence of witnesses from Apple and Samsung and lacking evidence of refusal to supply
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国竞争上诉法庭批准撤销一项针对高通的4.8亿英镑选择退出式集体诉讼索赔。法庭指出该案存在“证据真空”，主要体现为缺乏苹果和三星的证人证言，且缺少拒绝供货的具体证据。
items.ai_summary_en: The Competition Appeal Tribunal has approved the withdrawal of a £480 million opt-out collective action claim against Qualcomm. In its decision, the Tribunal highlighted a significant evidentiary void, specifically noting the absence of witness testimony from key industry participants Apple and Samsung. Furthermore, the court observed a lack of concrete evidence demonstrating any refusal to supply chips. This ruling underscores the procedural and evidentiary hurdles faced by claimants in large-scale competition disputes where critical third-party data and testimony are unavailable or insufficient to substantiate allegations of anti-competitive conduct.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision highlights the critical importance of securing third-party witness cooperation in competition litigation. For rights holders and defendants, it reinforces that unsubstantiated allegations of refusal to supply face strict judicial scrutiny. Claimants must ensure robust evidentiary chains, particularly from key market participants, to survive procedural challenges in collective actions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["竞争上诉法庭批准撤销4.8亿英镑的高通集体诉讼索赔", "法庭指出案件缺乏苹果和三星的关键证人证言", "法庭认定现有材料缺乏拒绝供货的有效证据"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Competition Appeal Tribunal approved withdrawal of £480 million opt-out collective action claim", "Court cited absence of witness testimony from major downstream firms Apple and Samsung", "Tribunal found insufficient evidence to support allegations of refusal to supply chips"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["集体诉讼中关键第三方证人缺失对案件结果具有决定性影响", "拒绝供货指控需具备扎实的事实证据支撑，否则难以获法庭支持", "后续需关注高通在其他法域类似反垄断诉讼的证据准备策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Defendants in collective actions can challenge claims lacking direct testimony from key commercial partners or competitors.", "Practice note: Establishing refusal to supply requires concrete evidence; absence of key witnesses creates fatal evidentiary gaps.", "What to monitor: Future CAT decisions on evidentiary thresholds for opt-out collective actions in technology sectors."]
core_points_en: Competition Appeal Tribunal approved withdrawal of £480 million opt-out collective action claim
Court cited absence of witness testimony from major downstream firms Apple and Samsung
Tribunal found insufficient evidence to support allegations of refusal to supply chips
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Defendants in collective actions can challenge claims lacking direct testimony from key commercial partners or competitors.
Practice note: Establishing refusal to supply requires concrete evidence; absence of key witnesses creates fatal evidentiary gaps.
What to monitor: Future CAT decisions on evidentiary thresholds for opt-out collective actions in technology sectors.

items.title: Importance du contentieux des marques devant le Tribunal de l’Union
items.title_zh: 欧盟普通法院发布2025年商标诉讼统计数据
items.title_en: Importance du contentieux des marques devant le Tribunal de l’Union
items.summary: Le Tribunal de l’Union vient de publier ses statistiques 2025 accompagnées d’une présentation par son greffier : Statistiques 2025 du Tribunal . Le contentieux de la propriété intellectuelle, en particulier des marques de l’Union, représente l’un des blocs les plus importants et les plus intensifs d’activité du Tribunal. 1. Volume et poids du contentieux PI devant le Tribunal En 2025, 989 affaires ont été introduites devant le Tribunal, dont 257 en matière de propriété intellectuelle (marques, d
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟普通法院发布2025年司法统计，知识产权案件占新收案件的26%（257件），其中绝大多数为针对EUIPO上诉委员会决定的撤销之诉。IP案件平均审理周期约13-14个月，显著低于法院整体平均水平，显示此类案件处理流程相对标准化且高效。
items.ai_insight_zh: 数据显示欧盟商标诉讼具有高频、标准化的特征，审理效率较高。对于涉及EUIPO决定的当事人而言，司法审查周期相对可控，可作为评估维权或应诉时间成本的重要参考依据。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年新收IP案件257件，占总数26%；结案303件，期末未决276件", "IP案件主要源于对EUIPO上诉委员会关于欧盟商标及外观设计决定的不服", "IP案件平均审理时长约13-14个月，远低于法院所有案件平均的22个月"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧盟商标司法审查程序成熟，审理周期短于一般行政诉讼", "EUIPO决定是欧盟普通法院IP案件的主要来源，争议集中度高", "需关注后续年份数据以确认审理效率的稳定性及案件积压趋势"]

items.summary: Designs correction of error notices are used to notify any third party of a proposed correction of a clerical error made by the registry prior to a correction taking place.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布关于依据第21条更正外观设计登记簿的指南。该文件明确了“设计更正错误通知”的用途，即在登记局对文书错误进行正式更正之前，用于通知任何第三方拟议的更正内容，以确保程序透明。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本文仅为程序性说明，强调登记局在修正行政文书错误时的通知义务。实务中需关注此类更正是否影响权利范围的确定性，以及第三方获知后的异议窗口期，目前原文未提供具体操作细节。

items.title: EU-funded IP cooperation expands into the Western Balkans
items.title_zh: 欧盟资助IP合作扩展至西巴尔干地区
items.title_en: EUIPO Launches EU-Funded IP Cooperation Project in Western Balkans
items.summary: New EU-funded cooperation project with enlargement partners supports alignment of European Union (EU) Intellectual Property (IP) standards ahead of EU accession.
items.ai_summary_zh: 原文摘要显示，一项新的欧盟资助合作项目正在与扩大伙伴国开展，旨在支持这些国家在加入欧盟之前实现知识产权标准的对齐。该项目由欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）发布，聚焦于通过合作促进法律与实践的协调，为未来的欧盟成员资格做准备。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has announced a new cooperation project funded by the European Union. This initiative targets enlargement partners in the Western Balkans, aiming to support the alignment of their intellectual property standards with those of the European Union. The project serves as a preparatory measure for these countries ahead of potential future EU accession.
items.ai_insight_zh: Practice note / What to monitor：需持续观察该合作项目的具体实施范围、涵盖的知识产权领域（如商标、专利或外观设计）以及具体的时间表。鉴于正文信息有限，目前仅能确认其为入盟前的标准对齐举措，尚无法评估对特定行业权利人的直接影响。
items.ai_insight_en: This development highlights ongoing regulatory convergence efforts between the EU and candidate countries. For rights holders operating across Europe, monitoring the implementation of these alignment measures is relevant for understanding future market entry conditions and enforcement landscapes in the Western Balkans. The focus remains on legislative and administrative harmonization rather than immediate procedural changes for existing portfolios.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["标题显示欧盟资助的新合作项目已扩展至西巴尔干地区", "原文摘要显示项目旨在支持伙伴国在入盟前对齐欧盟知识产权标准"]

The initiative focuses on aligning local intellectual property standards with European Union frameworks.

items.title: Asus signs up to Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool, ending litigation
items.title_zh: 华硕加入Sisvel Wi-Fi专利池并结束诉讼
items.title_en: Asus Licenses Sisvel Wi-Fi Multimode Pool, Ending SEP Litigation in Germany
items.summary: Asus and Sisvel pool members end litigation with licence to the standard essential patents in Sisvel's Wi-Fi Multimode pool.
items.ai_summary_zh: 华硕与Sisvel达成Wi-Fi Multimode专利池许可协议，涵盖Wi-Fi 6和7标准必要专利。该协议结束了华硕与华为、飞利浦及Wilus之间的未决专利诉讼。慕尼黑地方法院此前在相关案件中进一步澄清了FRAND程序审查方法，强调将严格审视许可要约的合规性。
items.ai_summary_en: Asus has executed a license agreement for standard essential patents within Sisvel’s Wi-Fi Multimode pool, covering Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 standards. This settlement resolves pending litigation between Asus and pool members Huawei, Philips, and Wilus. The Munich Regional Court had recently adjudicated aspects of the dispute, specifically clarifying its judicial approach to FRAND compliance assessments. Asus joins existing licensees such as Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Panasonic, Sony, and ZTE. While financial terms remain confidential, the agreement removes active infringement claims from these key rights holders. The resolution highlights the continuing consolidation of major electronics manufacturers into established SEP licensing frameworks managed by patent pools.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类规则动态给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This settlement underscores the Munich Regional Court’s increasing scrutiny of FRAND offer compliance in SEP disputes. Rights holders and implementers should note the court’s intent to examine the substantive fairness of licensing proposals more closely. For portfolio managers, the addition of Asus to the pool reinforces the commercial viability of multi-mode Wi-Fi licensing programs. Companies facing similar litigation in Germany must prepare for detailed judicial review of their negotiation conduct and offer structures.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["华硕获得Sisvel Wi-Fi Multimode专利池许可，结束与华为等方的诉讼", "该专利池覆盖Wi-Fi 6和Wi-Fi 7标准必要专利，华硕加入现有被许可人行列", "慕尼黑地方法院在Wilus诉华硕案中明确将更严格审查FRAND要约合规性"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Asus licenses Sisvel Wi-Fi Multimode pool SEPs, ending disputes with Huawei, Philips, and Wilus.", "Agreement covers Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 standards, joining major existing licensees.", "Munich Regional Court clarified FRAND offer assessment methods in related Wilus versus Asus judgment."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["德国法院强化FRAND合规性审查，影响SEP许可谈判基准", "Sisvel专利池扩张至主要电子制造商，反映Wi-Fi SEP许可市场整合趋势", "需持续观察慕尼黑法院后续案件中对FRAND费率计算的具体方法论"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Resolution removes infringement risk for Asus while expanding Sisvel’s licensee base among top-tier electronics manufacturers.", "Practice note: Munich courts are intensifying examination of FRAND compliance, requiring robust documentation of licensing offers and negotiations.", "What to monitor: Future Munich judgments detailing specific methodologies for assessing FRAND-compliant rates and offer structures in Wi-Fi SEP cases."]
core_points_en: Asus licenses Sisvel Wi-Fi Multimode pool SEPs, ending disputes with Huawei, Philips, and Wilus.
Agreement covers Wi-Fi 6 and Wi-Fi 7 standards, joining major existing licensees.
Munich Regional Court clarified FRAND offer assessment methods in related Wilus versus Asus judgment.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Resolution removes infringement risk for Asus while expanding Sisvel’s licensee base among top-tier electronics manufacturers.
Practice note: Munich courts are intensifying examination of FRAND compliance, requiring robust documentation of licensing offers and negotiations.
What to monitor: Future Munich judgments detailing specific methodologies for assessing FRAND-compliant rates and offer structures in Wi-Fi SEP cases.

items.title: Düsseldorf Local Division clarifies burden in PI proceedings
items.title_zh: 杜塞尔多夫地方法院澄清临时禁令程序中的举证责任
items.title_en: UPC Düsseldorf Division Clarifies Burden of Proof for Urgency in Preliminary Injunction Proceedings
items.summary: Ottobock v Wilhelm Julius Teufel and MedEnvoy Global — Local Division Düsseldorf, 7 May 2026 (UPC_CFI_1928/2025)
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院杜塞尔多夫地方法院在Ottobock案中澄清了临时禁令程序中关于紧迫性及举证责任的分配规则。法院明确申请人需具体说明从知悉侵权到申请禁令的时间线及采取的步骤；被告若主张推定知悉，需先提供具体事实指标，举证责任随后才转移至申请人。该案避免了要求专利权人普遍自证无早期知悉的严苛做法。
items.ai_summary_en: On May 7, 2026, the Unified Patent Court’s Düsseldorf Local Division issued an order in Ottobock v. Teufel and MedEnvoy Global, clarifying the burden of proof regarding urgency in preliminary injunction proceedings. The Court emphasized that applicants must concretely substantiate the timeline from initial awareness of a potentially infringing product to filing the application, detailing specific investigative steps taken. Crucially, the decision addresses Rule 211.4 of the Rules of Procedure concerning constructive knowledge. The Court held that while constructive knowledge exists where awareness should have occurred under normal circumstances, defendants bear the initial burden of providing concrete factual indicators suggesting earlier knowledge or dilatory conduct. Only after such indicators are established does the burden shift to the applicant. This approach prevents imposing an overly strict requirement on patent proprietors to prove a negative regarding early knowledge in every case.
items.ai_insight_zh: 该判决明确了UPC临时禁令中紧迫性审查的举证逻辑，平衡了双方负担。实务中需关注法院对“具体步骤”及“推定知悉指标”的认定标准，避免仅以技术调查为由笼统解释延迟。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling provides critical procedural clarity for rights holders and alleged infringers operating within the UPC system. For patent proprietors, maintaining detailed records of internal investigations, technical analyses, and legal assessments is essential to justify timelines and demonstrate prompt action upon discovering potential infringement. Conversely, defendants can leverage this precedent by scrutinizing the plaintiff’s public activities, such as trade show appearances, to construct arguments for constructive knowledge. This strategy may increase the evidentiary burden on plaintiffs, requiring them to provide more rigorous explanations for any perceived delays in seeking relief.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["申请人承担主要举证责任，需具体说明知悉侵权产品、识别侵权情形及后续澄清事实的时间线与步骤", "推定知悉不自动成立，被告须首先 substantiate 并证明可推断早期知悉及拖延行…", "仅在被告确立具体指标后，举证责任才转移回申请人，由其反驳推断或解释为何不应假定早期知悉"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Applicants must specifically demonstrate the complete timeline and investigative steps from discovering infringement to filing the preliminary injunction application.", "Defendants claiming constructive knowledge must first provide concrete factual indicators before the burden of proof shifts to the applicant.", "The Court refused to presume constructive knowledge automatically, avoiding requirements for patentees to disprove early awareness in every instance."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确临时禁令程序中紧迫性审查的举证责任分配机制，防止对专利权人施加过重的自证义务", "强调申请人需提供具体的时间线及行动步骤证据，而非仅声明需要进行技术调查", "后续需观察法院在具体案件中如何界定被告提出的“具体事实指标”是否足以触发举证责任转移"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Rights holders must document internal investigation steps and timelines meticulously to demonstrate timely action after discovering potential infringement.", "Practice note: Defendants can utilize plaintiff public activities to build constructive knowledge defenses, thereby increasing the plaintiff's burden of proof.", "What to monitor: Future applications of Rule 211.4 regarding what constitutes sufficient factual indicators for shifting the burden of proof in urgency disputes."]
core_points_en: Applicants must specifically demonstrate the complete timeline and investigative steps from discovering infringement to filing the preliminary injunction application.
Defendants claiming constructive knowledge must first provide concrete factual indicators before the burden of proof shifts to the applicant.
The Court refused to presume constructive knowledge automatically, avoiding requirements for patentees to disprove early awareness in every instance.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders must document internal investigation steps and timelines meticulously to demonstrate timely action after discovering potential infringement.
Practice note: Defendants can utilize plaintiff public activities to build constructive knowledge defenses, thereby increasing the plaintiff's burden of proof.
What to monitor: Future applications of Rule 211.4 regarding what constitutes sufficient factual indicators for shifting the burden of proof in urgency disputes.

items.title: Nokia cannot include cross-licence requirement in Acer/Asus arbitration offers
items.title_zh: 英上诉法院裁定：诺基亚不得在仲裁要约中强制要求交叉许可
items.title_en: UK Court of Appeal Bars Nokia from Including Cross-Licence Requirement in Arbitration Offers
items.summary: The English Court of Appeal ruling has implications for parallel disputes between the implementers and Nokia’s customers
items.ai_summary_zh: 原文仅显示英国上诉法院作出一项裁决，认定诺基亚（Nokia）不能在针对宏碁（Acer）和华硕（Asus）的仲裁要约中包含交叉许可要求。该裁决对实施者与诺基亚客户之间的平行争议具有潜在影响。由于正文材料极度匮乏，无法提供案件细节、法律依据或具体判决理由。
items.ai_summary_en: The English Court of Appeal has ruled that Nokia cannot include a cross-licence requirement in its arbitration offers to Acer and Asus. This decision addresses the permissibility of specific licensing conditions within arbitration frameworks. The ruling is noted to have implications for parallel disputes involving implementers and Nokia's customers, potentially influencing how similar licensing negotiations are structured in future SEP-related proceedings.
items.ai_insight_zh: Practice note: 需关注该判例是否确立SEP许可谈判中交叉许可条款的法律边界。What to monitor: 后续是否有更多实施者援引此判例挑战类似许可条件，以及其对全球FRAND费率确定的潜在辐射效应。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies the boundaries of acceptable terms within arbitration offers for standard essential patents. Rights holders and implementers should note the judicial stance on linking arbitration participation with cross-licensing obligations. The outcome may influence negotiation dynamics in ongoing and future SEP licensing discussions across European jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["标题显示英国上诉法院裁定诺基亚不得在仲裁要约中加入交叉许可要求", "原文摘要显示该裁决将影响实施者与诺基亚客户间的平行争议"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The English Court of Appeal ruled against including cross-licence requirements in arbitration offers.", "The decision specifically concerns arbitration offers made by Nokia to Acer and Asus.", "The ruling may impact parallel disputes between implementers and Nokia's customer base."]

core_points_en: The English Court of Appeal ruled against including cross-licence requirements in arbitration offers.
The decision specifically concerns arbitration offers made by Nokia to Acer and Asus.
The ruling may impact parallel disputes between implementers and Nokia's customer base.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Rights holders must review arbitration offer structures to ensure compliance with this ruling regarding cross-licence mandates.
Practice note: Legal teams should assess whether existing licensing templates align with the Court of Appeal's restrictions on arbitration conditions.
What to monitor: Observe if other implementers cite this precedent to challenge similar cross-licence requirements in parallel SEP disputes.

items.title: Technology licensing under the revised TTBER: clearer guidance for pools, FRAND and collective negotiations
items.title_zh: 修订版TTBER下技术许可：专利池、FRAND及集体谈判指南更清晰
items.title_en: EU Revised TTBER: Enhanced Guidance on Pools, FRAND and Collective Negotiations
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟委员会于2026年4月16日通过修订版《技术转移集体豁免条例》(TTBER)及配套指南，将于5月1日生效。新规保留原有安全港结构，但细化了针对专利池、标准必要技术(SEP)许可及集体谈判的合规指导。对于涉及复杂许可模式的企业，需重点评估协议结构以降低反垄断风险，确保符合TFEU第101(3)条要求。
items.ai_summary_en: On 16 April 2026, the European Commission adopted the revised Technology Transfer Block Exemption Regulation (TTBER) and accompanying Guidelines, effective 1 May 2026. The new framework replaces the 2014 rules, maintaining the core Article 101(3) TFEU safe harbour structure while providing detailed guidance on modern licensing practices. Key updates address technology pools, licensing negotiation groups (LNGs), data licensing, and standard-essential technology licensing. For rights holders and licensees, compliance now requires careful structuring of complex agreements to mitigate competition law risks beyond mere market share thresholds.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国科技企业应密切关注新规对SEP许可及专利池的合规要求，特别是在参与集体谈判时。建议重新审查现有许可协议，确保不包含核心限制条款，并利用新指南优化FRAND谈判策略，以降低在欧面临的反垄断调查与诉讼风险。
items.ai_insight_en: The updated framework signals that the European Commission expects parties to actively manage competition law risks in sophisticated licensing structures. While the basic block exemption mechanics remain unchanged, the detailed guidance on pools and collective negotiations means that standard template agreements may no longer suffice for high-value or multi-party arrangements. Rights holders should assess whether their current portfolio licences and negotiation protocols align with the new interpretative guidance to ensure continued eligibility for the safe harbour.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["修订版TTBER及指南于2026年5月1日生效，取代2014年框架", "新增对专利池、数据许可及标准必要技术许可的详细竞争法指导", "企业需优化复杂许可协议结构以规避反垄断风险并享受安全港保护"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The revised TTBER retains the familiar safe harbour for technology transfer agreements below market share thresholds without hardcore restrictions.", "New Guidelines provide specific competition law clarity for technology pools, licensing negotiation groups, and standard-essential technology licensing.", "Complex licensing models involving data rights or collective negotiations require structured documentation to reduce antitrust exposure."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["重新审查SEP许可协议以符合新规反垄断合规要求", "利用新指南优化专利池参与及集体谈判策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Companies using patent pools or engaging in collective licensing must review agreement structures against the new Guidelines to maintain safe harbour protection.", "Practice note: Drafting teams should incorporate specific compliance checks for LNGs and SEP licensing clauses to address the Commission's updated expectations on competition risk.", "What to monitor: Future enforcement decisions by the EC regarding technology pools and collective negotiation groups will clarify the practical boundaries of the revised Guideline…"]
core_points_en: The revised TTBER retains the familiar safe harbour for technology transfer agreements below market share thresholds without hardcore restrictions.
New Guidelines provide specific competition law clarity for technology pools, licensing negotiation groups, and standard-essential technology licensing.
Complex licensing models involving data rights or collective negotiations require structured documentation to reduce antitrust exposure.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Companies using patent pools or engaging in collective licensing must review agreement structures against the new Guidelines to maintain safe harbour protection.
Practice note: Drafting teams should incorporate specific compliance checks for LNGs and SEP licensing clauses to address the Commission's updated expectations on competition risk.
What to monitor: Future enforcement decisions by the EC regarding technology pools and collective negotiation groups will clarify the practical boundaries of the revised Guideline…

items.title: Unlocking innovation potential in Latin America and the Caribbean
items.title_zh: EPO报告：释放拉美及加勒比地区创新潜力
items.title_en: Unlocking innovation potential in Latin America and the Caribbean
items.summary: A joint EPO–ECLAC study highlights the role of intellectual property rights (IPR) in driving growth and productivity in Latin America and the Caribbean
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）与联合国拉美经委会发布联合研究，指出知识产权密集型制造业占该地区GDP的13.6%并提供高薪岗位，但存在技术进口依赖度高、本土专利申请占比低的问题。报告强调需完善创新生态系统、加强产学研合作及技术转让，以将创新转化为可持续价值，并建议将IP政策融入更广泛的生产发展策略中。
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在拓展拉美市场时，应重视当地对高附加值技术的需求及IP密集型产业的溢价效应。鉴于该地区本土创新能力尚待提升，中国企业可寻求与当地科研机构或高校建立技术转移与合作伙伴关系，利用其人才储备，同时需注意防范因专利布局薄弱带来的潜在侵权风险，优化全球IP战略。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["IP密集型制造业贡献显著，提供高薪岗位且生产率高于其他行业", "区域技术贸易逆差明显，本土专利申请占比低，依赖外国申请人", "需强化创新生态系统，通过产学研合作提升技术转化能力"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注拉美IP密集型产业的高附加值机会，优化出口产品结构", "探索与当地科研机构的产学研合作，弥补本土转化能力不足"]

items.title: LD Brussels, May 7, 2026, Cost Decision, UPC_CFI_2265/2025
items.title_zh: UPC布鲁塞尔地院：权利放弃需明示及费用裁定要点
items.title_en: UPC Brussels: Waiver Requires Explicit Statement and Cost Calculation Rules
items.summary: Waiver of rights requires an explicit statement – prior admissions in first instance proceedings do not constitute a waiver (R. 150 RoP)
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC布鲁塞尔地方法院在Yealink案费用裁定中明确：权利放弃需 explicit 声明，一审承认对方胜诉不构成放弃索赔权；部分胜诉与费用抵销不可双重适用以降低上限；当事人自行安排的翻译费不可回收；临时禁令后提起实体诉讼时，费用申请期限自实体判决送达起算。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of First Instance in Brussels issued a cost decision clarifying that waiving rights requires an explicit statement. Prior admissions regarding the opposing party’s success in first instance proceedings do not constitute a waiver of the right to claim compensation as a partially successful party under Rule 150 RoP. The Court ruled that partial success reductions and cost set-offs cannot be applied simultaneously to reduce the applicable ceiling, preventing a double penalty. Additionally, interpreter costs arranged independently by a party are excluded from recoverable costs, which are limited to those arranged by the Court. The one-month deadline for cost applications runs from the merits decision when substantive proceedings follow provisional measures.
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁定细化了UPC费用分摊规则，强调权利放弃的明示要求及翻译费回收限制。实务中需注意费用申请起算点随实体诉讼启动而延后，且应避免对同一费用项主张双重扣减，以符合比例原则。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision provides essential guidance on UPC cost allocation, emphasizing strict formal requirements for waiving rights and prohibiting double reductions in cost ceilings. It clarifies recoverability limits for interpretation services and confirms that cost application deadlines align with final merits decisions in multi-stage litigation, aiding predictable budgeting and procedural planning for rights holders operating across European jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["权利放弃需明确声明，一审中承认对方为胜诉方不构成后续费用程序中放弃部分胜诉索赔权", "部分胜诉降低费用上限与具体费用抵销不可同时适用，法院维持全额上限并直接扣除合理费用", "当事人依规则自行安排的同声传译费用不属于可回收诉讼费用，仅法院安排的翻译费可回收"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Waiver of rights requires clear, explicit declaration; prior procedural admissions do not suffice.", "Partial success adjustments and cost set-offs cannot both reduce the applicable cost ceiling.", "Independently arranged interpreter costs are non-recoverable; only Court-arranged interpretation is compensable."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确权利放弃必须基于清晰、明确的声明，默示行为或程序性承认不产生放弃效力", "自行聘请翻译产生的费用无法转嫁给对方，需在预算阶段予以内部消化", "关注临时禁令与实体诉讼并行时，费用申请期限从实体判决送达日起算的程序细节"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties must explicitly declare any waiver of rights to avoid unintended loss of cost recovery opportunities in subsequent proceedings.", "Practice note: Do not assume prior acknowledgments of success waive cost claims; ensure interpreter services are Court-arranged if cost recovery is anticipated.", "What to monitor: Track how UPC courts apply the prohibition on double-penalty cost reductions and interpret proportionality in provisional measure appeals."]
core_points_en: Waiver of rights requires clear, explicit declaration; prior procedural admissions do not suffice.
Partial success adjustments and cost set-offs cannot both reduce the applicable cost ceiling.
Independently arranged interpreter costs are non-recoverable; only Court-arranged interpretation is compensable.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties must explicitly declare any waiver of rights to avoid unintended loss of cost recovery opportunities in subsequent proceedings.
Practice note: Do not assume prior acknowledgments of success waive cost claims; ensure interpreter services are Court-arranged if cost recovery is anticipated.
What to monitor: Track how UPC courts apply the prohibition on double-penalty cost reductions and interpret proportionality in provisional measure appeals.

items.title: LD The Hague, May 11, 2026, Order, UPC-CFI_478/2025, UPC_CFI_585/2026
items.title_zh: UPC海牙分部：证据保全令需满足四项累积条件
items.title_en: UPC Hague: Evidence Production Orders Require Cumulative Conditions and Proportionality
items.summary: Under R. 190 RoP and Art. 59(1) UPCA, evidence production orders require four cumulative conditions: plausible evidence, specified evidence within the other party’s control, confidentiality protection, and proportionality
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC海牙地方法院裁定，依据《程序规则》第190条及《统一专利法院协定》第59(1)条，发布证据保全令需满足四项累积条件：初步证据、对方控制下的特定证据、保密保护及比例原则。法院援引Winnow v Orbisk等先例，指出已授权欧洲专利具有有效性推定，除非明显无效。鉴于侵权验证需物理测试，法院批准获取部分产品样本及营销材料，但基于比例原则缩减了样本数量。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Local Division in The Hague clarified the requirements for evidence production orders under Rule 190 of the Rules of Procedure and Article 59(1) of the Unified Patent Court Agreement. The Court established that four cumulative conditions must be met: plausible evidence, specified evidence within the opposing party's control, confidentiality protection, and proportionality. Citing Winnow v Orbisk and Oppo v Panasonic, the judgment affirmed that granted European patents carry a presumption of validity, which is only displaced by clear-cut invalidity. The Court reduced the requested physical samples from six to two variants based on proportionality, while upholding the quantity needed for ballistic testing where infringement verification depends on direct physical analysis rather than mathematical extrapolation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确了UPC在证据保全阶段的审查标准，强调了对已授权专利有效性的尊重及比例原则的适用。实务中，申请人需确保证据请求的具体性与必要性，避免过度索取。对于依赖物理测试认定侵权的案件，提前规划测试方案并论证样本获取的必要性至关重要。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision reinforces the structured approach of the UPC towards pre-trial evidence gathering, balancing the rights holder's need to verify infringement against the defendant's interest in avoiding disproportionate burdens. It confirms that while patent validity is presumed, the specificity and necessity of requested evidence remain subject to rigorous judicial scrutiny. For practitioners, the ruling highlights that requests for physical products must be tightly scoped to what is strictly necessary for technical verification, particularly when infringement claims rely on empirical testing outcomes.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["证据保全令需满足初步证据、特定性、保密性及比例原则四项累积条件", "已授权欧洲专利享有有效性推定，仅明显无效情形可推翻该推定", "为验证依赖测试的侵权，可下令提供物理样本，但需符合比例原则限制范围"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Rule 190 RoP and Article 59(1) UPCA require plausible evidence, specific controlled evidence, confidentiality, and proportionality.", "Granted European patents benefit from a validity presumption unless a clear-cut case of invalidity is demonstrated at this stage.", "Physical samples may be ordered for necessary testing, but requests are strictly limited by proportionality principles."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["Client relevance/客户相关性: 明确UPC证据保全门槛，指导专利维权策略", "Practice note/实务观察: 论证样本获取必要性时需结合具体测试需求与比例原则", "What to monitor/后续观察: 关注UPC对“明显无效”标准的进一步界定及…"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Clarifies the high threshold for obtaining evidence production orders, requiring precise justification of necessity and proportionality.", "Practice note: When seeking physical samples for test-dependent infringement, limit requests to the minimum viable set to satisfy proportionality requirements.", "What to monitor: How the UPC further defines 'clear-cut' invalidity cases that might displace the presumption of validity during evidence stages."]
core_points_en: Rule 190 RoP and Article 59(1) UPCA require plausible evidence, specific controlled evidence, confidentiality, and proportionality.
Granted European patents benefit from a validity presumption unless a clear-cut case of invalidity is demonstrated at this stage.
Physical samples may be ordered for necessary testing, but requests are strictly limited by proportionality principles.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Clarifies the high threshold for obtaining evidence production orders, requiring precise justification of necessity and proportionality.
Practice note: When seeking physical samples for test-dependent infringement, limit requests to the minimum viable set to satisfy proportionality requirements.
What to monitor: How the UPC further defines 'clear-cut' invalidity cases that might displace the presumption of validity during evidence stages.

items.title: LD The Hague, May 4, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_2028/2025, UPC_CFI_2031/2025
items.title_zh: UPC海牙分院：单方复审仅惠及申请方及证据保全标准
items.title_en: LD The Hague, May 4, 2026, Order, UPC_CFI_2028/2025, UPC_CFI_2031/2025
items.summary: A review under R.197.3 RoP only benefits the party that files it; co-defendants who do not seek review remain bound by the original order
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院海牙地方分院裁定，依据程序规则第197.3条的复审仅惠及提出申请的一方，未申请的共同被告仍受原命令约束。法院明确侵权可能性证明标准低于临时措施要求，被告供应商造成的不确定性足以认定间接侵权可能。即便存在数据保留义务，若证据有暂时灭失风险，单方证据保全令仍具正当性。在 niche B2B 市场中，若测试购买不可行，此类措施符合比例原则。
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案澄清了UPC证据保全程序中复审效力的相对性及证明标准。实务中需关注单方保全的严格适用条件，特别是在B2B隐蔽销售渠道下，法院倾向于支持防止证据灭失的措施。企业应评估供应链信息透明度对侵权可能性认定的影响，并注意共同被告间诉讼策略的独立性。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["依据程序规则第197.3条，复审利益仅归于申请方，未申请复审的共同被告仍受原证据保全令…", "认定侵权可能性的证明标准低于临时措施要求的“充分确定性”， mere speculat…", "被告供应商导致的产品变更或文档模糊等不确定性，足以支持认定被告间接侵权的可能性", "数据保留义务不阻碍证据保全，只要存在证据暂时灭失风险；niche B2B市场测试购买难…"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["复审效力具有相对性，共同被告需独立评估是否提起复审，否则将受不利裁定约束", "间接侵权可能性认定门槛较低，供应链端的文档混乱或沉默可能被法院视为侵权线索", "在无法进行测试购买的细分B2B市场，法院更易批准单方证据保全以固定关键证据"]

items.title: Meet the Lifetime Achievement winner and the finalists for the 10th anniversary of the DesignEuropa Awards
items.title_zh: EUIPO公布DesignEuropa奖终身成就奖得主及决赛选手
items.title_en: EUIPO Announces Philippe Starck as Lifetime Achievement Winner of DesignEuropa Awards 2026
items.summary: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) is honoured to announce that Philippe Starck has been selected as the Lifetime Achievement Award winner of the DesignEuropa Awards 2026.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）宣布，著名设计师Philippe Starck被选为2026年DesignEuropa奖项的终身成就奖得主。该公告旨在庆祝DesignEuropa奖项成立十周年，并公布了其他决赛入围者名单。此活动由EUIPO主办，旨在提高公众对设计和知识产权保护的认识。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Union Intellectual Property Office (EUIPO) has announced that renowned designer Philippe Starck is the recipient of the Lifetime Achievement Award at the 2026 DesignEuropa Awards. This announcement coincides with the tenth anniversary of the awards program, which aims to highlight the importance of design and intellectual property protection within the European Union. The EUIPO also released the list of finalists for this year's competition.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This official recognition underscores the EUIPO's continued focus on promoting registered designs and the value of IP in the creative industries. For rights holders and design teams, such high-profile endorsements reinforce the cultural and commercial significance of protecting aesthetic creations under EU law. Stakeholders should note the alignment between these awards and broader EU policy goals regarding innovation and design-led growth.

The announcement marks the tenth anniversary of the DesignEuropa Awards initiative organized by the EUIPO.

items.title: ‘Porcelaine de Limoges’ becomes EU’s first craft and industrial GI
items.title_zh: “利摩日瓷器”成为欧盟首个手工艺和工业地理标志
items.title_en: Porcelaine de Limoges Becomes EU’s First Registered Craft and Industrial Geographical Indication
items.summary: The designation gives the historic Limoges porcelain industry EU-wide protection under a new regime aimed at safeguarding Europe’s craft and industrial heritage.
items.ai_summary_zh: “利摩日瓷器”（Porcelaine de Limoges）正式获得认定，成为欧盟体系下首个受保护的手工艺和工业地理标志。该认定依据欧盟新建立的监管制度，旨在保护欧洲的手工艺和工业遗产，并为利摩日历史悠久的瓷器产业提供欧盟范围内的法律保护。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Commission has officially granted geographical indication (GI) protection to 'Porcelaine de Limoges,' marking the first successful registration under the new EU regime dedicated to craft and industrial products. This designation provides comprehensive legal protection across all member states, aiming to safeguard Europe’s traditional manufacturing heritage and artisanal skills. The ruling establishes strict production standards and geographic limitations, ensuring that only porcelain produced in the specific Limoges region meets the criteria. This precedent strengthens brand distinctiveness for historic industries and signals a significant policy expansion of the GI framework beyond agricultural goods, offering a new pathway for protecting non-agricultural cultural assets within the internal market.
items.ai_insight_zh: 此案例标志着欧盟地理标志保护范围从农产品扩展至手工艺和工业产品。需关注该新制度下的申请标准、审查流程及执法机制，以及后续其他传统工业产品是否跟进申请，这对拥有历史品牌的制造企业具有参考意义。
items.ai_insight_en: The expansion of the EU geographical indication system to include craft and industrial products represents a strategic shift in intellectual property protection. Stakeholders should monitor this trend, particularly if operating in sectors like ceramics or traditional manufacturing where origin and reputation are key value drivers. Companies exporting to Europe must review product naming and origin labeling practices to ensure compliance with these evolving standards. Furthermore, producers of distinctive regional crafts may consider exploring GI eligibility to enhance brand equity and differentiate their offerings in the competitive European market, leveraging this new protective mechanism for long-term commercial advantage.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["“利摩日瓷器”被认定为欧盟首个手工艺和工业地理标志", "该认定基于旨在保护欧洲手工艺和工业遗产的新监管制度", "利摩日瓷器产业由此获得欧盟范围内的统一法律保护"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Porcelaine de Limoges is the first product registered as a craft and industrial geographical indication under the new EU regulatory framework.", "The new regime aims to protect and preserve Europe's traditional handicrafts and industrial cultural heritage through unified legal measures.", "This registration provides EU-wide protection and sets a crucial intellectual property precedent for other non-agricultural traditional crafts."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧盟地理标志保护体系正式涵盖手工艺和工业领域", "需观察新制度下非农产品地理标志的审查与确权实践", "关注该认定对欧洲传统制造业品牌保护策略的潜在影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor the expansion of EU GI scope to assess risks for ceramic exports and verify compliance of product naming and origin labels.", "Practice note: Evaluate the feasibility of registering Chinese traditional crafts as GIs in the EU to strengthen brand positioning and market competitiveness.", "What to monitor: Track subsequent registrations under the new craft and industrial GI regime to identify emerging precedents and enforcement patterns."]
core_points_en: Porcelaine de Limoges is the first product registered as a craft and industrial geographical indication under the new EU regulatory framework.
The new regime aims to protect and preserve Europe's traditional handicrafts and industrial cultural heritage through unified legal measures.
This registration provides EU-wide protection and sets a crucial intellectual property precedent for other non-agricultural traditional crafts.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor the expansion of EU GI scope to assess risks for ceramic exports and verify compliance of product naming and origin labels.
Practice note: Evaluate the feasibility of registering Chinese traditional crafts as GIs in the EU to strengthen brand positioning and market competitiveness.
What to monitor: Track subsequent registrations under the new craft and industrial GI regime to identify emerging precedents and enforcement patterns.

items.title: The UPC Clarifies The Threshold For “imminent Infringement”
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院澄清“即发侵权”认定门槛
items.title_en: The UPC Clarifies The Threshold For “imminent Infringement”
items.summary: On 13 August, the UPC Court of Appeal held that a marketing authorisation alone is not enough, but once a health technology assessment (HTA), pricing and reimbursement are completed, imminent infringement may be established. Pharmaceutical companies must therefore monitor regulatory steps closely to act in time.
items.ai_summary_zh: 8月13日，统一专利法院（UPC）上诉庭裁定，仅获得上市许可不足以认定“即发侵权”。一旦完成卫生技术评估（HTA）、定价及报销程序，即可确立即发侵权。制药公司需密切监控监管步骤以及时采取行动。
items.ai_insight_zh: 该裁决明确了药品专利维权中申请禁令的时间窗口前移条件。实务中需关注HTA及定价报销节点的完成状态，将其作为判断侵权紧迫性的关键事实依据，而非仅依赖上市许可。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC上诉庭裁定仅获上市许可不足以构成即发侵权", "完成卫生技术评估、定价及报销后可确立即发侵权", "药企需密切监控监管进程以便及时采取法律行动"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确HTA及定价报销完成是认定即发侵权的关键节点", "上市许可单独存在不再足以支持即发侵权的主张", "需持续观察UPC后续案件对监管步骤完成度的具体举证要求"]
