items.title: EPO filings hit record high as AI and quantum drive renewed growth
items.title_zh: 人工智能与量子技术推动EPO专利申请创历史新高
items.title_en: EPO Filings Reach Record High as AI and Quantum Technologies Drive Growth
items.summary: The European Patent Office patent data reveals steady growth overall, with strong European activity, a burgeoning AI and quantum sector, and a leap in Unitary Patent requests.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局数据显示，专利申请总量稳步增长并创下新高。欧洲本土申请活动强劲，人工智能和量子技术领域呈现蓬勃发展态势。此外，统一专利（Unitary Patent）的请求数量出现显著跃升，反映出该新制度下的积极市场反应。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has reported that total patent applications reached a historic high, reflecting steady overall growth in the region. This surge is primarily driven by robust activity from European applicants and significant expansion in emerging technology sectors, particularly artificial intelligence and quantum computing. Additionally, there has been a marked increase in requests for unitary patents following the implementation of the new system. These developments highlight the vitality of the European innovation ecosystem and demonstrate the growing appeal of the unified patent framework among rights holders seeking streamlined protection across multiple jurisdictions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 需持续监测AI与量子技术在EPO的审查趋势及授权率变化。统一专利请求量的激增表明权利人对该制度的信心增强，建议关注后续UPC案例法对专利价值评估的潜在影响，以及新兴技术领域在欧洲的布局密度变化。
items.ai_insight_en: The record filing volumes underscore the strategic importance of the European market for global innovators. Rights holders should consider leveraging the unitary patent system to optimize maintenance costs and reduce administrative burdens associated with multi-country validation. Given the intense competition in deep tech, prioritizing high-value portfolios in AI and quantum sectors is advisable. Stakeholders must closely monitor EPO examination trends and procedural updates to ensure robust protection strategies align with evolving regulatory standards and competitive dynamics within the EU.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧洲专利局专利申请总量稳步增长，整体数据创下历史新高记录", "人工智能和量子技术 sector 成为推动 renewed growth 的关键新兴领域", "统一专利（Unitary Patent）请求数量出现大幅跃升，显示制度采纳加速"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Total patent applications at the EPO have reached a record high, demonstrating a consistent trend of steady growth across the board.", "Artificial intelligence and quantum computing have emerged as the core technological fields driving the recent surge in patent filings.", "Requests for unitary patents have seen a significant leap since the system's implementation, indicating strong market adoption."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注AI与量子技术领域在欧洲的专利审查标准演变及授权前景", "监测统一专利请求量增长背后的申请人结构及主要技术领域分布", "观察EPO整体申请增长是否伴随特定成员国或技术领域的集中化趋势"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage the unitary patent system to significantly lower multi-jurisdictional maintenance costs and simplify portfolio management.", "Practice note: Increase investment in artificial intelligence and quantum technologies to strengthen competitiveness in key European technical sectors.", "What to monitor: Track EPO examination dynamics and policy shifts to optimize high-value patent strategies amid rising regional competition."]
core_points_en: Total patent applications at the EPO have reached a record high, demonstrating a consistent trend of steady growth across the board.
Artificial intelligence and quantum computing have emerged as the core technological fields driving the recent surge in patent filings.
Requests for unitary patents have seen a significant leap since the system's implementation, indicating strong market adoption.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage the unitary patent system to significantly lower multi-jurisdictional maintenance costs and simplify portfolio management.
Practice note: Increase investment in artificial intelligence and quantum technologies to strengthen competitiveness in key European technical sectors.
What to monitor: Track EPO examination dynamics and policy shifts to optimize high-value patent strategies amid rising regional competition.

items.title: Republic of Moldova to become 40th EPO member state
items.title_zh: 摩尔多瓦将成为欧洲专利组织第 40 个成员国
items.title_en: Republic of Moldova to Join European Patent Organisation as 40th Member State
items.summary: The Republic of Moldova will join the European Patent Organisation as its 40th member on 1 June 2026.
items.ai_summary_zh: 摩尔多瓦将于 2026 年 6 月 1 日正式成为欧洲专利组织第 40 个成员国。该国已于 2026 年 3 月交存加入书，完成加入《欧洲专利公约》最后步骤。此前双方通过验证协议合作多年，此举标志着摩尔多瓦知识产权框架进一步融入欧洲体系，也是其欧盟一体化进程的重要里程碑。
items.ai_summary_en: The Republic of Moldova is scheduled to become the 40th contracting state of the European Patent Organisation on 1 June 2026, following the deposit of its instrument of accession on 25 March 2026. This accession follows a long-standing cooperation framework, including a validation agreement effective since 2015 that allowed European patents to extend to Moldova without separate national filings. The move strengthens European patent cooperation and aligns with Moldova’s broader integration efforts following the opening of EU accession negotiations in June 2024.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧专利布局范围将扩大至摩尔多瓦。建议关注生效日期，利用单一申请程序覆盖该国市场，降低维权与申请成本，同时评估当地知识产权环境变化带来的新机遇。
items.ai_insight_en: The expansion of the European Patent Convention system to include Moldova broadens the geographic scope for unified patent protection strategies. Rights holders can now anticipate seamless coverage across 40 jurisdictions through the centralised EPO grant procedure. This development simplifies portfolio management for companies operating in Eastern Europe, reducing the administrative burden associated with validating patents in multiple national systems and enhancing legal certainty for innovation protection in the region.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["摩尔多瓦将于 2026 年 6 月正式成为欧专局第 40 个成员国", "该国已完成加入《欧洲专利公约》的所有法律程序步骤", "此举深化了欧洲专利合作并助推摩尔多瓦欧盟一体化进程"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Moldova will officially join the EPC as the 40th member state on 1 June 2026 after depositing its accession instrument.", "A validation agreement effective since 2015 previously enabled extending granted European patents to Moldovan territory.", "Accession marks a significant milestone in strengthening European patent cooperation and supporting Moldova's IP framework development."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧专体系扩容，中国企业可一站式获取摩尔多瓦专利保护", "需关注 2026 年 6 月生效节点，及时调整海外专利申请策略"]

core_points_en: Moldova will officially join the EPC as the 40th member state on 1 June 2026 after depositing its accession instrument.
A validation agreement effective since 2015 previously enabled extending granted European patents to Moldovan territory.
Accession marks a significant milestone in strengthening European patent cooperation and supporting Moldova's IP framework development.

Practice note: Update validation instructions and docketing systems to reflect Moldova's status as an EPC contracting state effective 1 June 2026 for pending and future applicatio…
What to monitor: Observe any transitional provisions or specific national implementation measures by AGEPI regarding the shift from validation agreements to full EPC membership.

items.title: Select Committee commends strong Unitary Patent uptake and SME engagement
items.title_zh: 专委肯定统一专利强劲增长及中小企业参与
items.title_en: EPO Select Committee Praises Unitary Patent Growth and SME Engagement
items.summary: In their meeting on 19 March 2026, the Select Committee of the Administrative Council of the EPO reviewed a variety of topics and welcomed the steadily increasing uptake of the Unitary Patent by patentees around the world, with Eu
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年3月19日，EPO行政理事会专委会议肯定统一专利 uptake 稳步增长，2025年达28.7%，欧洲用户为主力。UPC案件量增加，英语为主要程序语言。UPC上诉法院确认EPO登记实践，并首次向CJEU提请澄清管辖权问题。EPO协助欧盟委员会撰写运行报告，系统实施顺利。
items.ai_summary_en: In March 2026, the EPO Administrative Council’s Select Committee acknowledged the steady rise in Unitary Patent applications, with European users comprising sixty percent of filings and small to medium-sized enterprises representing forty percent. The Unified Patent Court reported increasing caseloads at both first instance and appellate levels, noting English as the dominant procedural language. For the first time, the UPC referred a question to the CJEU to clarify jurisdictional scope. The EPO confirmed smooth system operations, validating that pre-launch concerns were unfounded. Governance measures were updated, and the Court’s positive financial status reduced reliance on member state contributions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 统一专利制度运行趋于成熟，SME高参与度显示其成本优势获市场认可。UPC向CJEU提请裁决标志着欧盟司法协作框架下的法律澄清机制启动，需关注CJEU对UPC管辖权范围的界定，这将影响未来跨境专利诉讼策略及法律确定性。
items.ai_insight_en: The high adoption rate among European SMEs highlights the Unitary Patent’s cost-effectiveness for managing multi-jurisdictional rights. Companies should evaluate whether this system offers superior value compared to traditional validation routes. With English emerging as the dominant language in UPC proceedings, litigants can leverage linguistic advantages to streamline dispute resolution. Stakeholders must closely track the evolving jurisprudence from the UPC, particularly following its initial referral to the CJEU, to anticipate shifts in jurisdictional interpretation and refine litigation strategies accordingly.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["统一专利请求超8.6万件，2025年uptake率达28.7%， SME占比超40%", "UPC上诉法院确认EPO登记实践，并首次就管辖权问题向CJEU提请裁决", "专委通过治理措施更新，并肯定统一专利在法律及运营层面的成功实施"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Unitary Patent uptake reached 28.7% in 2025, driven significantly by European SMEs and public research institutions.", "UPC caseloads are rising with English as the primary language, supported by strong financial health and limited state funding needs.", "The UPC Appeals Court upheld EPO practices and made its first referral to the CJEU regarding jurisdictional boundaries."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["统一专利在中小企业中渗透率高，反映其作为成本控制工具的有效性", "UPC首次向CJEU提请裁决，预示欧盟层面将对统一专利法院管辖权进行权威解释", "需持续监测CJEU后续判决对多被告跨境侵权案件管辖规则的具体影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage the Unitary Patent’s affordability to reduce maintenance costs across multiple European jurisdictions.", "Practice note: Utilize English-language proceedings at the UPC to optimize litigation efficiency and manage potential disputes effectively.", "What to monitor: Track UPC jurisdictional precedents and CJEU interactions to adapt European litigation and defense strategies proactively."]
core_points_en: Unitary Patent uptake reached 28.7% in 2025, driven significantly by European SMEs and public research institutions.
UPC caseloads are rising with English as the primary language, supported by strong financial health and limited state funding needs.
The UPC Appeals Court upheld EPO practices and made its first referral to the CJEU regarding jurisdictional boundaries.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage the Unitary Patent’s affordability to reduce maintenance costs across multiple European jurisdictions.
Practice note: Utilize English-language proceedings at the UPC to optimize litigation efficiency and manage potential disputes effectively.
What to monitor: Track UPC jurisdictional precedents and CJEU interactions to adapt European litigation and defense strategies proactively.

items.title: Accord PPH avec la Corée du Sud
items.title_zh: 法国与韩国建立专利审查高速路合作
items.title_en: INPI Establishes Patent Prosecution Highway Agreement with Korean Intellectual Property Office
items.summary: Accord PPH avec la Corée du Sud llegrand@inpi.fr 24 mars 2026 Les conditions pour utiliser le PPH Les déposants peuvent demander l'accélération du traitement de leur demande auprès de l'un des deux offices à partir du moment où elle aura été examinée par l'autre office, indépendamment de l'ordre chronologique des dépôts et des revendications de priorité. De manière classique, après dépôt d'une requête PPH, le traitement d'une demande de brevet déposée à l'INPI et revendiquant la priorité d'une d
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国工业产权局宣布与韩国知识产权局启动专利审查高速路合作。申请人可基于一方审查结果请求另一方加速处理，不受申请顺序限制。法国侧请求免费，韩国侧需缴纳约150欧元费用。加速条件包括权利要求具有充分对应性及可专利性认定。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) has implemented a bilateral Patent Prosecution Highway (PPH) agreement with the Korean Intellectual Property Office (KIPO). Applicants may request accelerated examination at either office based on positive findings from the other, regardless of filing chronology or priority claims. Acceleration requires that claims in the second application correspond to or are narrower than those deemed patentable by the first office. While INPI processes PPH requests without official fees, KIPO charges approximately 150 EUR. Eligibility extends to national applications and PCT cases where KIPO served as the International Searching or Preliminary Examining Authority.
items.ai_insight_zh: 该双边程序安排为在法韩两国均有布局的申请人提供了明确的审查加速路径。实务中需注意两国对权利要求对应性的具体审查标准差异，以及韩国侧的费用缴纳程序。此机制有助于缩短跨国专利授权周期，提升确权效率。
items.ai_insight_en: This bilateral framework offers a strategic tool for rights holders managing parallel portfolios in France and South Korea. By leveraging positive examination results, applicants can potentially reduce prosecution timelines. Practitioners should note the cost asymmetry and ensure strict claim correspondence to maximize the utility of this accelerated pathway in both jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法韩PPH允许基于一方审查结果加速另一方处理，独立于申请及优先权顺序", "在法国提出PPH加速请求免费；在韩国提出需缴纳20万韩元（约150欧元）官费", "加速前提是一方已认定相关权利要求具备可专利性，且另一方权利要求范围相同或更窄"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Acceleration is available bidirectionally between INPI and KIPO, independent of the chronological order of filings or priority claims.", "INPI does not charge fees for PPH requests, whereas KIPO requires a payment of 200,000 KRW for acceleration.", "Claims in the accelerated application must sufficiently correspond to or be narrower than those found patentable by the earlier examining office."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["法韩双向PPH机制确立了基于审查结果互认的加速通道，优化跨国申请流程", "需关注法国免费与韩国收费的成本差异，以及在先审查意见对后续权利要求修改的约束", "后续应观察INPI与KIPO在实际案件中对“权利要求充分对应”标准的执行一致性"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Provides a mechanism to accelerate grant proceedings in France or Korea by leveraging positive examination results from the counterpart office.", "Practice note: Ensure claims in the second filing are identical to or narrower than those allowed in the first office to satisfy correspondence requirements.", "What to monitor: Observe how INPI and KIPO apply claim correspondence standards in practice and any updates to procedural guidelines."]
core_points_en: Acceleration is available bidirectionally between INPI and KIPO, independent of the chronological order of filings or priority claims.
INPI does not charge fees for PPH requests, whereas KIPO requires a payment of 200,000 KRW for acceleration.
Claims in the accelerated application must sufficiently correspond to or be narrower than those found patentable by the earlier examining office.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Provides a mechanism to accelerate grant proceedings in France or Korea by leveraging positive examination results from the counterpart office.
Practice note: Ensure claims in the second filing are identical to or narrower than those allowed in the first office to satisfy correspondence requirements.
What to monitor: Observe how INPI and KIPO apply claim correspondence standards in practice and any updates to procedural guidelines.

items.title: EU and Australia finally reach compromise on Prosecco GI
items.title_zh: 欧盟与澳大利亚就普罗塞克地理标志达成妥协
items.title_en: EU and Australia Reach Compromise on Prosecco GI in Free Trade Agreement
items.summary: This morning, Europe woke up to the news that agreement had finally been reached on the EU-Australia free trade agreement - including a compromise on the controversial topic of geographical indications.Image by Vilius Kukanauskas via Pixabay.Geographical indications had been a major sticking point during the negotiations, which first began in 2018. Indeed, geographical indications - especially
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟与澳大利亚最终就自由贸易协定达成协议，其中包括就争议的地理标志问题达成妥协。地理标志是自2018年开始的谈判中的主要障碍，尤其是普罗塞克（Prosecco）的保护问题。
items.ai_summary_en: After years of negotiations, the European Union and Australia have finally reached an agreement on their free trade deal, resolving a major sticking point regarding geographical indications. This compromise specifically addresses sensitive products like Prosecco, ending the deadlock that has persisted since talks began in 2018. The resolution marks a critical breakthrough in balancing domestic industry interests with international trade rules, clearing the path for the final signing of the agreement. This development significantly impacts future agricultural trade patterns between the two regions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 需关注后续公布的协定文本中关于普罗塞克及其他欧盟地理标志在澳大利亚的具体保护范围与过渡期安排。此妥协可能成为欧盟未来与其他国家贸易谈判中地理标志章节的参考先例。
items.ai_insight_en: This development highlights the evolving standards of geographical indication protection under EU trade agreements. Exporters should assess whether their products fall under newly protected lists to mitigate potential infringement risks. Additionally, this case offers valuable insights for navigating cross-border trade negotiations, particularly regarding mutual recognition mechanisms for geographical indications. Stakeholders should remain vigilant about compliance requirements and consider optimizing overseas GI strategies in light of these international trends.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟与澳大利亚已就自由贸易协定达成最终协议", "协议包含针对争议性地理标志问题的妥协方案", "地理标志议题是自2018年以来谈判的主要阻碍"]

items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注协定文本中地理标志的具体保护条款与例外规定", "观察该妥协对欧盟后续国际贸易谈判中IP章节的影响", "监测澳大利亚市场对相关地理标志产品的合规调整动态"]

Both parties found a compromise solution for controversial products such as Prosecco, effectively removing the primary obstacle to the deal.
The agreement establishes new geographical indication protection rules that will shape the future landscape of EU-Australia agricultural trade.

items.title: Software and utility models in Spain: criteria shift requires protection strategies rethink
items.title_zh: 西班牙软件与实用新型：标准变更需重思保护策略
items.title_en: Spain Clarifies Software Exclusion from Utility Models, Prompting Strategy Shift
items.summary: New guidelines reinforce the interpretation that CIIs are explicitly excluded from utility model protection under Spanish Law 24/2015
items.ai_summary_zh: 新指南强化了依据西班牙《2015年第24号法律》的解释，即计算机实施发明（CII）被明确排除在实用新型保护范围之外。这一解释标准的转变要求申请人重新审视其在西班牙的软件相关技术保护策略，不再能依赖实用新型作为替代方案。
items.ai_summary_en: New guidelines issued by Spanish authorities reinforce the interpretation that computer-implemented inventions are explicitly excluded from utility model protection under Law 24/2015. This policy shift clarifies that software-related technical solutions cannot be protected via the utility model route, which traditionally offered faster and cheaper registration than patents. Consequently, applicants must reassess their intellectual property strategies in Spain. Relying on utility models for software innovations now carries a high risk of rejection due to subject matter ineligibility. To ensure effective protection, rights holders should pivot towards filing standard patent applications or exploring other suitable IP forms. This adjustment is critical to navigate increasingly strict examination standards and secure robust legal rights for software technologies within the Spanish jurisdiction.
items.ai_insight_zh: 实务观察：西班牙审查实践对软件类技术的实用新型申请趋于严格。企业需关注CII在西班牙的可专利性边界，监测后续审查指南的具体执行案例，以调整组合布局策略。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders seeking protection for software technologies in Spain should abandon utility model filings to avoid immediate rejection based on subject matter eligibility. Instead, focus resources on preparing strong patent applications that clearly articulate the technical contribution of the invention beyond mere code execution. Emphasizing technical effects and solving specific technical problems will enhance the likelihood of grant under stricter examination criteria. This approach mitigates enforcement risks associated with invalid titles. Monitoring future administrative practices regarding the definition of technical character in software cases remains essential for maintaining a resilient portfolio and adapting to evolving judicial interpretations in the European context.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["新指南明确计算机实施发明被排除在西班牙实用新型保护之外", "该解释基于西班牙《2015年第24号法律》的强化解读", "标准变更导致原有的软件技术保护策略需要重新评估"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["New guidelines confirm that computer-implemented inventions are ineligible for utility model protection in Spain.", "Law 24/2015 formally excludes software-related technical solutions from the scope of utility model rights.", "Companies must adjust strategies by pursuing patent applications to ensure valid protection for software innovations."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["西班牙实用新型不再适合作为计算机实施发明的快速保护通道", "需持续监测西班牙专利局对新指南下CII案件的具体审查尺度", "原有依赖实用新型覆盖软件功能的布局策略面临失效风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Avoid utility model filings for software in Spain to prevent rejection; prioritize patent applications for stronger enforceability.", "Practice note: Strengthen patent specifications by highlighting technical contributions and effects to satisfy eligibility requirements.", "What to monitor: Administrative guidance on technical character definitions for computer-implemented inventions in Spain."]
core_points_en: New guidelines confirm that computer-implemented inventions are ineligible for utility model protection in Spain.
Law 24/2015 formally excludes software-related technical solutions from the scope of utility model rights.
Companies must adjust strategies by pursuing patent applications to ensure valid protection for software innovations.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Avoid utility model filings for software in Spain to prevent rejection; prioritize patent applications for stronger enforceability.
Practice note: Strengthen patent specifications by highlighting technical contributions and effects to satisfy eligibility requirements.
What to monitor: Administrative guidance on technical character definitions for computer-implemented inventions in Spain.

items.title: Sharp, three others beef up Access Advance’s video distribution pool
items.title_zh: 夏普等三家企业加入 Access Advance 视频分发专利池
items.title_en: Sharp and Three Others Join Access Advance Video Pool Amid FRAND White Paper Release
items.summary: Access Advance also shares white paper claiming that its pool for streamers offers FRAND rates, in likely effort to boost licensee interest in the year-old programme
items.ai_summary_zh: Access Advance 宣布夏普等三家新成员加入其视频分发专利池，旨在增强该成立一年的项目吸引力。同时，该组织发布白皮书，主张其针对流媒体服务的专利池提供符合公平、合理和非歧视（FRAND）原则的费率，试图以此提升潜在被许可人的参与意愿，缓解市场对该专利池定价合规性的疑虑。
items.ai_summary_en: Access Advance has announced the addition of Sharp and three other companies to its video distribution patent pool, a strategic move designed to enhance the appeal of the program established one year ago. Concurrently, the organization released a white paper asserting that its licensing rates for streaming services comply with Fair, Reasonable, and Non-Discriminatory (FRAND) principles. This publication aims to address market concerns regarding pricing compliance and stimulate interest among potential licensees. By reinforcing its commitment to fair licensing terms, Access Advance seeks to mitigate skepticism and encourage broader participation from rights holders and implementers alike in the evolving landscape of video technology standards.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国流媒体及终端企业应关注该专利池动态，评估其 FRAND 主张实质。建议提前研判入池必要性，利用白皮书内容作为谈判参考，防范潜在的许可费堆叠风险。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should closely monitor the expansion of the Access Advance pool and evaluate the substantive validity of its FRAND claims. The newly released white paper may serve as a critical reference point during licensing negotiations, offering arguments against excessive royalty demands. Companies should assess the necessity of joining the pool versus seeking individual licenses, while remaining vigilant about potential royalty stacking risks. Understanding the practical impact of this consolidation on overall licensing costs is essential for effective intellectual property strategy and budget planning in the video distribution sector.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["夏普等三家企业正式加入 Access Advance 视频专利池", "官方发布白皮书重申其流媒体费率符合 FRAND 原则", "此举意在通过强化合规叙事以提升被许可人兴趣"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Sharp and three additional entities have officially joined the Access Advance video distribution patent pool.", "The organization published a white paper reaffirming that its streaming service rates adhere to FRAND principles.", "This initiative aims to strengthen compliance narratives and increase licensee interest in the program."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注专利池扩容对许可费率的实际影响", "利用 FRAND 白皮书作为许可谈判的抗辩依据"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess the actual impact of pool expansion on aggregate licensing fees and operational costs.", "Practice note: Utilize the FRAND white paper as a defensive basis in licensing negotiations to challenge unreasonable rate proposals.", "What to monitor: Track further membership changes and any regulatory scrutiny regarding the pool's compliance with competition laws."]
core_points_en: Sharp and three additional entities have officially joined the Access Advance video distribution patent pool.
The organization published a white paper reaffirming that its streaming service rates adhere to FRAND principles.
This initiative aims to strengthen compliance narratives and increase licensee interest in the program.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Assess the actual impact of pool expansion on aggregate licensing fees and operational costs.
Practice note: Utilize the FRAND white paper as a defensive basis in licensing negotiations to challenge unreasonable rate proposals.
What to monitor: Track further membership changes and any regulatory scrutiny regarding the pool's compliance with competition laws.

items.title: Brussels LD, March 18, 2026, Procedural Order (R. 158 RoP)(II), UPC_CFI_1357/2025, UPC_CFI_629/2026
items.title_zh: UPC布鲁塞尔分庭就哥斯达黎加执行费用及担保金额作出程序令
items.title_en: UPC Brussels Local Division Orders Security for Costs Based on Claimant Financial Position
items.summary: The Brussels Local Division did not consider enforcement of a UPC costs order in Costa Rica to be unduly burdensome on the evidence presented...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC布鲁塞尔地方分庭在GC Aesthetics诉Establishment Labs案中作出程序令。法院认定被告未证明在哥斯达黎加执行费用命令构成“过度负担”。鉴于原告财务状况引发合理担忧，法院依据其自身而非集团情况，裁定60万欧元诉讼费用担保，该金额占可回收费用上限120万欧元的50%，并考量了反诉无效的可能成本。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Brussels Local Division issued a procedural order regarding security for costs in infringement proceedings between GC Aesthetics and Establishment Labs. The Court rejected arguments that enforcing a costs order in Costa Rica would be unduly burdensome, noting insufficient evidence on procedural duration. However, security of EUR 600,000 was ordered due to the claimant’s specific financial situation. The Court clarified that assessment focuses on the claimant entity rather than its corporate group. The amount represents fifty percent of the provisional recoverable costs ceiling, incorporating potential costs associated with a defensive counterclaim for revocation.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This order clarifies evidentiary standards for challenging cross-border costs enforcement and reinforces entity-specific financial assessments for security. It highlights judicial discretion in setting security amounts relative to provisional cost ceilings and defensive counterclaims, offering guidance for portfolio risk management in multi-jurisdictional UPC litigation.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法院认定被告未提供充分基准，证明在哥斯达黎加承认与执行费用命令属于“过度负担”", "因原告自身财务状况引发对费用回收的合理担忧，法院裁定需提供诉讼费用担保", "担保金额定为60万欧元，即可回收费用临时上限120万欧元的50%，并计入无效反诉成本"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Defendants failed to prove enforcement in Costa Rica was unduly burdensome without specific benchmarks.", "Security for costs assessed based on claimant entity finances, not non-party group companies.", "Court set security at EUR 600,000, accounting for defensive revocation counterclaim costs."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["跨境执行抗辩需提供具体比较基准，仅主张程序漫长不足以被认定为过度负担", "诉讼费用担保评估聚焦于原告独立实体的财务偿付能力，而非其所属集团背景", "法院行使裁量权设定担保比例时，会将防御性无效反诉的潜在成本纳入考量范围"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Courts prioritize the specific financial health of the litigating entity over broader group assets when determining security for costs obligations.", "Practice note: Arguments claiming foreign enforcement is unduly burdensome require concrete comparative benchmarks regarding procedural duration and complexity to succeed.", "What to monitor: How UPC divisions calibrate security percentages against provisional cost ceilings when defensive invalidity counterclaims are present in infringement actions."]
core_points_en: Defendants failed to prove enforcement in Costa Rica was unduly burdensome without specific benchmarks.
Security for costs assessed based on claimant entity finances, not non-party group companies.
Court set security at EUR 600,000, accounting for defensive revocation counterclaim costs.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Courts prioritize the specific financial health of the litigating entity over broader group assets when determining security for costs obligations.
Practice note: Arguments claiming foreign enforcement is unduly burdensome require concrete comparative benchmarks regarding procedural duration and complexity to succeed.
What to monitor: How UPC divisions calibrate security percentages against provisional cost ceilings when defensive invalidity counterclaims are present in infringement actions.

items.title: CoA, March 13, 2026, Order On Preliminary Objections Concerning International Jurisdiction, UPC_CoA_922/2025, UPC_CoA_923/2025, UPC_CoA_924/2025, UPC_CoA_925/2025
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院就国际管辖权初步异议作出裁定
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Limits International Jurisdiction Under Brussels Ia Regulation
items.summary: The Court of Appeal makes clear that, as a rule, the claimant must already set out in the Statement of claim the facts and legal arguments necessary to establish...
items.ai_summary_zh: UPC上诉法院裁定，原告必须在起诉书中列明确立UPC管辖权所需的事实和法律依据，后续提交的证据不能弥补管辖权诉辩的不足。法院指出，依据《布鲁塞尔条例Ia》第7(2)条，UPC管辖权仅限于UPC领土内的损害，不能延伸至瑞士、英国等非成员国。因原告未能证明资产联系，且UPC作为共同法院不能援引法国民法典第14条，法院撤销了一审对非UPC领土部分的管辖权认定。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal ruled that claimants must establish jurisdiction facts in the Statement of Claim, rejecting later-filed exhibits as curative. It held that Article 7(2) Brussels Ia limits jurisdiction to damage within UPC territory, excluding non-member states like Switzerland and the UK. The Court also clarified that the UPC cannot rely on French national jurisdiction rules, such as Article 14 of the Civil Code, and set aside first-instance orders accepting jurisdiction over infringements outside the UPC contracting states.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This order clarifies procedural strictness for establishing UPC international jurisdiction. Rights holders must ensure robust jurisdictional pleading at the outset, particularly when targeting non-UPC states. Reliance on national jurisdictional hooks is unavailable, reinforcing the need for precise territorial scope assessment in cross-border patent enforcement strategies within the European patent system.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["原告须在起诉书中列明确立UPC管辖权的事实与法律依据，后续证据无法补救", "依据《布鲁塞尔条例Ia》第7(2)条，UPC管辖权限于UPC领土内发生的损害", "UPC作为共同法院不能援引法国民法典第14条确立对非成员国的管辖权"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Claimants must plead all jurisdiction-establishing facts in the initial Statement of Claim.", "Article 7(2) Brussels Ia restricts UPC jurisdiction to damages occurring within UPC territory.", "The UPC cannot invoke French national law Article 14 to assert international jurisdiction."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["起诉书阶段必须完整呈现管辖权事实，依赖后续证据补充存在被驳回风险", "涉及非UPC成员国（如英、瑞）的侵权主张，需谨慎评估UPC管辖权的适用范围", "需持续观察UPC法院对《布鲁塞尔条例Ia》第71b(3)条在资产连接点上的具体适用标准"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Jurisdiction over non-UPC states like the UK or Switzerland cannot be assumed via Brussels Ia Article 7(2).", "Practice note: Draft Statements of Claim with complete jurisdictional facts; subsequent evidence cannot cure initial pleading deficiencies.", "What to monitor: Future application of Article 71b(3) Brussels Ia regarding asset-based jurisdiction connections within UPC territory."]
core_points_en: Claimants must plead all jurisdiction-establishing facts in the initial Statement of Claim.
Article 7(2) Brussels Ia restricts UPC jurisdiction to damages occurring within UPC territory.
The UPC cannot invoke French national law Article 14 to assert international jurisdiction.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Jurisdiction over non-UPC states like the UK or Switzerland cannot be assumed via Brussels Ia Article 7(2).
Practice note: Draft Statements of Claim with complete jurisdictional facts; subsequent evidence cannot cure initial pleading deficiencies.
What to monitor: Future application of Article 71b(3) Brussels Ia regarding asset-based jurisdiction connections within UPC territory.

items.title: CoA, March 16, 2026, Order Concerning Review Of An Ex Parte Order For Inspection, UPC_CoA_3/2026
items.title_zh: UPC上诉法院：单方检查令申请须全面披露关键事实
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal: Strict Disclosure Duties in Ex Parte Inspection Orders
items.summary: In ex parte inspection proceedings, the applicant must disclose all material facts relevant to the request, including those that may weigh against it...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉法院在Ecovacs诉Roborock案中裁定，单方检查令申请人必须披露所有相关重大事实，包括不利事实。因初审申请在必要性和比例性方面存在模糊和遗漏，且缺陷无法后续补正，法院维持撤销检查令的决定。合法性评估基于原始申请文件。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Court of Appeal upheld the revocation of an ex parte inspection order in Ecovacs v. Roborock, emphasizing the applicant’s duty under Rule 192.3 RoP to disclose all material facts, including those weighing against the request. The Court ruled that legality is assessed solely on the initial application; omissions regarding necessity and proportionality cannot be cured during review. Because the first-instance application was ambiguous about evidence availability and commercial presence, the order was revoked. This decision reinforces that ex parte proceedings require strict transparency, as the Court acts without hearing the defendant, making complete initial disclosure critical for maintaining provisional measures.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This ruling clarifies the high threshold for procedural integrity in UPC ex parte applications. Rights holders must ensure initial filings are comprehensive and balanced, as courts will not permit remedial submissions to fix foundational defects. Failure to address counter-indicative facts risks immediate loss of provisional measures, demanding rigorous internal review before filing.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["申请人须披露已知且影响命令授予、听证顺序及措施必要性的所有重大事实", "原始申请中的重大遗漏可导致检查令被撤销，且该缺陷不能在审查程序中补正", "单方命令的合法性必须基于最初提交的申请进行评估，不得依赖后续材料"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Applicants must disclose all material facts, including adverse information, under Rule 192.3 RoP.", "Legality of ex parte orders is assessed strictly on the original application, not subsequent filings.", "Material omissions regarding necessity or proportionality justify revocation and cannot be cured on review."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["单方程序中申请人负有严格的全盘披露义务，涵盖不利事实", "初始申请的事实完整性直接决定命令合法性，后续无法补救重大遗漏", "需持续观察UPC对“重大事实”界定及比例性审查的具体适用标准"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ex parte inspection requests face heightened scrutiny; incomplete disclosures risk immediate revocation of orders without opportunity for correction.", "Practice note: Draft initial applications with explicit attention to Rule 192.3 RoP, proactively addressing facts that might argue against necessity or proportionality.", "What to monitor: How UPC panels define 'material facts' in future reviews and whether this strict approach extends to other ex parte provisional measures."]
core_points_en: Applicants must disclose all material facts, including adverse information, under Rule 192.3 RoP.
Legality of ex parte orders is assessed strictly on the original application, not subsequent filings.
Material omissions regarding necessity or proportionality justify revocation and cannot be cured on review.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ex parte inspection requests face heightened scrutiny; incomplete disclosures risk immediate revocation of orders without opportunity for correction.
Practice note: Draft initial applications with explicit attention to Rule 192.3 RoP, proactively addressing facts that might argue against necessity or proportionality.
What to monitor: How UPC panels define 'material facts' in future reviews and whether this strict approach extends to other ex parte provisional measures.

items.title: Local Division Munich, March 11, 2026, Decision, UPC_CFI_63/2024, UPC_CFI_449/2024
items.title_zh: UPC 慕尼黑分部判决：侵权举证责任转移与禁止超范围修改
items.title_en: UPC Munich: Sample-Based Infringement Presumptions and Added Matter Revocation
items.summary: The claimant can exemplify infringement on a sample product. The burden then shifts to the defendant to specifically dispute why other listed products do not fall under this definition.
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院慕尼黑分部就 Network System Technologies 诉高通案作出判决。法院裁定原告可通过样品证明侵权，举证责任随后转移至被告；专利登记推定起诉资格。同时，因权利要求暗示原申请未披露的物理结构及功能主体变更，认定构成不可允许扩展而撤销专利。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court’s Local Division in Munich issued a significant judgment in Network System Technologies LLC v. Qualcomm Incorporated regarding European patent EP 1 552 669. The court established that claimants may exemplify infringement using a sample product, shifting the burden to defendants to specifically dispute why other listed products fall outside this definition. Registration in the patent register creates a rebuttable presumption of standing to sue, which mere disputes over purchase agreements cannot overturn. However, the patent was revoked for inadmissible extension under Article 123(2) EPC. The claims implied physical structures and functional attributions not unambiguously disclosed in the original application. Additionally, an order to produce evidence under Rule 190 RoP was rejected as the initial evidence was implausible, preventing fishing expeditions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧应诉需警惕样品举证的扩散效应，应针对性反驳非涉案产品。申请阶段需严格核对权利要求与支持文件，避免因措辞暗示未披露特征导致专利被无效。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision clarifies procedural burdens and substantive validity standards at the UPC. For rights holders, registering patents remains crucial for establishing standing, but sample-based infringement strategies require robust initial plausibility to avoid rejection of evidence orders. For alleged infringers, merely challenging title is ineffective without compelling facts; specific technical rebuttals against sample extrapolation are essential. Furthermore, the strict application of added matter rules highlights drafting risks. Practitioners must ensure claim language aligns precisely with original disclosures to prevent invalidity based on implied physical separations or functional shifts not explicitly supported by the application text.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["原告以样品 exemplify 侵权后，被告须具体反驳其他产品为何不侵权", "专利登记产生起诉资格的可反驳推定，仅质疑购买协议不足推翻", "权利要求暗示未披露物理结构或功能主体变更构成禁止超范围修改"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Claimants may exemplify infringement via a sample product, shifting the burden to defendants to specifically dispute non-infringement of other listed items.", "Patent register registration creates a rebuttable presumption of standing; disputing purchase agreement validity alone is insufficient to rebut this.", "Claims implying undisclosed physical structures or changing functional entities constitute inadmissible extensions, leading to patent revocation."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["应对样品举证策略，须具体论证列明产品为何不在侵权定义范围内", "撰写时避免使用暗示未披露结构或功能的词汇，防范无效风险"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Defendants must provide specific technical arguments to counter sample-based infringement presumptions rather than relying solely on procedural challenges.", "Practice note: Drafters should avoid claim terms implying physical structures or functional attributions not explicitly supported by the original disclosure to prevent Art. 123(2)…", "What to monitor: Courts' evolving interpretation of 'plausible evidence' for Rule 190 production orders to distinguish substantiated claims from fishing expeditions."]
core_points_en: Claimants may exemplify infringement via a sample product, shifting the burden to defendants to specifically dispute non-infringement of other listed items.
Patent register registration creates a rebuttable presumption of standing; disputing purchase agreement validity alone is insufficient to rebut this.
Claims implying undisclosed physical structures or changing functional entities constitute inadmissible extensions, leading to patent revocation.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Defendants must provide specific technical arguments to counter sample-based infringement presumptions rather than relying solely on procedural challenges.
Practice note: Drafters should avoid claim terms implying physical structures or functional attributions not explicitly supported by the original disclosure to prevent Art. 123(2)…
What to monitor: Courts' evolving interpretation of 'plausible evidence' for Rule 190 production orders to distinguish substantiated claims from fishing expeditions.

items.title: CD Milan, March 13, 2026, Order And Decision On Costs, UPC_CFI_722/2025
items.title_zh: 米兰分部裁定：EPO最终撤销后UPC诉讼无目的及费用分担
items.title_en: UPC Milan: EPO Final Revocation Renders Action Moot; High Costs Awarded
items.summary: The Milan Central Division held that, once the Opposition Division had revoked the patent in its entirety and that decision had become final because no appeal was filed...
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院米兰中央分部裁定，若欧洲专利局异议部已最终撤销专利且无上诉，UPC撤销诉讼即失去目的，应依程序规则第360条处置。尽管未实体审理，原告仍被视为胜诉方。法院驳回被告基于公平原则的费用抗辩，判定被告承担原告80%的代表费上限及部分诉讼费，强调UPC费用主要集中在前期书面阶段。
items.ai_summary_en: The UPC Milan Central Division disposed of a revocation action under Rule 360 RoP after the EPO Opposition Division finally revoked the patent. The Court held the action devoid of purpose, rejecting conditional disposal requests. Despite no merits decision, the claimant was deemed fully successful for costs purposes. The defendant bore the claimant’s reasonable costs, with the Court awarding 80% of the EUR 600,000 ceiling (EUR 480,000) plus fees. This reflects the front-loaded nature of UPC litigation costs, even when proceedings terminate early due to external finality.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This order clarifies that final EPO opposition decisions effectively terminate parallel UPC revocation proceedings. Rights holders should note that cost exposure remains significant even in mooted cases, as the Court recognizes substantial upfront legal investment. Conditional settlements involving non-enforcement undertakings may fall outside procedural rules for simple disposal.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO最终撤销专利后，UPC撤销诉讼因失去目的而依规则第360条处置", "原告被视为完全胜诉方，被告需承担合理且成比例的费用，公平抗辩被驳回", "鉴于费用前置特点，法院判给60万欧元上限的80%作为代表费，并退还部分诉讼费"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Final EPO revocation renders parallel UPC revocation actions moot under Rule 360 RoP.", "Claimant is considered fully successful for costs allocation despite lack of merits judgment.", "Court awarded 80% of cost ceiling, emphasizing front-loaded expenditure in written phase."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["EPO最终撤销决定具有终结UPC平行撤销诉讼的效力，无需等待UPC实体判决", "UPC费用分担遵循“前期高投入”逻辑，即使案件早期处置，胜诉方仍可获大部分费用补偿", "试图以非执行承诺作为处置条件的请求超出程序规则范围，不被法院支持"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Final EPO revocation automatically resolves parallel UPC actions, but cost liabilities remain substantial for the unsuccessful party.", "Practice note: Courts apply high cost recovery percentages in disposed cases due to the front-loaded nature of UPC written proceedings.", "What to monitor: Judicial treatment of conditional disposal requests and their compatibility with Rule 360 RoP in multi-jurisdictional disputes."]
core_points_en: Final EPO revocation renders parallel UPC revocation actions moot under Rule 360 RoP.
Claimant is considered fully successful for costs allocation despite lack of merits judgment.
Court awarded 80% of cost ceiling, emphasizing front-loaded expenditure in written phase.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Final EPO revocation automatically resolves parallel UPC actions, but cost liabilities remain substantial for the unsuccessful party.
Practice note: Courts apply high cost recovery percentages in disposed cases due to the front-loaded nature of UPC written proceedings.
What to monitor: Judicial treatment of conditional disposal requests and their compatibility with Rule 360 RoP in multi-jurisdictional disputes.

items.title: Demand for European patents in 2025 exceeded 200 000 for first time
items.title_zh: 2025年欧洲专利申请量首超20万件
items.title_en: EPO Reports Record 2025 Patent Filings Exceeding 200,000 with Strong Digital Growth
items.summary: EPO Technology Dashboard shows strong growth in demand for patents for digital and energy technologies. The US and Germany remain top countries of origin, while China enters top three for first time.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局数据显示，2025年专利申请量达201,974件，同比增长1.4%，首次突破20万件大关。数字与能源技术领域增长强劲，计算机技术居首，人工智能和量子技术增速显著。美国与德国为最大申请来源国，中国首次进入前三。统一专利 uptake 较高，尤其在欧洲专利权人和中小企业中。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) reported a record 201,974 patent applications in 2025, marking the first time annual filings surpassed the 200,000 threshold. This represents a 1.4% increase from the previous year, driven by robust demand in digital and energy technologies. Computer technology remained the leading field, significantly boosted by artificial intelligence and quantum innovations. The United States and Germany retained their positions as top countries of origin, while China entered the top three for the first time. Notably, uptake of the Unitary Patent system was high, particularly among European small and medium-sized enterprises seeking streamlined protection across participating states.
items.ai_insight_zh: 数据显示欧洲在AI、量子及半导体领域的创新活跃度提升，统一专利制度正加速市场整合。企业应关注数字与能源技术领域的竞争态势，以及中国申请人日益增长的国际布局力度，这反映了全球技术主权竞争的加剧。
items.ai_insight_en: The surge in filings within strategic sectors like AI, semiconductors, and green energy highlights Europe’s focus on tech sovereignty. Stakeholders should leverage the Unitary Patent system to optimize protection costs and enforcement efficiency across multiple jurisdictions. However, increased competition from Asian and US applicants necessitates robust high-value patent portfolios. Companies must align filing strategies with policy priorities to secure market position amidst evolving regulatory landscapes and intensifying global technological rivalry.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年EPO专利申请量创纪录达201,974件，同比增1.4%，首次超过20万件", "中国首次进入申请来源国前三，美国与德国保持前两位，欧洲本土申请微增", "统一专利制度 uptake 较高，计算机、数字通信及电池技术领域申请增长显著"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Total European patent applications reached a historic high of 201,974 in 2025, reflecting a 1.4% year-on-year growth.", "Computer technology led filings, with substantial increases in AI, digital communications including 6G, and quantum technologies.", "China entered the top three source countries for the first time, while battery technology drove significant growth in electrical machinery."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["欧洲在AI和量子技术等战略领域的专利申请份额增加，显示区域创新能力增强", "统一专利制度对中小企业和欧洲专利权人吸引力显现，有助于降低跨境保护成本", "需持续监测中国在数字通信和能源技术领域的申请增速，以评估全球竞争格局变化"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Leverage the Unitary Patent system to reduce validation and maintenance costs while enhancing enforcement capabilities across participating European states.", "Practice note: Prioritize high-quality patent drafting in AI, quantum, and battery technologies to strengthen competitive positioning against rising international filers.", "What to monitor: Track policy shifts regarding tech sovereignty and strategic sector investments that may influence examination practices and grant rates at the EPO."]
core_points_en: Total European patent applications reached a historic high of 201,974 in 2025, reflecting a 1.4% year-on-year growth.
Computer technology led filings, with substantial increases in AI, digital communications including 6G, and quantum technologies.
China entered the top three source countries for the first time, while battery technology drove significant growth in electrical machinery.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Leverage the Unitary Patent system to reduce validation and maintenance costs while enhancing enforcement capabilities across participating European states.
Practice note: Prioritize high-quality patent drafting in AI, quantum, and battery technologies to strengthen competitive positioning against rising international filers.
What to monitor: Track policy shifts regarding tech sovereignty and strategic sector investments that may influence examination practices and grant rates at the EPO.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-767/23 [Remling]
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院：终审法院拒绝初步裁决必须详述理由
items.title_en: CJEU: National Courts of Last Instance Must Reason Refusals to Refer
items.summary: A national court or tribunal of last instance must always give reasons for its refusal to refer questions to the Court of Justice for a preliminary ruling
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 Remling 案中裁定，成员国终审法院若拒绝向欧盟法院提请初步裁决，必须具体说明理由。即使国内法允许简易驳回上诉，法院仍需详细阐述为何符合无需裁决的三种例外情形（问题无关、已有判例或显而易见）。本案源于荷兰国务委员会处理摩洛哥公民居留许可案时未充分说明拒绝理由，法院强调此举对维护欧盟法律解释统一性至关重要。
items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-767/23 Remling, the Court of Justice ruled that national courts of last instance must always provide specific reasons when refusing to refer questions for a preliminary ruling. Even where domestic law permits summary dismissal of appeals, such courts must concretely explain why an exception to the obligation to refer applies: irrelevance, existing case law, or acte clair. The judgment addresses Dutch legislation allowing supreme courts to dismiss appeals with brief reasoning, emphasizing that procedural efficiency cannot override the fundamental duty to ensure uniform EU law interpretation. Lower court grounds may be adopted only if they clearly justify the refusal under these strict exceptions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类裁判口径给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment reinforces procedural safeguards for parties seeking clarification of EU law in final instances. It limits the ability of supreme courts to bypass referrals through summary decisions, ensuring transparency in the application of CILFIT criteria. For litigants, this provides a clearer basis to challenge refusals to refer, particularly in complex areas like immigration or trade where EU law interpretation is critical for consistent application across member states.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["终审法院拒绝初步裁决时必须具体说明适用例外的理由", "即便国内法允许简易裁判，也不能免除详述拒绝裁决理由的义务", "下级法院的理由可被采纳，但前提是其已清晰论证符合例外情形"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Courts of last instance must specifically state reasons for refusing preliminary references, regardless of domestic summary procedure rules.", "Refusals are valid only if the question is irrelevant, previously interpreted, or so obvious as to leave no reasonable doubt.", "Lower court reasoning may be adopted by supreme courts only if it explicitly justifies the refusal under established exceptions."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用新规要求终审法院详述理由，增加案件转询欧盟法院几率", "在涉欧诉讼中强化程序抗辩，确保欧盟法律解释的统一适用"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Parties in final appeal stages can demand concrete justification for non-referral, enhancing procedural fairness and legal certainty.", "Practice note: Counsel should scrutinize lower court judgments for adequate CILFIT analysis, as supreme courts may adopt these grounds for refusal.", "What to monitor: National implementations of this ruling may affect how supreme courts draft summary dismissals in future EU law disputes."]
core_points_en: Courts of last instance must specifically state reasons for refusing preliminary references, regardless of domestic summary procedure rules.
Refusals are valid only if the question is irrelevant, previously interpreted, or so obvious as to leave no reasonable doubt.
Lower court reasoning may be adopted by supreme courts only if it explicitly justifies the refusal under established exceptions.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Parties in final appeal stages can demand concrete justification for non-referral, enhancing procedural fairness and legal certainty.
Practice note: Counsel should scrutinize lower court judgments for adequate CILFIT analysis, as supreme courts may adopt these grounds for refusal.
What to monitor: National implementations of this ruling may affect how supreme courts draft summary dismissals in future EU law disputes.

items.title: Judgment of the Court in Case C-521/21 Rzecznik Praw Obywatelskich (Recusal of a judge of an ordinary court)
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定：法官任命瑕疵本身不足以认定其缺乏独立性
items.title_en: CJEU: Judicial Appointment Irregularities Alone Do Not Establish Lack of Independence
items.summary: Rule of law: an irregularity committed during the appointment of a judge is not in itself sufficient to find that that judge is not independent, since an overall assessment of all of the circumstances attending the appointment of that judge is necessary
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧盟法院在 C-521/21 号案件中裁定，法官任命过程中的不规则性本身不足以认定该法官缺乏独立性。法院强调需对任命背景进行整体评估，仅当瑕疵性质严重且共同导致外部干涉风险时，才构成回避理由。波兰司法改革引发的任命争议及救济缺失，单独或结合均不自动导致法官回避。
items.ai_summary_en: In Case C-521/21, the Court of Justice ruled that irregularities in a judge's appointment do not automatically render the judge non-independent. An overall assessment of all circumstances is required. The participation of Poland's reformed National Council of the Judiciary (KRS) and the lack of remedies for unsuccessful candidates are insufficient grounds for recusal alone. Recusal requires irregularities capable of creating a real risk of state interference or reasonable doubt regarding impartiality. National courts must review the lawfulness of appointments but cannot rely solely on structural reforms to disqualify judges without evidence of specific risks to independence.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中企涉诉时，利用波兰法官任命瑕疵申请回避的策略受限。需聚焦具体案件中的实质干涉证据，而非单纯依赖程序瑕疵，建议加强个案法律风险评估。
items.ai_insight_en: This judgment clarifies the threshold for challenging judicial independence in EU member states, particularly regarding systemic reforms. For litigants, it establishes that procedural defects in appointment mechanisms, such as those involving Poland's KRS, are insufficient for recusal without demonstrating specific risks of external interference. Parties seeking disqualification must focus on concrete evidence of compromised impartiality rather than relying solely on general arguments about institutional independence.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["任命瑕疵需整体评估，非自动导致法官缺乏独立性", "仅严重瑕疵致外部干涉风险时，方质疑法庭合法性", "波兰司法改革背景下的任命参与不足以免除法官履职"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Irregularities in judicial appointment procedures require an overall assessment of circumstances rather than automatic findings of non-independence.", "Participation of the reformed Polish KRS and lack of remedies for candidates do not individually justify judge recusal under EU law.", "Recusal requires irregularities creating a real risk of state interference or reasonable doubt regarding the judge's impartiality."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["申请法官回避需证明实质干涉风险，非仅凭程序瑕疵", "在波诉讼应强化个案独立性证据收集与法律论证"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Litigants in Poland and similar jurisdictions must provide specific evidence of interference risks to successfully challenge judicial independence.", "Practice note: Legal arguments for recusal should focus on the gravity and nature of specific irregularities affecting the individual judge's impartiality.", "What to monitor: Future CJEU applications of this 'overall assessment' standard to other member states undergoing judicial system reforms."]
core_points_en: Irregularities in judicial appointment procedures require an overall assessment of circumstances rather than automatic findings of non-independence.
Participation of the reformed Polish KRS and lack of remedies for candidates do not individually justify judge recusal under EU law.
Recusal requires irregularities creating a real risk of state interference or reasonable doubt regarding the judge's impartiality.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Litigants in Poland and similar jurisdictions must provide specific evidence of interference risks to successfully challenge judicial independence.
Practice note: Legal arguments for recusal should focus on the gravity and nature of specific irregularities affecting the individual judge's impartiality.
What to monitor: Future CJEU applications of this 'overall assessment' standard to other member states undergoing judicial system reforms.

items.title: Classement 2025 des demandes de brevets à l’OEB
items.title_zh: 2025年欧洲专利局专利申请排名
items.title_en: INPI Releases 2025 EPO Patent Filing Rankings and French Innovation Trends
items.summary: Classement 2025 des demandes de brevets à l’OEB sgurtler@inpi.fr 23 mars 2026 L’essentiel à retenir : La France reste le 2ᵉ pays d’origine en Europe pour les demandes de brevet européen, avec 10 932 en 2025 et se classe au 6ᵉ rang mondial ; Les transports demeurent le principal domaine d’innovation en France, devant l’informatique et les machines, appareils et énergie électriques ; Principaux demandeurs français : Valeo, Safran Group et le CEA Les innovateurs français recourent davantage au brev
items.ai_summary_zh: 法国国家工业产权局发布2025年欧洲专利局（EPO）专利申请排名。法国以10,932件申请量保持欧洲第二、全球第六。交通运输仍是法国主要创新领域，法雷奥、赛峰集团和原子能委员会为主要申请人。近三分之一的法国授权专利选择单一专利制度。
items.ai_summary_en: The French National Institute of Industrial Property (INPI) published the 2025 rankings for European patent applications filed at the EPO. France retained its position as the second-largest country of origin in Europe with 10,932 filings, ranking sixth globally. The transport sector remained the primary domain of innovation, followed by digital technology and electrical machinery. Key French applicants included Valeo, Safran Group, and the CEA. Notably, adoption of the Unitary Patent system increased among French innovators, who selected this route for nearly one-third of their patents granted in 2025. The data highlights stable filing volumes despite minor declines in several major jurisdictions.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，法国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The sustained uptake of the Unitary Patent by French rights holders signals growing confidence in the new framework. For international portfolios, this trend suggests a shifting baseline for validation strategies in Europe. Monitoring sector-specific leaders in transport and energy helps benchmark competitive intelligence against established European innovators.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["法国2025年向EPO提交10,932件专利申请，居欧洲第二、全球第六，同比微降0.4%", "交通运输为法国首要创新领域，法雷奥、赛峰集团和CEA是主要法国申请人", "法国创新者更倾向使用单一专利，2025年近三分之一的授权专利选择该制度"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["France filed 10,932 EPO applications in 2025, remaining second in Europe and sixth globally.", "Transportation leads French innovation sectors, with Valeo, Safran, and CEA as top applicants.", "Nearly one-third of French-granted patents in 2025 utilized the new Unitary Patent system."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["法国企业在交通运输领域的专利布局保持领先，主要申请人集中度高", "单一专利制度在法国申请人中渗透率显著提升，已达授权量的三分之一", "需持续观察主要国家在EPO的申请量增减及技术领域分布变化"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: High adoption of the Unitary Patent by French entities indicates maturing market acceptance and potential efficiency gains for multi-jurisdictional protection.", "Practice note: Transport and electrical engineering remain dominant fields for French filings, guiding where competitive landscaping efforts should be focused.", "What to monitor: Track year-over-year changes in Unitary Patent selection rates across other major EPO contracting states to assess broader systemic shifts."]
core_points_en: France filed 10,932 EPO applications in 2025, remaining second in Europe and sixth globally.
Transportation leads French innovation sectors, with Valeo, Safran, and CEA as top applicants.
Nearly one-third of French-granted patents in 2025 utilized the new Unitary Patent system.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: High adoption of the Unitary Patent by French entities indicates maturing market acceptance and potential efficiency gains for multi-jurisdictional protection.
Practice note: Transport and electrical engineering remain dominant fields for French filings, guiding where competitive landscaping efforts should be focused.
What to monitor: Track year-over-year changes in Unitary Patent selection rates across other major EPO contracting states to assess broader systemic shifts.

items.title: Merz and Uexküll prevail as Federal Court of Justice upholds fampridine patents
items.title_zh: 德联邦法院维持Merz法姆吡啶专利有效
items.title_en: German Federal Court of Justice Upholds Merz Fampridine Patents for Multiple Sclerosis Treatment
items.summary: Merz is owner of EP 2 377 536 and EP 1 732 548. Both cover “methods of using sustained release aminopyridine compositions” and relate to a dosing regimen for fampridine. This forms the basis of Fampyra, a drug which aims to improve walking ability in multiple sclerosis patients. Acorda originally filed both patents. Merz Therapeutics […] The post Merz and Uexküll prevail as Federal Court of Justice upholds fampridine patents appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国联邦最高法院裁定维持Merz拥有的两项欧洲专利（EP 2 377 536和EP 1 732 548）有效。这两项专利涵盖缓释氨基吡啶组合物的使用方法，涉及多发性硬化症药物Fampyra的剂量方案。Merz与Uexküll在此案中胜诉。
items.ai_summary_en: The German Federal Court of Justice (BGH) has issued a judgment upholding the validity of two European patents held by Merz, covering methods for using sustained-release aminopyridine compositions and specific dosing regimens for fampridine. These patents form the legal basis for Fampyra, a medication designed to improve walking ability in patients with multiple sclerosis. Although originally filed by Acorda, the rights are now owned by Merz Therapeutics. The court rejected challenges seeking invalidation, thereby confirming the stability of Merz’s patent rights and those of its partner Uexküll. This decision significantly impacts the market landscape for this key therapeutic agent, reinforcing the exclusivity surrounding its commercialization in Germany.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案确认了特定给药方案在欧洲专利体系下的可专利性与稳定性。需关注该判决对后续仿制药进入德国市场的影响，以及权利人是否据此寻求禁令救济。
items.ai_insight_en: For pharmaceutical companies operating in Europe, particularly those developing generics or improved new drugs, method-of-use patents representing dosing regimens pose significant barriers to entry. It is essential to conduct thorough freedom-to-operate analyses early in development to assess infringement risks associated with such patents. Companies should evaluate potential design-around strategies or consider licensing negotiations to mitigate litigation exposure. Failure to address these intellectual property hurdles may result in injunctions upon market entry, especially in jurisdictions like Germany where patent enforcement remains robust and protective of established therapeutic monopolies.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德国联邦最高法院 upheld Merz拥有的EP 2 377 536和EP 1 73…", "涉案专利涉及缓释氨基吡啶组合物使用方法及Fampyra药物剂量方案", "Merz Therapeutics与律所Uexküll在此次诉讼中取得胜诉结果"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The German Federal Court of Justice ruled that Merz's fampridine use patents remain valid and enforceable against challengers.", "The disputed patents cover the core dosing regimen for Fampyra, a critical treatment for improving mobility in multiple sclerosis patients.", "By dismissing invalidity requests, the court solidified the patent holder's exclusive position within this specific therapeutic market segment."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["给药方案类专利在德国司法实践中仍具较高稳定性，权利人维权基础稳固", "需监测Merz是否基于此生效判决在德国发起侵权诉讼或申请临时禁令", "观察该判例对同类神经系统药物专利确权标准的潜在参考意义"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Generics and biosimilar developers must rigorously screen for dosing regimen patents to avoid infringement liabilities in key European markets.", "Practice note: Conduct comprehensive freedom-to-operate analyses focusing on method-of-use claims and explore non-infringing alternatives or licensing options proactively.", "What to monitor: Monitor enforcement trends regarding second medical use patents in Germany, as courts continue to uphold strong protections for established therapeutic regimens."]
core_points_en: The German Federal Court of Justice ruled that Merz's fampridine use patents remain valid and enforceable against challengers.
The disputed patents cover the core dosing regimen for Fampyra, a critical treatment for improving mobility in multiple sclerosis patients.
By dismissing invalidity requests, the court solidified the patent holder's exclusive position within this specific therapeutic market segment.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Generics and biosimilar developers must rigorously screen for dosing regimen patents to avoid infringement liabilities in key European markets.
Practice note: Conduct comprehensive freedom-to-operate analyses focusing on method-of-use claims and explore non-infringing alternatives or licensing options proactively.
What to monitor: Monitor enforcement trends regarding second medical use patents in Germany, as courts continue to uphold strong protections for established therapeutic regimens.

items.title: Selective Presentation Of Content Of Varying Complexity: Non-technical
items.title_zh: 基于消费速率调整内容复杂度被认定为非技术特征
items.title_en: EPO Board Rules Content Complexity Adaptation Non-Technical Under Comvik Approach
items.summary: The application underlying the discussed decision concerns a method for selecting online content to present to users based on their content consumption behavior on a social media platform.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局上诉委员会在 T 1207/22 号案件中裁定，根据用户内容消费速率动态调整展示内容复杂度的方法属于非技术目标。尽管消费速率可客观测量，但该逻辑本身可由非技术人员构想，不具备技术性。不过，案件因涉及临时内容与静态内容处理的技术实现细节被发回重审。
items.ai_summary_en: In decision T 1207/22, EPO Technical Board of Appeal 3.5.01 assessed a method for selecting online content based on user consumption behavior. The Board held that adapting content complexity according to a user's content consumption rate constitutes a non-technical aim under the Comvik approach, as the underlying concept could be conceived by a non-technical person. Although the consumption rate is objectively measured via user inputs and elapsed time, this does not automatically confer technical character. However, the Board remitted the case for further examination regarding features distinguishing ephemeral from static content for rate calculation, noting these may involve non-obvious technical implementation considerations requiring further search and assessment.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧申请社交算法类专利时，应避免仅强调商业逻辑或用户体验优化。需深入挖掘底层数据处理、缓存机制等具体技术实现细节，以证明存在超越常规编程的技术贡献，规避被驳回风险。
items.ai_insight_en: This decision reinforces the strict application of the Comvik two-piece test to social media algorithms and user interface adaptations. Rights holders must distinguish between business-driven user experience optimizations and genuine technical solutions. While measuring user interaction speed is technical in execution, using that data to drive content selection logic is often viewed as administrative or psychological. Claims focusing solely on the adaptive presentation strategy face high rejection risks unless supported by specific, non-obvious technical processing steps.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["依据 Comvik 原则，适配内容复杂度属非技术目的", "即使基于客观数据，核心逻辑仍缺乏技术贡献", "临时内容处理的技术实现需进一步审查与检索"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Adapting content complexity based on consumption rate is a non-technical aim under Comvik, even with objective measurement.", "The core logic of adjusting presentation difficulty can be conceived by a non-technical person without technical contribution.", "Distinguishing ephemeral from static content for rate calculation involves potential technical implementation details warranting further examination."]

items.title: SACEPO Working Party on Rules reviews digitalisation, legal changes and accessibility measures
items.title_zh: SACEPO规则工作组审议数字化、法律变更及无障碍措施
items.title_en: EPO SACEPO Rules Working Party Reviews Digitalisation, Legal Changes and Accessibility
items.summary: The EPO hosted a lively SACEPO Working Party on Rules meeting on 12 March 2026. Key topics were digitalisation and simplification initiatives, the paperless PGP project, convergence of practice and upcoming fee adjustments.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年3月12日，欧洲专利局主持SACEPO规则工作组会议，重点讨论数字化简化举措、无纸化PGP项目及法律变更。会议更新了支持数字转型的倡议，包括为实现2027年4月1日前无纸化授权程序所需的EPC细则修正案。此外，还讨论了引入DOCX新申请格式、异议口审视频听证实时字幕功能，以及实践协调计划的第三周期工作进展。
items.ai_summary_en: The EPO hosted the SACEPO Working Party on Rules on 12 March 2026, focusing on digital transformation and procedural simplification. Key updates included final proposals for EPC Rule amendments to enable a paperless Patent Granting Process by April 2027, defining principles for digital-only communication. The Office also discussed the third basket of legal changes, featuring AI-supported claim translations and stricter substantiation requirements for auxiliary requests. Preparations for introducing DOCX as a new filing format in the second quarter of 2026 were reviewed. Additionally, the proposal to introduce live captioning for videoconference oral proceedings in opposition cases was positively received as a significant accessibility improvement.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: Practitioners should prepare for the transition to mandatory digital-only communications and the adoption of DOCX formats. The proposed requirements for substantiating auxiliary requests and indicating amendment bases signal a shift toward stricter procedural compliance. Monitoring the autumn consultation on AI-supported translations and these legal changes is essential for adapting prosecution strategies and ensuring seamless integration with the EPO’s evolving digital infrastructure.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO提出EPC细则修正案以支持2027年4月前实现无纸化授权程序，确立数字通信原则", "计划于2026年第二季度引入DOCX作为新申请格式，并讨论异议口审视频听证的实时字幕功能", "启动实践协调计划第三周期，新增六个议题，旨在提升专利授权流程的用户友好度及数字化服务利用"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EPO proposes EPC Rule amendments to enable paperless Patent Granting Process by April 2027.", "DOCX filing format introduction planned for second quarter 2026, with technical discussions ongoing.", "Live captioning for videoconference opposition proceedings proposed to enhance accessibility for hearing-impaired participants."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注2027年无纸化授权程序实施前的EPC细则最终修正案及例外情形规定", "监测DOCX新格式在2026年第二季度的具体技术指引及修改文件提交适配情况", "留意秋季会议关于AI辅助权利要求翻译及辅助请求 substantiation 要求的详…"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Enhanced accessibility via live captioning and streamlined digital processes aims to improve user experience and inclusivity in EPO proceedings.", "Practice note: Teams must adapt to upcoming DOCX filing standards and prepare for stricter substantiation requirements for auxiliary requests and amendment bases.", "What to monitor: Final EPC Rule amendments for the paperless process and details on AI-supported translations scheduled for autumn SACEPO consultation."]
core_points_en: EPO proposes EPC Rule amendments to enable paperless Patent Granting Process by April 2027.
DOCX filing format introduction planned for second quarter 2026, with technical discussions ongoing.
Live captioning for videoconference opposition proceedings proposed to enhance accessibility for hearing-impaired participants.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Enhanced accessibility via live captioning and streamlined digital processes aims to improve user experience and inclusivity in EPO proceedings.
Practice note: Teams must adapt to upcoming DOCX filing standards and prepare for stricter substantiation requirements for auxiliary requests and amendment bases.
What to monitor: Final EPC Rule amendments for the paperless process and details on AI-supported translations scheduled for autumn SACEPO consultation.

items.title_zh: 从公开网络到暗网：EUIPO培训法官和检察官掌握新技术
items.title_en: From the open web to the dark web: EUIPO trains judges and prosecutors on new technologies
items.source_name: 欧盟知识产权局商标资讯 (EUIPO)
items.summary: From the open web to the dark web: EUIPO trains judges and prosecutors on new technologies
items.ai_summary_zh: 标题显示，欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）正在为法官和检察官提供关于新技术的培训。该培训旨在帮助司法人员应对从公开网络到暗网的知识产权侵权挑战，提升其在数字环境下的执法能力。原文仅提供了标题及链接，未包含更多正文细节。

items.title: CJEU rules that derivative works enjoy copyright protection if they are … original
items.title_zh: 欧盟法院裁定：具备独创性的衍生作品受版权保护
items.title_en: CJEU Confirms Derivative Works Receive Copyright Protection in EU If They Are Original
items.summary: Article 2(3) of the Berne Convention mandates the copyright protection of derivative works like “translations, adaptations, arrangements of music and other alterations of a literary or artistic work” upon them being sufficiently original. It follows that, under international law, a derivative work enjoys copyright protection if it is sufficiently original.Does the same apply in EU copyright law?
items.ai_summary_zh: 标题显示欧盟法院作出裁决，确认若衍生作品具备充分独创性，则享有版权保护。原文摘要指出《伯尔尼公约》第2(3)条规定翻译、改编等衍生作品在具备充分独创性时受保护，并探讨该原则是否同样适用于欧盟版权法。因正文缺失，仅能确认法院确立了以“独创性”为核心的判断标准。
items.ai_summary_en: The Court of Justice of the European Union has issued a definitive ruling regarding the copyright status of derivative works under EU law. Aligning with the principles established in Article 2(3) of the Berne Convention, the Court confirmed that translations, adaptations, and other alterations of literary or artistic works enjoy independent copyright protection within the EU legal framework, provided they meet the threshold of sufficient originality. This judgment clarifies the consistency between international treaty obligations and internal EU copyright legislation. By establishing originality as the central criterion for protection, the decision eliminates potential legal divergences among Member States. It ensures that creators of derivative works receive uniform recognition and protection across the Union, reinforcing the harmonized application of copyright standards for adapted content.
items.ai_insight_zh: 需关注欧盟法院如何具体界定衍生作品的“独创性”门槛，以及该标准与成员国国内法的衔接。鉴于正文缺失，无法评估裁决对特定类型衍生作品（如AI生成内容或数据库）的具体影响，建议后续追踪判决全文以明确适用边界。
items.ai_insight_en: Entities operating within the EU must ensure that any localized content or secondary creations demonstrate sufficient originality to secure independent copyright protection. While securing these rights, it is critical to avoid infringing upon the underlying original works. Unauthorized adaptations may lead to significant litigation risks and liability. Therefore, comprehensive compliance reviews are essential before launching derivative projects. Stakeholders should verify that their creative inputs transform the source material sufficiently to meet the originality standard while simultaneously obtaining necessary licenses from original rightsholders to mitigate infringement exposure.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["标题显示欧盟法院裁定，衍生作品若具备充分独创性，即享有版权保护", "原文摘要提及《伯尔尼公约》要求对具备独创性的衍生作品给予版权保护", "原文摘要提出欧盟版权法是否适用相同原则的问题，暗示裁决对此予以肯定"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The CJEU confirms that derivative works are protected under EU law only if they possess sufficient originality.", "The ruling aligns EU copyright application with Berne Convention principles, ensuring consistent legal interpretation.", "Translations and adaptations qualify for independent copyright rights when they satisfy the originality requirement."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注欧盟法院对衍生作品“独创性”认定的具体司法标准", "观察该裁决对欧盟各成员国现有版权司法实践的统一化影响", "需获取判决全文以确认是否存在例外情形或特定限制条件"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Ensure derivative creations exhibit sufficient originality to qualify for independent copyright protection in the EU market.", "Practice note: Obtain explicit authorization from original copyright holders before commencing adaptation or localization activities.", "What to monitor: Monitor national implementations of this ruling to identify any residual discrepancies in how originality is assessed locally."]
core_points_en: The CJEU confirms that derivative works are protected under EU law only if they possess sufficient originality.
The ruling aligns EU copyright application with Berne Convention principles, ensuring consistent legal interpretation.
Translations and adaptations qualify for independent copyright rights when they satisfy the originality requirement.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Ensure derivative creations exhibit sufficient originality to qualify for independent copyright protection in the EU market.
Practice note: Obtain explicit authorization from original copyright holders before commencing adaptation or localization activities.
What to monitor: Monitor national implementations of this ruling to identify any residual discrepancies in how originality is assessed locally.
