items.title: Dispute between ParTec and Nvidia threatens to escalate after dismissal
items.title_zh: 驳回后ParTec与英伟达纠纷恐升级
items.title_en: UPC Dismisses ParTec’s Infringement Claim Against Nvidia, Escalation Risks Rise
items.summary: Today’s decision concerns one of three lawsuits filed by ParTec against the US chip giant at the Unified Patent Court. ParTec is backed by former IPCom founder Bernhard Frohwitter. ParTec claims infringement of EP 3 743 812 and sought an injunction requiring Nvidia to refrain from distributing essential products of its GPU product portfolio in […] The post Dispute between ParTec and Nvidia threatens to escalate after dismissal appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院就ParTec起诉英伟达的三起案件之一作出裁决。ParTec由前IPCom创始人支持，主张英伟达侵犯EP 3 743 812号专利，并寻求禁令以阻止其GPU产品分销。此次裁决涉及其中一起诉讼的驳回，局势可能进一步升级。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court has dismissed one of three infringement lawsuits filed by ParTec against US chipmaker Nvidia. Backed by former IPCom founder Bernhard Frohwitter, ParTec alleged that Nvidia violated European patent EP 3 743 812 and sought an injunction to halt the distribution of key products within Nvidia’s GPU portfolio. Although this specific claim was rejected, the outcome signals potential for further legal escalation between the parties. This development underscores the critical role of the UPC in enforcing patent rights within the semiconductor sector. It also highlights the significant litigation risks facing major technology companies operating in Europe, where patent enforcement actions can directly impact core product distributions and market access strategies.
items.ai_insight_zh: 需关注UPC对涉案专利侵权及禁令请求的后续审理动向。鉴于纠纷可能升级，应持续追踪剩余两起诉讼进展及法院对GPU产品专利有效性与侵权认定的司法态度。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants in the semiconductor and hardware sectors should closely monitor evolving UPC case law to assess potential infringement exposures across European jurisdictions. Conducting rigorous freedom-to-operate analyses prior to market entry is essential to mitigate legal uncertainties. Companies holding high-value patents or facing enforcement actions should proactively develop defensive patent portfolios and prepare licensing negotiation frameworks. These measures help avoid costly injunctions and ensure business continuity. Strategic preparation allows firms to navigate complex cross-border IP disputes effectively while maintaining stable operations in the European market.

The dispute centers on European patent EP 3 743 812, with the plaintiff seeking to block distribution of essential GPU hardware.
This litigation setback may prompt more aggressive legal strategies from the plaintiff, raising the risk of escalated conflict.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Semiconductor and hardware exporters must evaluate infringement risks under UPC jurisprudence before entering European markets.
Practice note: Conduct thorough freedom-to-operate analyses and establish defensive patent strategies or licensing plans early.
What to monitor: Track UPC decision trends in chip-related disputes to anticipate enforcement risks and adjust corporate IP strategies.

items.title: Qualcomm and Bardehle win semiconductor dispute with NST
items.title_zh: 高通与Bardehle赢得与NST的半导体专利纠纷
items.title_en: Qualcomm and Bardehle Prevail in Semiconductor Patent Dispute Against NST
items.summary: The judgments relate to three patents. In March 2024, US company Network System Technologies, which focuses on licensing, sued Qualcomm for infringement of EP 1 552 669 as well as EP 1 875 683 and EP 1 552 399. All patents relate to chip technology and cover methods for the transmission of signals in semiconductors. […] The post Qualcomm and Bardehle win semiconductor dispute with NST appeared first on JUVE Patent .
items.ai_summary_zh: 美国许可公司NST于2024年3月起诉高通侵犯三项欧洲专利（EP 1 552 669、EP 1 875 683、EP 1 552 399）。这些专利均涉及芯片技术及半导体信号传输方法。最新判决显示，高通及其代理律所Bardehle在该半导体纠纷中胜诉。
items.ai_summary_en: In March 2024, US-based licensing entity Network System Technologies (NST) initiated infringement proceedings against Qualcomm regarding three European patents: EP 1 552 669, EP 1 875 683, and EP 1 552 399. These patents specifically cover methods for signal transmission within semiconductor chip technologies. Recent judicial decisions have concluded that Qualcomm, represented by the law firm Bardehle, successfully defended against these claims. The court rulings effectively dismissed NST’s allegations of patent infringement, marking a significant victory for Qualcomm in this high-stakes dispute concerning advanced chip technology and intellectual property rights enforcement in Europe.
items.ai_insight_zh: 鉴于正文信息有限，仅能确认诉讼结果。需关注具体管辖法院及判决理由，以评估对同类半导体专利许可策略的影响。建议持续追踪该案后续上诉或关联诉讼动态。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should remain vigilant regarding non-practicing entities leveraging European patents to initiate infringement actions. Proactive freedom-to-operate analyses are essential before exporting products to Europe to mitigate risks associated with aggressive licensing demands. Strengthening internal patent portfolios provides strategic leverage against such entities. Companies must integrate robust IP risk management into their global expansion strategies, ensuring comprehensive due diligence is conducted to prevent potential litigation traps posed by specialized licensing firms targeting specific technology sectors.

items.title: Action en nullité d’une marque de l’Union : l’arrêt GEOGRAPHICAL NORWAY EXPEDITION du 11 mars 2026
items.title_zh: 欧盟商标无效诉讼：地理挪威探险案判决
items.title_en: EU General Court Ruling on GEOGRAPHICAL NORWAY EXPEDITION: Methodological Approach to Bad Faith and Invalidity
items.summary: Un contentieux emblématique Le 11 mars 2026, le Tribunal de l’Union européenne a rendu un arrêt méthodologiquement remarquable dans le cadre d’un long contentieux opposant une société française et une société italienne autour de la marque GEOGRAPHICAL NORWAY EXPEDITION. Cette décision s’inscrit dans une série de procédures devant l’EUIPO et le Tribunal, illustrant la complexité… Lire la suite Action en nullité d’une marque de l’Union : l’arrêt GEOGRAPHICAL NORWAY EXPEDITION du 11 mars 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月 11 日，欧盟普通法院就法国与意大利公司间关于'GEOGRAPHICAL NORWAY EXPEDITION'商标的长期纠纷作出判决。该案历经 EUIPO 及法院多轮程序，法院在判决中展示了严谨的方法论，针对欧盟商标无效申请中的关键争议点进行了裁决，凸显了此类跨国商标确权案件的复杂性。
items.ai_summary_en: On March 11, 2026, the General Court of the European Union delivered a significant judgment in a long-standing dispute between French and Italian companies concerning the EU trademark 'GEOGRAPHICAL NORWAY EXPEDITION'. This decision is part of an extensive series of proceedings before the EUIPO and the Courts, highlighting the procedural and substantive complexities inherent in cross-border trademark litigation. The Court’s ruling provides a methodologically rigorous analysis of key legal issues surrounding invalidity actions, particularly regarding bad faith and distinctiveness. It serves as a critical reference point for understanding how EU institutions adjudicate conflicts involving geographical terms and establishes important precedents for future challenges to registered trademarks based on similar grounds.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局含地理名称商标时，需警惕因缺乏显著性或误导公众被提无效。应提前评估地名使用风险，避免陷入类似法意企业的长期诉讼泥潭，确保品牌稳定性。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders seeking protection for marks containing geographical indications must conduct thorough due diligence regarding distinctiveness and potential misleading effects. Applications relying heavily on place names face heightened scrutiny for bad faith and lack of distinctive character. To mitigate risks of costly invalidity actions, applicants should secure robust evidence of acquired distinctiveness and legitimate commercial intent prior to registration. Proactive assessment of geographical term usage helps avoid prolonged litigation and ensures greater brand stability across the EU market.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["欧盟普通法院作出方法论严谨的商标无效判决", "解决法意两国企业间长期商标权属纠纷", "阐释欧盟商标无效诉讼程序的复杂性与要点"]

core_points_en: The General Court issued a methodologically rigorous judgment addressing complex legal arguments in a high-profile EU trademark invalidity case.
The ruling resolves a protracted ownership dispute between French and Italian entities, clarifying standards for assessing bad faith filings.
The decision elucidates the intricate procedural requirements and substantive criteria governing EU trademark invalidity litigation.

What to monitor: Evolving CJEU and General Court jurisprudence on the intersection of geographical terms, bad faith, and trademark validity.

items.title: EPO adopts cutting-edge AI solution developed in Europe
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局采用欧洲开发的先进AI解决方案
items.title_en: EPO Adopts Mistral AI OCR Solution to Enhance Patent Processing and European Digital Sovereignty
items.summary: EPO experts and Mistral AI’s technical teams have created a new solution, which integrates state-of-the-art optical character recognition (OCR) developed by Mistral AI into the EPO’s workflows.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）宣布与Mistral AI达成战略合作，共同开发并部署集成先进光学字符识别（OCR）技术的解决方案。该模型针对专利申请中复杂的公式、化学结构及多语言文档进行微调，显著提升了数据提取准确性。此举旨在加速欧洲创新，确保敏感专利信息在符合欧洲法律与伦理框架下处理，强化欧洲技术主权，并符合EPO 2028战略计划及AI政策。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) has announced a strategic collaboration with Mistral AI to deploy a specialized optical character recognition (OCR) solution within its workflows. This joint initiative addresses the complex challenge of processing multilingual patent documents containing formulas, chemical structures, and sequence listings. By integrating advanced AI technologies developed in Europe, the EPO significantly improves data extraction accuracy and content structuring for the patent granting process. The project underscores a commitment to European digital sovereignty, ensuring that sensitive patent information is handled in strict compliance with EU legal, operational, and ethical frameworks. This deployment aligns with the EPO’s AI Policy and Strategic Plan 2028, marking a decisive step toward robust digital transformation and enhanced service efficiency for global users.
items.ai_insight_zh: EPO引入本土AI技术优化审查流程，反映欧洲知识产权局对数据主权及合规性的重视。申请人应关注OCR精度提升对申请文件形式审查的影响，以及EPO在AI辅助审查中的伦理边界。此动向预示未来专利审查可能更依赖自动化预处理，需持续观察EPO AI政策的具体实施细节及对申请策略的潜在间接影响。
items.ai_insight_en: Applicants should anticipate more efficient processing of complex patent documents as the EPO integrates advanced OCR capabilities. Rights holders are advised to optimize application formatting to enhance machine readability, potentially accelerating examination timelines. Furthermore, stakeholders must remain vigilant regarding evolving EPO guidelines on AI-generated content and data sovereignty. Ensuring compliance with European ethical and legal standards when utilizing AI tools for patent preparation is increasingly critical. Monitoring these developments will help applicants align their strategies with the Office’s digital transformation trajectory and maintain robust compliance in the European jurisdiction.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO与Mistral AI合作，将定制OCR技术整合至工作流程，以处理复杂专利申请文档", "新模型针对公式、化学结构等难点优化，提升数据提取精度，助力专利审查效率", "项目强调欧洲技术主权，确保数据处理合规，符合EPO AI政策及2028战略规划"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EPO and Mistral AI co-developed a fine-tuned OCR model tailored to handle complex elements like chemical structures and formulas in patent applications.", "The solution is developed and deployed in Europe, ensuring sensitive data processing adheres to EU legal standards and ethical regulatory frameworks.", "This initiative supports the EPO’s Strategic Plan 2028 by leveraging AI to accelerate digital transformation and improve examination efficiency."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["EPO通过本土AI合作强化数据主权，审查流程数字化程度加深", "OCR技术升级可能提高对复杂格式申请文件的处理标准与效率", "需持续监测EPO AI政策落地情况及其对审查实践的具体操作指引"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Optimizing document formatting can leverage new OCR capabilities to improve machine reading accuracy and potentially speed up examination.", "Practice note: Ensure all AI-assisted patent preparation processes comply with EU data sovereignty laws and emerging ethical guidelines for AI usage.", "What to monitor: Watch for updated EPO guidance on AI-generated content and specific technical requirements for digital patent submissions."]
core_points_en: EPO and Mistral AI co-developed a fine-tuned OCR model tailored to handle complex elements like chemical structures and formulas in patent applications.
The solution is developed and deployed in Europe, ensuring sensitive data processing adheres to EU legal standards and ethical regulatory frameworks.
This initiative supports the EPO’s Strategic Plan 2028 by leveraging AI to accelerate digital transformation and improve examination efficiency.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Optimizing document formatting can leverage new OCR capabilities to improve machine reading accuracy and potentially speed up examination.
Practice note: Ensure all AI-assisted patent preparation processes comply with EU data sovereignty laws and emerging ethical guidelines for AI usage.
What to monitor: Watch for updated EPO guidance on AI-generated content and specific technical requirements for digital patent submissions.

items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局拟扩编知识产权犯罪部门并确认持续资助
items.title_en: UKIPO Confirms Funding for IP Crime Unit Until 2029 and Eyes Expansion
items.summary: Practitioners have welcomed extended funding of the specialist police unit until 2029, while the UKIPO says it is exploring increased scale
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局（UKIPO）确认将 specialist police unit（专业警察部门）的资金支持延长至2029年，业界对此表示欢迎。同时，UKIPO透露正在探索扩大该部门的规模。原文仅提供上述简短事实，未披露具体预算金额、扩编细节或执法重点变化。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has confirmed continued funding for the specialist police unit dedicated to intellectual property crime until 2029. This extension has been welcomed by legal practitioners and industry stakeholders. Concurrently, the UKIPO indicated it is exploring options to increase the scale of this enforcement body. The announcement signals sustained governmental support for anti-counterfeiting and anti-piracy efforts in the United Kingdom. However, specific details regarding budget allocations, operational expansion plans, or shifts in enforcement priorities were not disclosed in the initial report. The move underscores the ongoing importance of coordinated public-private efforts in combating IP infringement within the UK jurisdiction.
items.ai_insight_zh: 鉴于正文信息极简，仅能确认资金延续性与扩编意向。需持续观察后续官方发布的详细执行方案、人员编制变化及针对特定侵权类型的执法优先级调整，目前缺乏具体行动指引依据。
items.ai_insight_en: This confirmation provides stability for rights holders relying on criminal enforcement pathways in the UK. While the funding extension is positive, the lack of detailed expansion metrics suggests a phased approach. Companies should view this as a signal of continued state commitment to IP protection, though immediate changes in enforcement intensity may not be evident until further operational details are released by the UKIPO or relevant police authorities.

items.title: What’s changing – paper forms
items.title_zh: 英国知识产权局专利纸质表格变更说明
items.title_en: UKIPO Consolidates Patent Paper Forms and Phases Out Email Submissions from April 2026
items.summary: We’re continuing our work to modernise and simplify the way customers interact with the IPO. As part of this, we’re making a number of changes to our patent paper forms.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局宣布自2026年4月1日起调整专利纸质表格。主要变化包括推出合并表格取代原有的Form 1、7、9A和10，涵盖申请、发明人信息、检索及审查请求。同时逐步淘汰电子邮件提交方式，转向在线账户或邮政提交，以配合数字化服务转型。商标和设计表格暂不受影响。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office will implement changes to patent paper forms effective 1 April 2026, coinciding with fee updates. A new combined form replaces Forms 1, 7, 9A, and 10, integrating applications, inventorship details, search requests, and examination requests. Users may complete only relevant sections, mirroring the digital One IPO account process. The IPO is phasing out email as a standard submission channel for patents, directing users to online uploads or postal services instead. Paper forms remain available for accessibility and legislative compliance but will feature covers signposting digital alternatives. These changes apply exclusively to patents; trade mark and design submissions continue via email without modification.
items.ai_insight_zh: 此次调整旨在简化交互并推动数字化，纸质表格仍保留以满足无障碍及法律要求。实务中需注意2026年4月后的提交渠道变化，特别是电子邮件不再作为标准提交方式，需提前适应在线账户操作或邮政流程。
items.ai_insight_en: This update reinforces the UKIPO’s channel-shift strategy, prioritizing digital interactions while maintaining paper options for legal compliance. For international counsel and IP teams, the elimination of email as a standard patent submission route requires procedural adjustments. Practitioners must ensure staff are trained on the new combined form structure and the One IPO account upload mechanisms. While trade mark and design practices remain unaffected for now, this move signals a broader trend toward digitized administrative workflows. Monitoring the specific transition timeline for email discontinuation is essential to avoid processing delays or formalities objections during the switchover period.

items.title: Via video licensors kept in the dark about pool sale; Access Advance seeking support for merged offering
items.title_zh: 视频许可人对专利池出售不知情，Access Advance 寻求支持合并方案
items.title_en: Access Advance Seeks Licensors' Support for Merged Pool Amid Transparency Concerns
items.summary: EXCLUSIVE: Access Advance CEO Peter Moller tells IAM he is now “actively engaging with licensors” to persuade them of the benefits of a combined pool
items.ai_summary_zh: Access Advance 首席执行官透露正积极游说许可人支持其合并许可池方案。此前，部分视频技术许可人对另一专利池的出售交易毫不知情，引发透明度担忧。该动态反映了欧洲 SEP 许可市场的整合趋势及潜在的反垄断合规风险，旨在通过合并提升许可效率并应对复杂的全球许可环境。
items.ai_summary_en: Access Advance CEO Peter Moller confirmed that the organization is actively engaging with video technology licensors to secure support for a proposed merger of patent pools. This strategic push follows revelations that certain licensors were unaware of prior pool sale transactions, raising significant concerns regarding transparency and due process within the standard-essential patent licensing ecosystem. The development highlights an ongoing consolidation trend in the European SEP market, driven by efforts to streamline licensing efficiency and navigate complex global regulatory environments. However, this integration also introduces potential antitrust compliance risks. Stakeholders are closely watching how these structural changes impact market dynamics, particularly concerning the balance between operational efficiency and the preservation of competitive fairness and information symmetry in negotiations.
items.ai_insight_zh: 在欧中国科技企业应密切关注专利池合并对许可费率及 FRAND 合规的影响。建议企业评估新许可架构风险，积极参与许可人沟通，避免因信息不对称陷入被动，同时预留反垄断抗辩空间以维护自身合法权益。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should closely monitor the progress of patent pool mergers to assess their specific impact on future royalty rate structures and overall FRAND compliance costs. Proactive engagement in licensor communication channels is essential to prevent weakened negotiating positions caused by information asymmetry. Companies must evaluate the risks associated with new licensing architectures and maintain sufficient space for potential antitrust defenses to protect their legitimate interests. Ensuring transparency in these consolidated offerings is critical for maintaining fair competition and avoiding passive disadvantage in subsequent licensing negotiations.

items.title: European Patent Office meets with German Association for Intellectual Property Law
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局与德国知识产权法协会举行双边会谈
items.title_en: EPO and GRUR Discuss Quality Plan, Unitary Patent System, and Strategic Foresight
items.summary: EPO-GRUR bilateral meeting on 2 March 2026: Recent developments, quality, unitary patent system and the Observatory were among topics discussed.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年3月2日，欧洲专利局（EPO）在慕尼黑与德国知识产权法协会（GRUR）举行双边会谈。双方讨论了EPO《2026年质量行动计划》、统一专利（UP）及统一专利法院（UPC）的最新进展，以及EPO专利与技术观察局的战略前瞻工作。GRUR肯定了EPO的服务质量及UP系统的成功，双方同意继续加强合作以提升单一市场技术主权。
items.ai_summary_en: On 2 March 2026, the European Patent Office hosted a bilateral meeting with the German Association for Intellectual Property Law (GRUR) in Munich. Led by EPO Vice-President Christoph Ernst and GRUR President Dr Anke Nordemann-Schiffel, discussions focused on the EPO’s Quality Action Plan 2026, emphasizing examiner training and AI-driven digital transformation. The parties reviewed the operational success of the Unitary Patent system and the Unified Patent Court, aligning with broader EU goals for technological sovereignty. GRUR representatives commended the EPO’s service quality and reliability. The dialogue also covered strategic foresight initiatives, reinforcing the commitment to structured user engagement and continued cooperation on key developments within the European patent landscape.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This dialogue underscores the EPO’s prioritization of quality consistency and digital integration amid the maturing Unitary Patent system. For practitioners, the explicit endorsement of AI tools suggests evolving examination workflows that may impact response strategies. The strong alignment between the EPO and major user associations like GRUR signals stable procedural expectations, while the focus on strategic foresight indicates long-term policy adjustments based on emerging technology trends.

items.title: DPMA-Jahresstatistik 2025: Zahl der Erfindungen deutlich gestiegen
items.title_zh: DPMA 2025年报：发明数量显著增长
items.title_en: DPMA 2025 Statistics: Patent Filings Rise as Trademark Demand Surges
items.summary: DPMA-Jahresstatistik 2025: Zahl der Erfindungen deutlich gestiegen - Innovationstätigkeit in Digitaltechnologien und bei Elektromobilität legt massiv zu – Automobilindustrie weiter anmeldestärkste Branche – Nachfrage nach Markenschutz boomt unter anderem durch chinesische Anmelder und Online-Plattformen – DPMA-Präsidentin: Gutes Zeichen, dass der Schutz geistigen Eigentums für die Unternehmen weiter hohe Priorität hat - Im Video: Deutlich mehr Patent- und Markenanmeldungen - Innovationstreiber:
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国专利商标局（DPMA）发布2025年年度统计，显示知识产权保护需求显著增加。专利申请量增长4.7%至62,050件，国内申请人贡献突出；商标注册量激增19.8%至96,328件，受中国申请人及电商平台推动。机械工程仍为最大申请领域，数字技术与电动出行创新活跃。DPMA强调知识产权对经济竞争力的战略意义。
items.ai_summary_en: The German Patent and Trade Mark Office (DPMA) reported significant growth in intellectual property filings for 2025. Patent applications increased by 4.7 percent to 62,050, driven primarily by domestic applicants, whose submissions rose by 5.6 percent. Trademark applications surged by 19.8 percent to 96,328, while utility model filings grew by 19.3 percent. The automotive industry remained the strongest filing sector, with notable innovation activity in digital technologies and electromobility. DPMA President Eva Schewior highlighted that the sustained priority placed on IP protection by companies, particularly during economic challenges, signals strong strategic commitment to innovation and competitiveness within the German market.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，德国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: The divergence between steady patent growth and sharp trademark increases suggests heightened brand protection needs alongside consistent R&D output. For rights holders, the DPMA’s improved processing efficiency, particularly in trademarks, offers faster registration timelines. Companies should monitor sector-specific trends in electromobility and digital tech to align portfolio strategies with current innovation hotspots in the German market.

Practice note: Trademark processing times may improve as DPMA completed significantly more examination procedures in this category.
What to monitor: Continued influence of e-commerce platforms and international applicants on German trademark filing volumes.

items.title: UKIPO extends funding for specialist IP crime unit as counterfeit risks grow
items.title_zh: 假冒风险加剧，UKIPO延长IP犯罪部门资金至2029年
items.title_en: UKIPO Extends Funding for Specialist IP Crime Unit Until 2029
items.summary: UKIPO extends funding for specialist IP crime unit as counterfeit risks grow
items.ai_summary_zh: 随着假冒风险增加，英国政府将支持位于伦敦的知识产权犯罪部门直至2029年。与此同时，欧盟知识产权局（EUIPO）及欧洲当局也在加强 efforts 以打击不安全的假冒产品。原文大部分内容为付费墙提示，仅标题和导语提供实质信息。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK government has extended funding for the London-based Intellectual Property Crime Unit until 2029. This decision comes as counterfeit risks grow and aligns with intensified efforts by the European Union Intellectual Property Office and other European authorities to tackle unsafe counterfeit goods. The extension ensures continued financial support for the specialist unit dedicated to combating IP crime. While detailed operational specifics are behind a paywall, the move signals a sustained commitment from UK authorities to maintain enforcement capabilities against counterfeiting. This development occurs alongside broader European initiatives to strengthen cross-border cooperation and enhance the safety of consumer goods by targeting illicit trade networks more effectively.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类政策更新给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This funding extension provides stability for UK-based IP enforcement operations, signaling consistent resource allocation for anti-counterfeiting efforts. For rights holders, it suggests maintained capacity for criminal referrals and investigations within the UK market. The parallel emphasis on EUIPO activities indicates a coordinated European approach to tackling unsafe goods, which may facilitate smoother cross-border enforcement actions for brands operating in both jurisdictions.

items.title: Court of Appeal refuses additional written round
items.title_zh: 上诉法院拒绝增加书面陈述轮次
items.title_en: UPC Court of Appeal Refuses Additional Written Round in Sibio v Abbott
items.summary: Sibio Technology v Abbott Diabetes Care – Court of Appeal, 27 February 2026 (UPC_CoA_884/2025)
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院上诉法院在Sibio诉Abbott案中，驳回上诉人要求增加书面陈述轮次的请求。法院认定，一审已受理的辅助请求自动构成上诉程序一部分，无需重新提交。被上诉人维持一审结果不构成交叉上诉，仅依赖既有请求不触发额外书面辩论权利，且未侵犯听证权。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court Court of Appeal rejected Sibio Technology’s request for an additional written pleading round in its appeal against Abbott Diabetes Care. Sibio argued that further submissions were necessary because Abbott relied on auxiliary requests not addressed by the first-instance court, which had upheld the patent as granted. The Court clarified that auxiliary requests admitted at first instance automatically form part of the appeal proceedings under Rules 222.1 and 222.2 RoP, without requiring re-filing. It ruled that maintaining these requests does not constitute a conditional cross-appeal triggering extra pleadings under Rule 36 RoP. The Court emphasized that procedural convenience alone does not justify additional rounds and confirmed that the right to be heard was respected through prior opportunities to address the requests.
items.ai_insight_zh: 本案明确UPC上诉程序中辅助请求的延续性规则，澄清“交叉上诉”的认定边界。实务中需注意，若对方仅维持一审有利判决并依赖既有辅助请求，通常无法主张额外书面答辩机会，应重点准备口头听证环节以应对相关技术或法律争点。
items.ai_insight_en: This order clarifies procedural efficiency in UPC appeals, confirming that parties cannot demand extra written rounds merely because auxiliary requests from first instance remain active. Rights holders should anticipate that appeals will focus on existing records rather than new pleading exchanges, emphasizing preparation for oral hearings over expecting extended written debate phases for established defensive positions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["一审已受理的辅助请求自动纳入上诉程序，当事人无需在上诉阶段重新提交", "被上诉人仅维持一审结果而依赖辅助请求，不构成交叉上诉，无权触发额外书面轮次", "上诉法院依据程序规则驳回增加书面陈述请求，强调口头听证足以保障当事人听证权"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Auxiliary requests admitted at first instance automatically continue into appeal proceedings without need for re-filing by respondent.", "Maintaining previously filed auxiliary requests does not constitute a cross-appeal triggering rights to additional written pleadings.", "Procedural timetable convenience is insufficient justification for extra written rounds when right to be heard is already satisfied."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["明确一审辅助请求在上诉中的自动延续效力，减少重复提交程序负担", "界定维持原判情形下不构成交叉上诉，限制额外书面陈述的程序滥用", "后续需关注UPC上诉法院在类似程序性争议中对听证权保障的裁量标准"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Appeals will proceed based on the first-instance record, reducing expectations for prolonged written exchanges when auxiliary requests are maintained.", "Practice note: Do not assume a right to additional pleadings if opposing counsel relies on auxiliary requests already admitted and addressed in earlier proceedings.", "What to monitor: Future Court of Appeal decisions on whether similar procedural refusals apply when auxiliary requests involve complex new technical arguments."]
core_points_en: Auxiliary requests admitted at first instance automatically continue into appeal proceedings without need for re-filing by respondent.
Maintaining previously filed auxiliary requests does not constitute a cross-appeal triggering rights to additional written pleadings.
Procedural timetable convenience is insufficient justification for extra written rounds when right to be heard is already satisfied.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Appeals will proceed based on the first-instance record, reducing expectations for prolonged written exchanges when auxiliary requests are maintained.
Practice note: Do not assume a right to additional pleadings if opposing counsel relies on auxiliary requests already admitted and addressed in earlier proceedings.
What to monitor: Future Court of Appeal decisions on whether similar procedural refusals apply when auxiliary requests involve complex new technical arguments.

items.title: Axel Voss’ Good Intention – The European Parliament adopts report to recalibrate EU copyright for Generative AI
items.title_zh: 欧盟议会通过报告调整生成式AI版权规则
items.title_en: European Parliament Adopts Report to Recalibrate EU Copyright Rules for Generative AI
items.ai_summary_zh: 3月10日，欧盟议会通过法律事务委员会提交的关于版权与生成式人工智能的报告。报告敦促欧盟委员会启动立法，以应对生成式AI带来的机遇与挑战。核心主张包括尊重知识产权基本权利，补充现有规则以确保版权材料高效许可，并为科学研究等非商业用途保留自由使用空间，但强调后续商业化需获得授权及报酬。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Parliament’s Committee on Legal Affairs adopted a report urging the European Commission to legislate on generative AI copyright challenges. The document emphasizes respecting intellectual property rights during AI development and proposes voluntary licensing mechanisms to address training data authorization issues. It preserves exceptions for scientific research, education, and non-commercial innovation. Notably, the press and news media sector receives specific protection due to its democratic importance. The report suggests expanding neighboring rights to cover new AI usage scenarios, such as reasoning and retrieval-augmented generation, ensuring stronger exclusive control for publishers against potential harms from aggregated information services.
items.ai_insight_zh: 该报告反映了欧盟在平衡AI创新与版权保护间的政策倾向，特别是针对新闻出版业的特殊保护及自愿许可框架的构建。从业者应密切关注欧盟委员会后续立法提案，尤其是关于训练数据许可透明度及商业化授权义务的具体规定，这将直接影响AI模型开发合规成本。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants deploying generative AI models should anticipate higher compliance costs regarding training data authorization within the EU. The proposed shift towards voluntary licensing and enhanced transparency requirements signals a stricter regulatory environment for content ingestion. Rights holders in the news and publishing sectors may gain stronger leverage through expanded neighboring rights. Companies should proactively assess their data sourcing strategies, considering both the preserved exceptions for research and the anticipated rigorous consent requirements for commercial use of protected works.

items.ai_core_points_en: ["Calls for EU legislation balancing generative AI technological development with robust copyright protection standards.", "Advocates establishing voluntary licensing frameworks while strengthening transparency obligations for rights holders.", "Grants exemptions to the press sector and proposes extending neighboring rights to cover novel AI application methods."]

items.title: Research: UK design protection review with policy considerations

items.title_en: UKIPO Publishes Review of Design Protection Usage and Policy Considerations
items.summary: This report looks at how design protection in the UK is being used and makes suggestions for potential reform.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布报告，审视英国外观设计保护制度的使用现状，并针对潜在改革提出政策建议。报告旨在评估现行保护机制的有效性，为未来法律或政策调整提供依据。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has released a report examining the current utilization of design protection mechanisms within the United Kingdom. The publication assesses how existing rights are being applied in practice and outlines suggestions for potential reforms to the framework. This policy update aims to evaluate the effectiveness of current protections and provide a basis for future legal or administrative adjustments. Rights holders and practitioners should note that this document serves as an initial review of the system's operation, highlighting areas where changes may be considered to better align protection with market needs.
items.ai_insight_zh: 鉴于正文信息有限，仅能确认UKIPO启动了对外观设计保护体系的审查并提出改革建议。需持续关注后续发布的完整报告内容，以了解具体的改革方向及对权利人的影响。
items.ai_insight_en: This review signals the UKIPO's intent to scrutinize the efficacy of current design laws. For international rights holders, it indicates a period of potential regulatory evolution. Stakeholders should track subsequent consultations to understand how proposed changes might impact registration standards or enforcement scopes in the UK jurisdiction.

items.title: Honor joins Via’s AAC patent pool
items.title_zh: 荣耀加入 Via AAC 专利池以规避诉讼风险
items.title_en: Honor Joins Via Licensing AAC Patent Pool to Secure Global Audio Codec Compliance
items.summary: China’s top-5 smartphone company takes a litigation-free path to Via’s audio codec licence
items.ai_summary_zh: 中国头部智能手机厂商荣耀正式加入 Via Licensing 管理的 AAC 音频编码专利池。此举标志着荣耀选择通过商业许可而非诉讼对抗的方式，解决其在欧洲及全球市场的音频技术知识产权合规问题，体现了行业对无诉讼许可路径的偏好。
items.ai_summary_en: Honor, a leading global smartphone manufacturer, has officially joined the AAC audio codec patent pool administered by Via Licensing. This strategic move allows the company to secure necessary intellectual property rights for its devices through a streamlined commercial licensing framework rather than engaging in protracted litigation. By adopting this collaborative approach, Honor addresses potential IP compliance challenges across European and international markets. The decision highlights a growing industry preference for resolving standard-essential patent disputes via efficient licensing mechanisms. It underscores the importance of proactive IP management for technology firms operating globally, ensuring uninterrupted market access while minimizing legal risks associated with audio codec technologies.
items.ai_insight_zh: 建议中国出海企业优先评估加入国际专利池的性价比，以低成本规避欧洲高额诉讼风险。同时应建立 SEP 预警机制，将许可谈判前置化，确保产品在欧洲市场顺畅流通。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should evaluate the cost-effectiveness of joining international patent pools as a primary strategy to mitigate high litigation risks in Europe. Establishing robust SEP early-warning systems is critical for anticipating licensing obligations. Companies must prioritize intellectual property compliance as a fundamental prerequisite for market entry. Integrating license negotiations into early product development cycles ensures smoother distribution channels. This proactive stance helps avoid disruptive legal conflicts and supports sustainable business operations within complex regulatory environments like the EU.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["荣耀加入 Via 专利池实现 AAC 技术合规授权", "采取无诉讼策略降低海外市场法律不确定性", "反映中国手机厂商在欧洲 SEP 许可上的成熟化"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Honor secures comprehensive AAC technology authorization by joining the Via Licensing patent pool.", "The company adopts a non-litigation strategy to reduce legal uncertainties in overseas markets.", "This move reflects the increasing maturity of smartphone manufacturers regarding SEP licensing practices."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["利用专利池机制降低单一谈判成本与诉讼风险", "将知识产权合规作为欧洲市场准入的前置条件"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Utilize patent pool mechanisms to significantly lower single-negotiation costs and minimize litigation exposure.", "Practice note: Treat intellectual property compliance as a mandatory precondition for successful European market access.", "What to monitor: Track the adoption rates of major tech firms joining standardized patent pools to gauge industry trends."]

The company adopts a non-litigation strategy to reduce legal uncertainties in overseas markets.

items.title: Amazon-InterDigital dispute and landmark CJEU referral put UPC jurisdiction in focus
items.title_zh: 亚马逊与 InterDigital 纠纷及 CJEU 转介聚焦 UPC 管辖权
items.title_en: Amazon-InterDigital Dispute and CJEU Referral Focus Attention on UPC Jurisdiction
items.summary: A recent UK court ruling calls for clearer cross-court communication while the UPC asks Europe’s top court for clarity on the use of long-arm jurisdiction
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国法院近期裁决呼吁加强跨国司法沟通，与此同时，统一专利法院（UPC）就长臂管辖权的适用问题向欧盟法院（CJEU）寻求澄清。该动态源于亚马逊与 InterDigital 的标准必要专利争端，标志着 UPC 管辖范围面临关键法律测试，可能重塑欧洲 SEP 诉讼格局。
items.ai_summary_en: A recent ruling by a UK court has emphasized the urgent need for clearer communication mechanisms between national courts to enhance judicial efficiency in cross-border disputes. Concurrently, the Unified Patent Court (UPC) has submitted a landmark request for a preliminary ruling to the Court of Justice of the European Union (CJEU). This referral specifically seeks clarification on the application of long-arm jurisdiction within the UPC framework. These developments stem from the ongoing standard essential patent (SEP) litigation between Amazon and InterDigital. This high-profile dispute serves as a critical legal test for the boundaries of the UPC's authority. The outcome is expected to significantly influence the future landscape of SEP enforcement and licensing strategies across Europe, affecting how rights holders and implementers navigate multi-jurisdictional patent conflicts.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧遭遇 SEP 诉讼时，需高度关注 UPC 管辖权界定进展。建议提前评估长臂管辖风险，制定多国应诉策略，并利用 CJEU 裁决窗口期优化全球专利布局与许可谈判筹码。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants involved in European SEP litigation should closely monitor the evolving definition of UPC jurisdiction. It is prudent to assess potential exposure to long-arm jurisdiction claims early in any dispute lifecycle. Stakeholders should develop robust multi-country defense strategies that account for varying judicial interpretations across Europe. Furthermore, the period awaiting the CJEU's final decision offers a strategic window to optimize global patent portfolios and strengthen positions in licensing negotiations. Understanding these jurisdictional nuances is essential for effective risk management and maintaining leverage in complex international intellectual property conflicts.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国法院强调需明确跨国法院间的沟通机制以提升效率", "UPC 就长臂管辖权向 CJEU 提起具有里程碑意义的初步裁决请求", "亚马逊与 InterDigital 的纠纷成为检验 UPC 管辖边界的关键案例"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The UK court stressed the necessity of establishing clear communication protocols among transnational courts to improve procedural efficiency.", "The UPC filed a landmark preliminary ruling request with the CJEU regarding the specific scope and application of long-arm jurisdiction.", "The Amazon versus InterDigital case acts as a pivotal test case defining the operational limits of UPC jurisdiction."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["密切关注 CJEU 对 UPC 长臂管辖权的最终解释以规避诉讼风险", "结合英欧司法动态调整标准必要专利的全球许可与应对策略"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Monitor the CJEU's final interpretation of UPC long-arm jurisdiction to effectively mitigate litigation risks.", "Practice note: Adjust global SEP licensing and response strategies by integrating insights from both UK and EU judicial dynamics.", "What to monitor: Track procedural updates in the Amazon-InterDigital case and related UPC jurisdictional referrals."]
core_points_en: The UK court stressed the necessity of establishing clear communication protocols among transnational courts to improve procedural efficiency.
The UPC filed a landmark preliminary ruling request with the CJEU regarding the specific scope and application of long-arm jurisdiction.
The Amazon versus InterDigital case acts as a pivotal test case defining the operational limits of UPC jurisdiction.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Monitor the CJEU's final interpretation of UPC long-arm jurisdiction to effectively mitigate litigation risks.
Practice note: Adjust global SEP licensing and response strategies by integrating insights from both UK and EU judicial dynamics.
What to monitor: Track procedural updates in the Amazon-InterDigital case and related UPC jurisdictional referrals.

items.title: EPO meets with Novartis
items.title_zh: 欧洲专利局与诺华举行双边会议
items.title_en: EPO and Novartis Discuss Examination Timeliness and Centralised SPC System
items.summary: On 4 February, the European Patent Office (EPO) held an online meeting with the Swiss pharmaceutical and biotechnology company Novartis.
items.ai_summary_zh: 2026年2月4日，欧洲专利局与诺华举行在线会议，这是双方深化用户对话倡议以来的第110次双边会晤。诺华强调专利审查时效对投资决策至关重要，并对统一专利持谨慎积极态度，强烈支持由统一专利法院处理无效请求和上诉的集中式补充保护证书制度。双方还讨论了抗体相关专利申请审查指南的最新修订及公众咨询安排。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office held its fourth bilateral meeting of 2026 with Novartis, focusing on structured user dialogue. Novartis emphasized that timely patent examination is critical for investment decisions regarding new formulations and further medical uses. The company expressed cautious support for the Unitary Patent and strong backing for a centralised supplementary protection certificate system, preferably with Unified Patent Court jurisdiction for invalidity and appeals. Discussions also covered recent revisions to examination guidelines for antibody-related applications. The EPO highlighted the annual public consultation process for guideline updates, inviting stakeholder feedback before the April entry into force.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This dialogue underscores the industry's demand for procedural efficiency and legal certainty in Europe. Support for a centralised SPC system highlights ongoing efforts to streamline post-grant protections. Applicants should leverage public consultations to influence examination practices, particularly in complex biotechnology fields like antibodies, ensuring guidelines reflect practical prosecution realities.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["诺华强调专利审查时效性对新制剂及医疗用途投资决策具有关键影响", "诺华支持建立集中式补充保护证书制度，并由统一专利法院处理相关无效及上诉", "双方讨论了抗体相关专利申请审查指南修订，EPO提示年度公众咨询机会"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Novartis identified timely patent examination as crucial for investment planning in pharmaceuticals.", "The company supports a centralised SPC system with UPC handling for invalidity and appeals.", "Stakeholders discussed antibody examination guidelines and the EPO’s annual public consultation process."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["审查时效已成为药企研发投资规划的关键考量因素，需密切关注EPO流程效率变化", "行业头部企业对统一专利法院管辖下的集中式SPC制度表现出明确支持倾向", "需持续跟踪EPO在抗体等领域审查指南的年度修订及公众咨询反馈机制"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Examination speed directly impacts commercial planning for new formulations and medical uses.", "Practice note: Engage with the EPO’s annual public consultation to shape upcoming examination guidelines.", "What to monitor: Developments in the proposed centralised SPC system and its interaction with the UPC."]
core_points_en: Novartis identified timely patent examination as crucial for investment planning in pharmaceuticals.
The company supports a centralised SPC system with UPC handling for invalidity and appeals.
Stakeholders discussed antibody examination guidelines and the EPO’s annual public consultation process.

Practice note: Engage with the EPO’s annual public consultation to shape upcoming examination guidelines.
What to monitor: Developments in the proposed centralised SPC system and its interaction with the UPC.

items.title: International Patent Applications Rose in 2025, with Digital Communication and Semiconductor Technologies Showing Strong Growth
items.title_zh: 2025 年国际专利申请微增，数字通信与半导体增长强劲
items.title_en: WIPO Reports 2025 PCT Growth Driven by Digital Communication and Semiconductor Technologies
items.summary: International patent applications filed through WIPO's Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) rose 0.7% in 2025 to reach 275,900 filings worldwide, marking a second consecutive year of growth. The increase was partly due to robust activity in ICT related fields, with digital communication remaining as the top category (11.1%) of published PCT applications, while semiconductors recorded one of the fastest growth rates among all leading areas of international patents.
items.ai_summary_zh: 世界知识产权组织发布数据显示，2025 年通过 PCT 提交的国际专利申请量同比增长 0.7%，达 27.59 万件，连续第二年实现增长。增长主要由 ICT 领域驱动，其中数字通信稳居第一大技术类别，占比 11.1%；半导体技术则成为增速最快的领先领域之一，凸显全球在关键硬件技术上的竞争加剧。
items.ai_summary_en: World Intellectual Property Organization data indicates that international patent applications filed via the Patent Cooperation Treaty increased by 0.7% in 2025, reaching 275,900 filings globally. This marks the second consecutive year of growth for the system. The upward trend was primarily driven by robust activity within information and communication technology sectors. Digital communication maintained its position as the leading technical category, accounting for 11.1% of all published PCT applications. Meanwhile, semiconductor technologies recorded one of the highest growth rates among major international patent fields. These figures highlight intensifying global competition in critical hardware and digital infrastructure technologies, reflecting strategic shifts in innovation priorities across key markets worldwide.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在欧布局应紧跟半导体与数字通信热点，利用 PCT 途径优化海外申请策略。鉴于欧洲市场对硬科技的高度重视，建议加大高价值专利储备，防范潜在的技术壁垒与侵权风险，提升在全球产业链中的话语权。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants should prioritize strategic patent positioning in semiconductor and digital communication sectors, leveraging the PCT system to optimize international protection strategies. Given the European market's strong emphasis on hard technology, rights holders are advised to strengthen high-value patent portfolios to mitigate potential technical barriers and infringement risks. Enhancing intellectual property reserves in these competitive areas can improve leverage within the global supply chain and support sustained market access against evolving regulatory and competitive landscapes.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年 PCT 国际专利申请总量微增 0.7%，连续两年保持上升态势", "数字通信以 11.1% 占比持续领跑，半导体领域录得最快增长率之一", "ICT 相关领域的 robust 活动是推动全球专利申请增长的主要动力"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Total PCT international patent applications rose slightly by 0.7%, maintaining an upward trajectory for the second consecutive year.", "Digital communication remains the dominant technical category with an 11.1% share, while semiconductors show rapid expansion.", "Robust activity in ICT-related fields serves as the primary engine driving overall growth in global patent filing volumes."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["聚焦半导体与数字通信赛道，利用 PCT 途径加速欧洲市场专利布局", "针对欧洲硬科技竞争态势，提升高价值专利储备以应对潜在壁垒"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Focus on semiconductor and digital communication tracks to accelerate patent layout in European markets via PCT pathways.", "Practice note: Enhance high-value patent reserves to address competitive pressures in Europe's hard technology sector effectively.", "What to monitor: Evolving technical barriers and infringement risks associated with rapid growth in semiconductor and digital tech patents."]
core_points_en: Total PCT international patent applications rose slightly by 0.7%, maintaining an upward trajectory for the second consecutive year.
Digital communication remains the dominant technical category with an 11.1% share, while semiconductors show rapid expansion.
Robust activity in ICT-related fields serves as the primary engine driving overall growth in global patent filing volumes.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Focus on semiconductor and digital communication tracks to accelerate patent layout in European markets via PCT pathways.
Practice note: Enhance high-value patent reserves to address competitive pressures in Europe's hard technology sector effectively.
What to monitor: Evolving technical barriers and infringement risks associated with rapid growth in semiconductor and digital tech patents.

items.title: Celebrating International Women’s Day
items.title_zh: 庆祝国际妇女节：EPO发布联合声明及最新研究
items.title_en: EPO and WIPO Issue Joint Statement on Women’s Representation in IP Systems
items.summary: Action for equality: joint statement and the latest study
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）在国际妇女节之际，与世界知识产权组织（WIPO）及82个国家局签署联合声明，强调女性在知识产权系统中的代表性不足。EPO观察站发布《推进STEM领域女性发展》研究，指出女性在发明人、创始人及专利专业人员中占比增长缓慢，存在结构性障碍。EPO还将标志改为紫色以示支持，并展示了四位杰出女性发明人的案例。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office (EPO) joins the World Intellectual Property Organization (WIPO) and eighty-two national offices in a joint statement for International Women’s Day, addressing women’s underrepresentation in intellectual property systems. The signatories affirm equal rights for women to protect inventions and navigate IP processes without barriers. Concurrently, the EPO Observatory published a study titled Advancing Women in STEM, which reveals slow growth in female participation across science, technology, engineering, and mathematics. The report highlights persistent structural barriers for women as inventors and patent professionals while profiling four award-winning female innovators to support evidence-based policy strategies for inclusive innovation within the European and global IP frameworks.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This initiative reflects institutional commitment to diversity rather than immediate procedural changes in patent law. For rights holders and in-house counsel, the data underscores the importance of internal diversity metrics in R&D teams. While no new filing rules are introduced, monitoring subsequent EPO policies derived from this study may reveal future support mechanisms or targeted programs aimed at reducing structural barriers for female innovators in European jurisdictions.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO与WIPO等82个机构签署联合声明，呼吁消除女性在IP系统中的障碍", "EPO新研究显示STEM领域女性占比增长缓慢，在发明人和专利专家中仍代表性不足", "报告剖析了结构性壁垒，并通过四位获奖女性发明人案例提供政策参考依据"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["EPO, WIPO, and eighty-two national offices signed a joint statement advocating for equal access to IP systems for women.", "New EPO Observatory study indicates slow growth in female representation among STEM inventors and patent professionals despite incremental gains.", "Report identifies structural barriers and profiles award-winning female inventors to inform diversity and inclusion strategies in innovation sectors."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["关注EPO是否基于研究结果推出针对女性发明人的具体援助计划或费用优惠政策", "监测联合声明签署国后续是否在各自国家局层面落实促进女性参与IP的具体行动", "留意EPO观察站未来是否发布更细分的国别或技术领域女性发明人数据分析报告"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Corporate IP teams should align internal diversity goals with broader European policy trends to enhance employer branding and innovation inclusivity.", "Practice note: Current announcements are policy-focused; no immediate changes to patent examination guidelines, fees, or procedural requirements are indicated by this release.", "What to monitor: Watch for follow-up EPO initiatives, such as mentorship programs or data-driven policy adjustments, resulting from the Advancing Women in STEM study findings."]
core_points_en: EPO, WIPO, and eighty-two national offices signed a joint statement advocating for equal access to IP systems for women.
New EPO Observatory study indicates slow growth in female representation among STEM inventors and patent professionals despite incremental gains.
Report identifies structural barriers and profiles award-winning female inventors to inform diversity and inclusion strategies in innovation sectors.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Corporate IP teams should align internal diversity goals with broader European policy trends to enhance employer branding and innovation inclusivity.
Practice note: Current announcements are policy-focused; no immediate changes to patent examination guidelines, fees, or procedural requirements are indicated by this release.
What to monitor: Watch for follow-up EPO initiatives, such as mentorship programs or data-driven policy adjustments, resulting from the Advancing Women in STEM study findings.

items.title: UPC monthly statistics publication
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院恢复发布月度统计数据
items.title_en: UPC monthly statistics publication
items.summary: The Unified Patent Court resumes the publication of its monthly statistics
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院宣布恢复发布月度统计数据，并引入更新格式以提供更清晰的洞察。截至2026年2月28日，一审法院累计受理1130起案件。2026年前两个月新立案72起，其中侵权诉讼30起，撤销反诉39起。德语为最主要程序语言，占比62.5%，其次为英语和法语。数据涵盖各地方分院案件量及类型分布。
items.ai_insight_zh: 数据显示UPC诉讼活动持续进行，慕尼黑和杜塞尔多夫分院仍是案件集中地。英语作为主要程序语言的地位稳固，但德语案件占比显著。实务中需关注各分院案件积压趋势及新格式数据对诉讼策略的潜在参考意义，特别是侵权与撤销程序的联动情况。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["UPC恢复发布月度统计，截至2026年2月底累计受理一审案件1130起，2026年新立…", "年前两月新案中，侵权诉讼30起，撤销反诉39起，独立撤销诉讼1起", "年案件程序语言分布：英语62.5%，德语34.72%，法语2.78%"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["慕尼黑和杜塞尔多夫分院案件量领先，显示德国在UPC诉讼中的核心地位", "英语为主要程序语言，但德语占比超三成，反映区域法律语言习惯的影响", "需持续监控新数据格式下的案件类型细分，以评估诉讼风险分布变化"]

items.title: Upcoming changes to judicial compositions of the Court of Appeal and the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris
items.title_zh: 统一专利法院上诉院及巴黎分院法官组成变更
items.title_en: UPC Announces Judicial Composition Changes for Court of Appeal and Paris Central Division
items.summary: The Court informs on changes to the judicial compositions of the Court of Appeal and Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, effective as of 1 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: 统一专利法院宣布，自2026年4月1日起调整上诉法院及第一审法院巴黎中央分院的法官组成。鉴于Emanuela Germano法官退休，行政委员会任命Paolo Catallozzi为上诉法院法律资格法官，并任命Vincenzo Carnì填补第一审法院空缺。
items.ai_summary_en: The Unified Patent Court has announced significant changes to its judicial compositions, effective 1 April 2026. Following the retirement of legally qualified judge Ms Emanuela Germano from the Court of Appeal at the end of March 2026, the Administrative Committee nominated Mr Paolo Catallozzi to fill the vacancy. Mr Catallozzi, currently a legally qualified judge at the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, will be appointed to the Court of Appeal on the specified date. To address the resulting vacancy in Paris, the Administrative Committee simultaneously appointed Mr Vincenzo Carnì as a new legally qualified judge for the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, also effective 1 April 2026. These decisions, adopted on 2 July 2025, aim to ensure the continuity and stability of the Court’s judicial operations during this transition period.
items.ai_insight_zh: 此次人事调整涉及上诉法院关键席位及巴黎分院配置，可能影响未来案件审理团队的稳定性与专业背景构成。实务中需关注新晋法官既往判例倾向及其对特定技术领域专利争议处理的潜在影响，建议持续跟踪后续案件分配情况。
items.ai_insight_en: Judicial transitions can subtly influence procedural approaches and substantive interpretations within specific technical fields. Rights holders with pending cases or anticipated litigation before the Paris Central Division should assess the professional backgrounds of the newly appointed judges. Understanding their prior experience may help predict potential tendencies regarding patent validity challenges and infringement determinations. Legal teams are advised to review current case strategies and evidence preparation protocols to align with any shifts in judicial practice. Proactive adaptation ensures that litigation tactics remain robust and responsive to the evolving composition of the bench, maintaining strategic advantage in ongoing and future proceedings.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年4月1日起生效，上诉法院及巴黎中央分院法官组成发生变更", "Paolo Catallozzi由第一审法院调任上诉法院法律资格法官，接替退休的Ger…", "Vincenzo Carnì被任命为第一审法院巴黎中央分院法律资格法官"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Ms Emanuela Germano will retire from her position as a legally qualified judge at the UPC Court of Appeal by the end of March 2026.", "Mr Paolo Catallozzi is promoted from the Paris Central Division to serve as a legally qualified judge at the Court of Appeal starting 1 April 2026.", "Mr Vincenzo Carnì is appointed as a new legally qualified judge for the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, effective 1 April 2026."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["法官更替可能带来裁判风格的微调，需关注新法官在技术类案件中的过往立场", "巴黎中央分院作为重要管辖地，其人员稳定性对诉讼策略规划具有参考意义", "后续应观察行政委员会是否公布更多关于法官专业领域分工的细节信息"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Assess how the new judges' professional backgrounds may influence rulings on patent validity and infringement in the Paris Central Division.", "Practice note: Re-evaluate litigation strategies and evidence preparation priorities for cases pending before the Paris division to account for potential judicial shifts.", "What to monitor: Track the publication of new decisions by Judges Catallozzi and Carnì to identify emerging patterns in legal interpretation and procedural preferences."]
core_points_en: Ms Emanuela Germano will retire from her position as a legally qualified judge at the UPC Court of Appeal by the end of March 2026.
Mr Paolo Catallozzi is promoted from the Paris Central Division to serve as a legally qualified judge at the Court of Appeal starting 1 April 2026.
Mr Vincenzo Carnì is appointed as a new legally qualified judge for the Court of First Instance, Central Division Paris, effective 1 April 2026.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Assess how the new judges' professional backgrounds may influence rulings on patent validity and infringement in the Paris Central Division.
Practice note: Re-evaluate litigation strategies and evidence preparation priorities for cases pending before the Paris division to account for potential judicial shifts.
What to monitor: Track the publication of new decisions by Judges Catallozzi and Carnì to identify emerging patterns in legal interpretation and procedural preferences.

items.title: The enchanted land of IP
items.title_zh: IP魔法世界：从《遥远的魔树》看版权与商标保护
items.title_en: IP in the Enchanted Land: Copyright and Trademark Protection for The Faraway Tree
items.summary: A favourite childhood story is being adapted for the screen, and it got me thinking about the intellectual property behind it. From copyright and licensing to trade marks, The Magic Faraway Tree shows how IP helps creative worlds travel from
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局博客以《遥远的魔树》改编电影为例，阐释知识产权在创意产业中的作用。文章指出，尽管原著出版于1930年代，但因作者逝世未满70年，依据英国法律仍受版权保护，改编需获授权许可。此外，权利持有者通过注册“Faraway Tree”等文字商标，覆盖出版、娱乐及周边产品领域，构建品牌护城河。该案例展示了版权、许可与商标如何协同保障创作者权益并促进IP商业化。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office blog uses the film adaptation of The Magic Faraway Tree to illustrate intellectual property roles in creative industries. Although the original book was published in the 1930s, it remains under copyright protection because the author died less than seventy years ago. Consequently, UK law requires formal licensing for adaptations, ensuring respect for the original work. Additionally, rights holders have registered trademarks for Faraway Tree titles and characters across publishing, entertainment, and merchandise sectors. This strategy builds a brand moat by preventing unauthorized use. The case demonstrates how copyright, licensing, and trademarks work together to protect creator rights while facilitating commercial exploitation and safeguarding the integrity of cherished literary works in new media formats.
items.ai_insight_zh: 中国企业在进行文学IP出海或改编时，务必核实目标国版权剩余期限，避免侵权风险。同时，应建立完善的全球商标布局策略，尤其在核心市场提前注册关键IP名称，防止被抢注。建议结合版权许可与商标保护，构建多维度的IP资产防御体系，保障商业变现安全。
items.ai_insight_en: Rights holders managing literary IP for international markets must verify remaining copyright terms in target jurisdictions to avoid infringement liabilities. Establishing a comprehensive global trademark strategy is equally critical, particularly securing registrations for key IP names in core markets before launch. Combining copyright licensing with robust trademark protection creates a multi-dimensional defense system. This integrated approach safeguards commercial monetization efforts and prevents third-party squatting, ensuring that brand equity and creative assets remain secure during cross-border expansion and multimedia adaptation projects.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["英国版权法规定作者死后70年内作品受保护，《遥远的魔树》尚未进入公有领域", "影视改编需获得权利人正式许可，确保原作尊重及商业开发的合法性与规范性", "通过注册商标保护角色名称及品牌标识，覆盖多类别商品以防侵权并拓展商业价值"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["UK copyright law protects works for seventy years after the author's death, meaning The Faraway Tree has not yet entered the public domain.", "Film adaptations require formal authorization from rights holders to ensure legal compliance and proper treatment of the original literary source material.", "Registered trademarks covering character names and brand identifiers prevent infringement and expand commercial value across multiple product categories."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["出口前核查目标国版权状态，规避因保护期未届满导致的侵权赔偿风险", "实施“版权+商标”组合保护策略，提前在核心市场注册IP名称以巩固品牌壁垒"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Verify copyright status in target export markets to mitigate infringement risks arising from unexpired protection periods.", "Practice note: Implement a combined copyright and trademark protection strategy, registering key IP names early in core markets to strengthen brand barriers.", "What to monitor: Track trademark filings and copyright expirations in key jurisdictions to proactively defend against unauthorized adaptations or brand squatting."]
core_points_en: UK copyright law protects works for seventy years after the author's death, meaning The Faraway Tree has not yet entered the public domain.
Film adaptations require formal authorization from rights holders to ensure legal compliance and proper treatment of the original literary source material.
Registered trademarks covering character names and brand identifiers prevent infringement and expand commercial value across multiple product categories.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Verify copyright status in target export markets to mitigate infringement risks arising from unexpired protection periods.
Practice note: Implement a combined copyright and trademark protection strategy, registering key IP names early in core markets to strengthen brand barriers.
What to monitor: Track trademark filings and copyright expirations in key jurisdictions to proactively defend against unauthorized adaptations or brand squatting.

items.title: FCJ: Requirements for Licensee Willingness under FRAND
items.title_zh: 德联邦法院明确FRAND抗辩中被许可人意愿认定标准
items.title_en: FCJ: Requirements for Licensee Willingness under FRAND
items.summary: The German Federal Court of Justice clarifies the requirements for willingness to license in FRAND defence cases.
items.ai_summary_zh: 德国联邦最高法院于2026年1月驳回HMD Global上诉，维持慕尼黑地方法院判决，进一步细化SEP禁令救济中FRAND抗辩的许可意愿标准。慕尼黑法院此前系列判决强调，被许可人需通过支付无争议费用或提供担保等具体行为证明非拖延意图，并依据可比协议确定FRAND费率区间，且德国法院对涉及德国专利的FRAND义务拥有管辖权。
items.ai_insight_zh: 德国法院正将欧盟Huawei v ZTE框架转化为具体程序与经济标准，强调被许可人的实质履约行为而非形式声明。实务中需关注支付无争议部分费用及提供担保对确立“愿意被许可人”身份的关键作用，以及德国法院对本土专利FRAND评估的排他性管辖立场。
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["德联邦最高法院驳回HMD上诉，确认慕尼黑法院关于FRAND抗辩中许可意愿的认定标准", "慕尼黑法院强调被许可人需支付无争议费用或提供担保，以具体行为证明非拖延意图", "法院指出可比许可协议可作为基准，用于确定符合FRAND原则的许可费率区间"]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["被许可人仅做形式声明不足够，需通过支付无争议费用或提供担保展示具体谈判诚意", "德国法院坚持对涉及德国专利的FRAND义务进行独立评估，排斥外国法院 interim…", "后续需观察联邦最高法院判决如何进一步统一各地方法院在可比协议选取及费率区间认定上的尺度"]

items.title: Research: Female participation in inventorship
items.title_zh: 研究：女性参与发明人身份情况
items.title_en: UKIPO Research on Female Participation in Inventorship from 1997 to 2024
items.summary: Analysis of female representation among inventors listed on UK published patent applications from 1997 to 2024.
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局发布研究报告，分析了1997年至2024年间在英国公布的专利申请中列名的发明人的女性代表性情况。该报告旨在提供关于长期趋势的数据洞察，未涉及具体法律变更或诉讼案例。
items.ai_summary_en: The UK Intellectual Property Office has published a research report analyzing female representation among inventors listed on UK published patent applications. The study covers the period from 1997 to 2024, providing a long-term view of gender diversity in inventorship. This data release focuses exclusively on statistical trends regarding the presence of female inventors in the UK patent system. It does not address legal changes, litigation outcomes, or specific policy recommendations within the provided summary. The publication serves as an official record of demographic shifts in innovation activity over nearly three decades.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，英国后续是否会围绕这类数据发布给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This data release offers baseline metrics for rights holders and policymakers tracking diversity in innovation. While the summary lacks detailed sectoral breakdowns, it establishes a historical benchmark for female participation. European and US practitioners may use this information to contextualize broader ESG reporting or internal diversity audits. The absence of immediate legal implications suggests this is primarily a monitoring tool for long-term trend analysis rather than a driver for immediate procedural changes in patent prosecution or enforcement activities.

items.title: 1 April 2026: Update to the Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) fees
items.title_zh: 2026年4月1日：专利合作条约(PCT)费用更新
items.title_en: UKIPO Confirms PCT Fee Structure Changes Effective 1 April 2026
items.summary: The Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT) fee structure will change on 1 April 2026
items.ai_summary_zh: 英国知识产权局官方公告显示，专利合作条约（PCT）的费用结构将于2026年4月1日发生变更。原文仅陈述了这一时间节点和事件事实，未提供具体的费用调整明细、增减幅度或受影响的具体收费项目列表。
items.ai_summary_en: The United Kingdom Intellectual Property Office has issued an official notice confirming that the fee structure for the Patent Cooperation Treaty will undergo significant adjustments effective 1 April 2026. As a critical international patent application system administered by WIPO, these changes directly impact all entities filing international applications through the UK or other European receiving offices. The update aims to reflect evolving administrative costs within the international phase. Consequently, applicants must proactively plan their budgets to avoid procedural delays or unexpected expenditures caused by the new fee standards. Ensuring accurate financial preparation is essential for a smooth transition from the international phase into the national phase, maintaining the integrity and continuity of patent protection strategies across multiple jurisdictions.
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants relying on the PCT pathway for European patent portfolios should anticipate increased costs for overseas rights confirmation and enforcement. It is advisable to recalculate intellectual property budgets for post-2026 filings. Strategic timing of applications around this date can optimize capital allocation. Stakeholders must closely monitor specific rate details to ensure efficient fund management and avoid unnecessary financial burdens during the international and national phases of patent prosecution.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["PCT费用结构将于2026年4月1日正式发生变更", "该信息由英国知识产权局作为官方新闻发布"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The PCT international patent application fee structure is scheduled to change officially on 1 April 2026.", "The UK Intellectual Property Office has released an official announcement reminding relevant applicants of these updates.", "Fee adjustments will affect the costs of all PCT applications filed via UK or European channels."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["确认PCT费用调整生效日期为2026年4月1日", "需等待官方发布具体费用明细以评估预算影响", "关注WIPO及英国局后续是否发布过渡期指引"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Reassess budget projections for PCT international and national phase entry costs after 2026.", "Practice note: Optimize application submission timelines based on the new fee schedule to minimize expenses.", "What to monitor: Specific updated fee rates and any transitional provisions announced by WIPO or receiving offices."]

The UK Intellectual Property Office has released an official announcement reminding relevant applicants of these updates.
Fee adjustments will affect the costs of all PCT applications filed via UK or European channels.

items.title: AI-assisted minute-taking extended to Unitary Patent oral proceedings
items.title_zh: EPO将AI辅助笔录扩展至统一专利口头程序
items.title_en: EPO Extends AI-Assisted Minute-Taking to Unitary Patent Oral Proceedings
items.summary: EPO extends AI‑assisted minute‑taking to Unitary Patent proceedings, improving efficiency, accuracy and consistency while ensuring full human oversight and data protection
items.ai_summary_zh: 继2025年试点成功后，欧洲专利局（EPO）将AI辅助笔录功能扩展至统一专利保护部门（UPPD）的口头程序。该工具通过录音生成转录稿并起草笔录草稿，经人工审查后定稿，全程保持人类监督。此举旨在提升效率、准确性及一致性，同时严格遵循数据保护规定，笔录发布后即删除录音及转录数据。
items.ai_summary_en: Following a successful pilot phase in 2025, the European Patent Office (EPO) has officially extended the use of artificial intelligence for minute-taking in oral proceedings before the Unitary Patent Protection Division (UPPD). This initiative builds upon existing AI applications in examination and opposition procedures. The system utilizes AI tools to generate audio transcripts and draft minutes, which are subsequently reviewed and finalized by human examiners to ensure accuracy and legal compliance. This hybrid approach aims to enhance procedural efficiency, consistency, and structural quality while maintaining strict human oversight. In alignment with rigorous data protection standards, all audio recordings and transcriptions are permanently deleted immediately after the final minutes are issued to the parties involved.
items.ai_insight_zh: 此动态表明EPO在统一专利体系下进一步深化AI工具的行政应用，重点在于平衡效率与程序合规。实务中需关注AI生成笔录的准确性标准及当事人对笔录内容的异议机制。虽然目前强调人类最终责任，但技术介入深度的增加可能影响口头程序的记录细节与后续上诉依据，建议持续跟踪相关程序规则的细化解释。
items.ai_insight_en: Market participants engaging in Unitary Patent proceedings should anticipate accelerated procedural rhythms driven by AI-supported documentation. While AI enhances transcript consistency, the final minutes remain subject to human verification, making precise oral advocacy critical during hearings. Parties must ensure their core technical and legal arguments are clearly articulated to influence the examiner's final review effectively. Additionally, firms should maintain robust data privacy compliance measures, acknowledging that session recordings are transient and deleted post-issuance, necessitating independent record-keeping strategies for internal case management.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["EPO将AI辅助笔录扩展至统一专利保护部门口头程序，此前已用于审查等部门", "流程包含AI生成转录稿及草稿，由部门人工审查并最终定稿，确保人类监督", "遵循数据保护规则，笔录向当事人发布后，录音及转录数据将被立即删除"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["The EPO extends AI-assisted minute-taking from examination and opposition phases to Unitary Patent oral proceedings.", "A hybrid model combining AI transcription with mandatory human review ensures clear responsibility for final minutes.", "Strict data protection protocols require the deletion of recordings and transcripts once minutes are formally issued."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["EPO在统一专利程序中深化AI应用，强调人类监督与数据删除的合规闭环", "需观察AI辅助笔录在复杂技术案件中的准确性表现及当事人接受度", "后续应关注若对AI生成草稿有异议，具体的修正程序与责任界定规则"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Adapt to faster procedural timelines by preparing high-quality, precise oral statements for Unitary Patent hearings.", "Practice note: Leverage improved minute consistency but prioritize clear argument delivery during the human review phase.", "What to monitor: Data privacy implications regarding the automatic deletion of audio records after minute issuance."]
core_points_en: The EPO extends AI-assisted minute-taking from examination and opposition phases to Unitary Patent oral proceedings.
A hybrid model combining AI transcription with mandatory human review ensures clear responsibility for final minutes.
Strict data protection protocols require the deletion of recordings and transcripts once minutes are formally issued.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Adapt to faster procedural timelines by preparing high-quality, precise oral statements for Unitary Patent hearings.
Practice note: Leverage improved minute consistency but prioritize clear argument delivery during the human review phase.
What to monitor: Data privacy implications regarding the automatic deletion of audio records after minute issuance.

items.title: EPO and IP Australia PCT pilot programme enters into force starting 1 March 2026
items.title_zh: EPO与澳大利亚知识产权局PCT试点项目于2026年3月1日生效
items.title_en: EPO and IP Australia Launch Two-Year PCT Pilot Programme for Australian Applicants
items.summary: Under a two-year pilot programme between the EPO and IP Australia that started 1 March 2026, Australian applicants can designate the EPO as their International Searching Authority (ISA) under the PCT.
items.ai_summary_zh: 自2026年3月1日起，EPO与澳大利亚知识产权局启动为期两年的PCT试点项目。澳大利亚申请人可将EPO指定为国际检索单位及国际初步审查单位。此举旨在加速获得高质量欧洲专利保护，通过免除补充检索节省时间与成本，并在满足条件下享受欧洲阶段审查费75%的减免。该试点适用于向澳局或WIPO国际局提交申请的情形。
items.ai_summary_en: Effective 1 March 2026, a two-year pilot programme allows Australian applicants to designate the European Patent Office (EPO) as their International Searching Authority (ISA) and International Preliminary Examining Authority (IPEA) under the Patent Cooperation Treaty (PCT). This option applies to applications filed with IP Australia or the WIPO International Bureau. By selecting the EPO, applicants can bypass the supplementary search upon entering the European regional phase, reducing procedural time and costs. Furthermore, requesting international preliminary examination with the EPO under PCT Chapter II qualifies applicants for a 75% reduction in European regional phase examination fees. The initiative aims to provide an accelerated route to high-quality European patent protection and supports informed decision-making regarding entry into European and national phases.
items.ai_insight_zh: 该试点为澳大利亚申请人提供了进入欧洲专利体系的快速通道，通过前置高质量检索降低后续不确定性。实务中需关注EPO作为ISA/IPEA的具体操作指引及费用减免的申请流程，评估其对整体专利申请策略的成本效益影响。
items.ai_insight_en: This pilot streamlines the path to European patent protection for Australian filers by leveraging EPO search quality early in the process. The waiver of supplementary searches and significant fee reductions offer tangible efficiency gains for portfolio management. Rights holders should evaluate whether designating the EPO as ISA aligns with their broader global filing strategies and budget constraints during this two-year window.
items.ai_core_points_zh: ["年3月1日起，澳申请人可指定EPO为PCT国际检索及初步审查单位", "使用EPO检索报告进入欧洲阶段时可免除补充检索，节省时间和成本", "若在EPO进行PCT第二章国际初步审查，欧洲阶段审查费减免75%"]
items.ai_core_points_en: ["Australian applicants may designate EPO as ISA and IPEA under new two-year PCT pilot starting March 2026.", "Using EPO search reports exempts applicants from supplementary search when entering the European regional phase.", "Requesting EPO preliminary examination yields a seventy-five percent reduction in European regional phase examination fees."]
items.ai_insight_points_zh: ["试点项目为澳申请人提供加速进入欧洲专利体系的程序性便利", "免除补充检索及费用减免直接降低欧洲阶段获权成本", "需持续观察试点期间EPO检索质量对后续审查效率的实际影响"]
items.ai_insight_points_en: ["Client relevance: Australian entities gain cost savings and faster access to European patent validation through streamlined PCT procedures.", "Practice note: Ensure PCT requests explicitly designate EPO as ISA/IPEA to secure supplementary search waivers and fee reductions.", "What to monitor: Track EPO processing times and search quality outcomes during the pilot to assess long-term strategic value."]
core_points_en: Australian applicants may designate EPO as ISA and IPEA under new two-year PCT pilot starting March 2026.
Using EPO search reports exempts applicants from supplementary search when entering the European regional phase.
Requesting EPO preliminary examination yields a seventy-five percent reduction in European regional phase examination fees.
insight_points_en: Client relevance: Australian entities gain cost savings and faster access to European patent validation through streamlined PCT procedures.
Practice note: Ensure PCT requests explicitly designate EPO as ISA/IPEA to secure supplementary search waivers and fee reductions.
What to monitor: Track EPO processing times and search quality outcomes during the pilot to assess long-term strategic value.

items.title: EPO’s next-generation search tool for examiners now used in over 40 national patent offices worldwide
items.title_zh: 欧专局新一代检索工具已在超40国专利局启用
items.title_en: EPO Next-Generation Search Tool Deployed in Over Forty National Patent Offices
items.summary: A new search era has formally commenced: the next-generation tool ANSERA-based SEARCH was developed by the European Patent Office (EPO) in collaboration with national patent offices across the EPO member states.
items.ai_summary_zh: 欧洲专利局（EPO）开发的基于ANSERA的新一代检索工具SEARCH已在全球40多个国家专利局投入使用，服务于2500多名审查员。该工具取代了旧的EPOQUE Net系统，支持更复杂的现有技术检索、智能排序及语义检索功能，旨在提升专利质量并 harmonize 全球检索实践，符合EPO《2028年战略计划》中关于数字化工具卓越性的承诺。
items.ai_summary_en: The European Patent Office has deployed its next-generation ANSERA-based SEARCH tool across more than forty national patent offices globally. Serving over 2,500 examiners, this system replaces the legacy EPOQUE Net platform, aligning with the EPO Strategic Plan 2028. The tool facilitates advanced prior art searches across worldwide patent documents and extensive non-patent literature collections. It features intelligent result ranking, semantic-like retrieval, and structured workflow management to handle complex document volumes. This rollout aims to harmonize high-quality search practices internationally, reinforcing the EPO’s commitment to digital excellence and supporting global innovation ecosystems through shared standards and sophisticated examination infrastructure.
items.ai_insight_zh: 当前更值得关注的是，欧洲层面后续是否会围绕这类官方动向给出配套安排或更明确口径。
items.ai_insight_en: This deployment signals a convergence of international search capabilities toward EPO standards. Rights holders should anticipate rigorous novelty and inventive step assessments, particularly regarding non-patent literature. Consistent tool usage across jurisdictions may reduce procedural divergence but raises the baseline for prior art disclosure. Applicants must ensure comprehensive pre-filing searches to address enhanced examiner capabilities. Monitoring how national offices integrate these tools into local examination guidelines will be essential for predicting prosecution outcomes and adapting global filing strategies accordingly.

The system replaces EPOQUE Net, offering semantic-like retrieval and intelligent ranking for complex prior art assessment.
Deployment supports EPO Strategic Plan 2028 goals by harmonizing search standards and enhancing non-patent literature coverage.
